### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE BODY mulUnDisPkg02;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE mulUnDisPkg02;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE mulUnDisPkg02 IS 
   TYPE int_arr_typ IS TABLE OF NUMBER(2);
   Procedure mulUnionDistinctTest02(
      count         OUT INTEGER,       collection_3  OUT int_arr_typ); 
End mulUnDisPkg02; 
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY mulUnDisPkg02 
IS
  Procedure mulUnionDistinctTest02(     count         OUT INTEGER, 
      collection_3  OUT int_arr_typ) 
  IS   DECLARE
    collection_1    int_arr_typ;
    collection_2    int_arr_typ;
  BEGIN
    collection_1 := int_arr_typ(10,20,30,30);
    collection_2 := int_arr_typ(40,50);
    collection_3 := collection_1 MULTISET UNION DISTINCT collection_2;    count :=  collection_3.COUNT;
  END mulUnionDistinctTest02;
END mulUnDisPkg02;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

SELECT
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargnames IS NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill(''::name,ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_agg(pg_attribute.attname ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proargnames
END AS proargnames,
pg_proc.proargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proallargtypes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(string_to_array(pg_proc.proargtypes::text,' ')::oid[],array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proallargtypes
END AS proallargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargmodes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill('i'::"char",ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_fill('o'::"char",ARRAY[array_length(array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid), 1)]))
    ELSE COALESCE(pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.proargmodes) -- EnterpriseDB
END AS proargmodes
FROM pg_proc
LEFT JOIN pg_type ON pg_proc.prorettype = pg_type.oid
LEFT JOIN pg_attribute ON pg_type.typrelid = pg_attribute.attrelid AND pg_attribute.attnum >= 1 AND NOT pg_attribute.attisdropped
WHERE pg_proc.oid = :proname::regproc
GROUP BY pg_proc.proargnames, pg_proc.proargtypes, pg_proc.proallargtypes, pg_proc.proargmodes, pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.pronargs;

  BEGIN

    collection_2 := int_arr_typ(40,50);
    collection_3 := collection_1 MULTISET UNION DISTINCT collection_2;    count :=  collection_3.COUNT;
  END mulUnionDistinctTest02;
END mulUnDisPkg02;

	WHEN pg_proc.proargnames IS NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill(''::name,ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_agg(pg_attribute.attname ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proargnames
END AS proargnames,
pg_proc.proargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proallargtypes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(string_to_array(pg_proc.proargtypes::text,' ')::oid[],array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proallargtypes
END AS proallargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargmodes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill('i'::"char",ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_fill('o'::"char",ARRAY[array_length(array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid), 1)]))
    ELSE COALESCE(pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.proargmodes) -- EnterpriseDB
END AS proargmodes
FROM pg_proc
LEFT JOIN pg_type ON pg_proc.prorettype = pg_type.oid
LEFT JOIN pg_attribute ON pg_type.typrelid = pg_attribute.attrelid AND pg_attribute.attnum >= 1 AND NOT pg_attribute.attisdropped

CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE mulUnPkg 
IS 
   TYPE int_arr_typ IS TABLE OF NUMBER(2);
   PROCEDURE mulUnionTest( 
      count         OUT INTEGER, 
      collection_3  OUT int_arr_typ); 
END mulUnPkg; 
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY mulUnPkg 
Is 
  PROCEDURE mulUnionTest(
     count         OUT integer, 
      collection_3  OUT int_arr_typ)
  IS
    DECLARE
    collection_1    int_arr_typ;
    collection_2    int_arr_typ;
  BEGIN
    collection_1 := int_arr_typ(10,20,30);
    collection_2 := int_arr_typ(30,40);
    collection_3 := collection_1 MULTISET UNION ALL collection_2;
    count :=  collection_3.COUNT;
  END mulUnionTest;
End mulUnPkg;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

SELECT
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargnames IS NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill(''::name,ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_agg(pg_attribute.attname ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proargnames
END AS proargnames,
pg_proc.proargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proallargtypes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(string_to_array(pg_proc.proargtypes::text,' ')::oid[],array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proallargtypes
END AS proallargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargmodes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill('i'::"char",ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_fill('o'::"char",ARRAY[array_length(array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid), 1)]))
    ELSE COALESCE(pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.proargmodes) -- EnterpriseDB
END AS proargmodes
FROM pg_proc
LEFT JOIN pg_type ON pg_proc.prorettype = pg_type.oid
LEFT JOIN pg_attribute ON pg_type.typrelid = pg_attribute.attrelid AND pg_attribute.attnum >= 1 AND NOT pg_attribute.attisdropped
WHERE pg_proc.oid = :proname::regproc
GROUP BY pg_proc.proargnames, pg_proc.proargtypes, pg_proc.proallargtypes, pg_proc.proargmodes, pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.pronargs;

DROP PROCEDURE CharacterDataAssociativeArray_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE CharacterDataAssociativeArray_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE job_arr_typ IS TABLE OF NUMBER INDEX BY VARCHAR2(9);
    job_arr         job_arr_typ;
 BEGIN
    job_arr('ANALYST')   := 100;
    job_arr('CLERK')     := 200;
    job_arr('MANAGER')   := 300;
    job_arr('SALESMAN')  := 400;
    job_arr('PRESIDENT') := 500;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('ANALYST  : ' || job_arr('ANALYST'));
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('CLERK    : ' || job_arr('CLERK'));
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('MANAGER  : ' || job_arr('MANAGER'));
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SALESMAN : ' || job_arr('SALESMAN'));
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('PRESIDENT: ' || job_arr('PRESIDENT'));
 END;

DROP PROCEDURE RecordLevelAssignmentAssociativeArrayTest_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE RecordLevelAssignmentAssociativeArrayTest_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE emp_rec_typ IS RECORD (
        empno       NUMBER(4),
        ename       VARCHAR2(10)
    );
    TYPE emp_arr_typ IS TABLE OF emp_rec_typ INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    emp_arr         emp_arr_typ;
    CURSOR emp_cur IS SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1 WHERE ROWNUM <= 10 order by empno;
    i               INTEGER := 0;
 BEGIN
    FOR r_emp IN emp_cur LOOP
        i := i + 1;
        emp_arr(i) := r_emp;
    END LOOP;
    FOR j IN 1..10 LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(emp_arr(j).empno || ':' ||
            emp_arr(j).ename);
    END LOOP;
END;

 IS

        empno       NUMBER(4),
        ename       VARCHAR2(10)
    );
    TYPE emp_arr_typ IS TABLE OF emp_rec_typ INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    emp_arr         emp_arr_typ;
    CURSOR emp_cur IS SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1 WHERE ROWNUM <= 10 order by empno;
    i               INTEGER := 0;
 BEGIN
     FOR r_emp IN emp_cur LOOP
        i := i + 1;
        emp_arr(i).empno := r_emp.empno;
        emp_arr(i).ename := r_emp.ename;
    END LOOP;
    FOR j IN 1..10 LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(emp_arr(j).empno || ':' ||
            emp_arr(j).ename);
    END LOOP;
 END;

 IS
 DECLARE

    emp_arr         emp_arr_typ;
    CURSOR emp_cur IS SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1 WHERE ROWNUM <= 10 order by empno;
    i               INTEGER := 0;
 BEGIN
    FOR r_emp IN emp_cur LOOP
        i := i + 1;
        emp_arr(i).empno := r_emp.empno;
        emp_arr(i).ename := r_emp.ename;
    END LOOP;
    FOR j IN 1..10 LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(emp_arr(j).empno || ':' ||
            emp_arr(j).ename);
    END LOOP;
 END;

DROP PROCEDURE SimpleAssociativeArray_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE SimpleAssociativeArray_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
 TYPE emp_arr_typ IS TABLE OF VARCHAR2(10) INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER; 
 emp_arr         emp_arr_typ; 
 CURSOR emp_cur IS SELECT ename FROM emp1 WHERE ROWNUM <= 10 order by empno; 
 i  INTEGER := 0; 
 BEGIN 
 FOR r_emp IN emp_cur LOOP 
   i := i + 1; 
   emp_arr(i) := r_emp.ename; 
 END LOOP; 
  FOR j IN 1..10 LOOP 
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(emp_arr(j)); 
 END LOOP; 
 END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE dept_salary_rpt (
  p_deptno         IN  NUMBER, 
  todays_date      OUT DATE, 
  rpt_title        OUT VARCHAR2(60),
  base_sal         OUT INTEGER, 
  base_comm_rate   OUT NUMBER,   base_annual      OUT NUMBER 
)
IS
BEGIN
    todays_date := SYSDATE;
    rpt_title := 'Report For Department # ' || p_deptno || ' on '
 || todays_date;
    base_sal := 35525;
    base_comm_rate := 1.33;
    base_annual := ROUND(base_sal * base_comm_rate, 2);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_delete (
   p_empno  IN  emp1.empno%TYPE, 
   msg      OUT VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg := 'Deleted Employee # : ' || p_empno;
    ELSE
        msg='Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_insert (
    p_empno         IN emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_ename         IN emp1.ename%TYPE,
    p_job           IN emp1.job%TYPE,
    p_mgr           IN emp1.mgr%TYPE,
    p_hiredate      IN emp1.hiredate%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN emp1.comm%TYPE,
    p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE
)
IS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO emp1 VALUES (
        p_empno,
        p_ename,
        p_job,
        p_mgr,
        p_hiredate,
        p_sal,
        p_comm,
        p_deptno);

EXCEPTION
    WHEN OTHERS THEN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('OTHERS exception on INSERT of employee # '
            || p_empno);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLCODE : ' || SQLCODE);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLERRM : ' || SQLERRM);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE divide_it (
    p_numerator     IN  NUMBER,
    p_denominator   IN  NUMBER,
    p_result        OUT NUMBER
)
IS
BEGIN
    IF p_denominator = 0 THEN
        NULL;
    ELSE
        p_result := p_numerator / p_denominator;
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE return_into (
    p_empno         IN  emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN  emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN  emp1.comm%TYPE,
    v_empno         OUT emp1.empno%TYPE,
    v_ename         OUT emp1.ename%TYPE,
    v_job           OUT emp1.job%TYPE,
    v_sal           OUT emp1.sal%TYPE,
    v_comm          OUT emp1.comm%TYPE,
    v_deptno        OUT emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    v_msg           OUT VARCHAR2(60) )
IS
BEGIN
    UPDATE emp1 SET sal = p_sal, comm = p_comm WHERE empno = p_empno
    RETURNING
        empno,
        ename,
        job,
        sal,
        comm,
        deptno
    INTO
        v_empno,
        v_ename,
        v_job,
        v_sal,
        v_comm,
        v_deptno;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        v_msg := 'Updated Employee # : ' || v_empno;
    ELSE
        v_msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE return_into_from_delete (
    p_empno         IN    emp1.empno%TYPE, 
    r_emp           OUT   emp1%ROWTYPE,     msg             OUT   VARCHAR2(60) )
IS
BEGIN
    DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno
    RETURNING
        *
    INTO
        r_emp;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg := 'Deleted Employee # : ' || r_emp.empno;
    ELSE
        msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE select_into_query (
    p_empno         IN  emp1.empno%TYPE,
    r_emp           OUT emp1%ROWTYPE, 
    v_avgsal        OUT emp1.sal%TYPE, 
    v_msg           OUT VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    SELECT * INTO r_emp
        FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;

    SELECT AVG(sal) INTO v_avgsal
        FROM emp1 WHERE deptno = r_emp.deptno;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
        v_msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE select_into_exception_query (
    p_deptno        IN   emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    v_ename         OUT  emp1.ename%TYPE, 
    v_msg           OUT  VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    SELECT ename INTO v_ename FROM emp1 WHERE deptno = p_deptno ORDER BY ename;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN TOO_MANY_ROWS THEN
        v_msg := 'More than one employee found';
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_comp_update (
    p_empno         IN emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN emp1.comm%TYPE, 
    msg             OUT VARCHAR2(60) )
IS
BEGIN
    UPDATE emp1 SET sal = p_sal, comm = p_comm WHERE empno = p_empno;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg := 'Updated Employee # : ' || p_empno;
    ELSE
        msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE status_query(
    p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    v_count         OUT NUMBER(8),
    msg_found       OUT VARCHAR2(60),     msg_not_found   OUT VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    UPDATE emp1 SET  mgr = 300 WHERE deptno = p_deptno;
    v_count :=  SQL%ROWCOUNT; 
     IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg_found := '# rows updated: ' || SQL%ROWCOUNT; 
    END IF;    IF SQL%NOTFOUND THEN
        msg_not_found :='No rows were updated';
    END IF;END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS dept_salary_rpt
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS emp_delete
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS emp_insert
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS divide_it
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS return_into
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS return_into_from_delete
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS select_into_query
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS select_into_exception_query
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS emp_comp_update
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS status_query
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS emp1 CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE emp1(empno NUMBER(8),  ename VARCHAR2(10),job VARCHAR2(9), mgr NUMBER(8), hiredate DATE, sal NUMBER(10,2), comm NUMBER(10,2), deptno NUMBER(4))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,mgr, hiredate, sal, comm,  deptno)  VALUES(1001,'SMITH','Sales',200,to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),120000,0,11)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,mgr, hiredate, sal, comm,  deptno)  VALUES(3001,'WARD','Sales',200,to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),100000,0,31)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,mgr, hiredate, sal, comm,  deptno)  VALUES(4001,'JONES','Sales',200,to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),120000,0,41)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,mgr, hiredate, sal, comm,  deptno)  VALUES(4002,'MARTIN','Sales',200,to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),100000,0,41)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,mgr, hiredate, sal, comm,  deptno)  VALUES(5001,'BLAKE','Sales',200,to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),120000,0,51)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE dept_salary_rpt (
  p_deptno         IN  NUMBER, 
  todays_date      OUT DATE, 
  rpt_title        OUT VARCHAR2(60),
  base_sal         OUT INTEGER, 
  base_comm_rate   OUT NUMBER,   base_annual      OUT NUMBER 
)
IS
BEGIN
    todays_date := SYSDATE;
    rpt_title := 'Report For Department # ' || p_deptno || ' on '
 || todays_date;
    base_sal := 35525;
    base_comm_rate := 1.33;
    base_annual := ROUND(base_sal * base_comm_rate, 2);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_delete (
   p_empno  IN  emp1.empno%TYPE, 
   msg      OUT VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg := 'Deleted Employee # : ' || p_empno;
    ELSE
        msg='Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_insert (
    p_empno         IN emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_ename         IN emp1.ename%TYPE,
    p_job           IN emp1.job%TYPE,
    p_mgr           IN emp1.mgr%TYPE,
    p_hiredate      IN emp1.hiredate%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN emp1.comm%TYPE,
    p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE
)
IS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO emp1 VALUES (
        p_empno,
        p_ename,
        p_job,
        p_mgr,
        p_hiredate,
        p_sal,
        p_comm,
        p_deptno);

EXCEPTION
    WHEN OTHERS THEN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('OTHERS exception on INSERT of employee # '
            || p_empno);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLCODE : ' || SQLCODE);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLERRM : ' || SQLERRM);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

    p_numerator     IN  NUMBER,
    p_denominator   IN  NUMBER,
    p_result        OUT NUMBER
)
IS
BEGIN
    IF p_denominator = 0 THEN
        NULL;
    ELSE
        p_result := p_numerator / p_denominator;
    END IF;
END;

    p_empno         IN emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_ename         IN emp1.ename%TYPE,
    p_job           IN emp1.job%TYPE,
    p_mgr           IN emp1.mgr%TYPE,
    p_hiredate      IN emp1.hiredate%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN emp1.comm%TYPE,

IS

    WHEN OTHERS THEN

            || p_empno);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLCODE : ' || SQLCODE);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLERRM : ' || SQLERRM);
END;

END;

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_insert (
    p_empno         IN emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_ename         IN emp1.ename%TYPE,
    p_job           IN emp1.job%TYPE,
    p_mgr           IN emp1.mgr%TYPE,
    p_hiredate      IN emp1.hiredate%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN emp1.comm%TYPE,
    p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE
)
IS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO emp1 VALUES (
        p_empno,
        p_ename,
        p_job,
        p_mgr,
        p_hiredate,
        p_sal,
        p_comm,
        p_deptno);

EXCEPTION
    WHEN OTHERS THEN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('OTHERS exception on INSERT of employee # '
            || p_empno);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLCODE : ' || SQLCODE);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLERRM : ' || SQLERRM);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE divide_it (
    p_numerator     IN  NUMBER,
    p_denominator   IN  NUMBER,
    p_result        OUT NUMBER
)
IS
BEGIN
    IF p_denominator = 0 THEN
        NULL;
    ELSE
        p_result := p_numerator / p_denominator;
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE return_into (
    p_empno         IN  emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN  emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN  emp1.comm%TYPE,
    v_empno         OUT emp1.empno%TYPE,
    v_ename         OUT emp1.ename%TYPE,
    v_job           OUT emp1.job%TYPE,
    v_sal           OUT emp1.sal%TYPE,
    v_comm          OUT emp1.comm%TYPE,
    v_deptno        OUT emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    v_msg           OUT VARCHAR2(60) )
IS
BEGIN
    UPDATE emp1 SET sal = p_sal, comm = p_comm WHERE empno = p_empno
    RETURNING
        empno,
        ename,
        job,
        sal,
        comm,
        deptno
    INTO
        v_empno,
        v_ename,
        v_job,
        v_sal,
        v_comm,
        v_deptno;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        v_msg := 'Updated Employee # : ' || v_empno;
    ELSE
        v_msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE return_into_from_delete (
    p_empno         IN    emp1.empno%TYPE, 
    r_emp           OUT   emp1%ROWTYPE,     msg             OUT   VARCHAR2(60) )
IS
BEGIN
    DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno
    RETURNING
        *
    INTO
        r_emp;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg := 'Deleted Employee # : ' || r_emp.empno;
    ELSE
        msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE select_into_query (
    p_empno         IN  emp1.empno%TYPE,
    r_emp           OUT emp1%ROWTYPE, 
    v_avgsal        OUT emp1.sal%TYPE, 
    v_msg           OUT VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    SELECT * INTO r_emp
        FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;

    SELECT AVG(sal) INTO v_avgsal
        FROM emp1 WHERE deptno = r_emp.deptno;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
        v_msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE select_into_exception_query (
    p_deptno        IN   emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    v_ename         OUT  emp1.ename%TYPE, 
    v_msg           OUT  VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    SELECT ename INTO v_ename FROM emp1 WHERE deptno = p_deptno ORDER BY ename;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN TOO_MANY_ROWS THEN
        v_msg := 'More than one employee found';
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_comp_update (
    p_empno         IN emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN emp1.comm%TYPE, 
    msg             OUT VARCHAR2(60) )
IS
BEGIN
    UPDATE emp1 SET sal = p_sal, comm = p_comm WHERE empno = p_empno;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg := 'Updated Employee # : ' || p_empno;
    ELSE
        msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE status_query(
    p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    v_count         OUT NUMBER(8),
    msg_found       OUT VARCHAR2(60),     msg_not_found   OUT VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    UPDATE emp1 SET  mgr = 300 WHERE deptno = p_deptno;
    v_count :=  SQL%ROWCOUNT; 
     IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg_found := '# rows updated: ' || SQL%ROWCOUNT; 
    END IF;    IF SQL%NOTFOUND THEN
        msg_not_found :='No rows were updated';
    END IF;END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select count(*) from emp1 where empno=2001
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select count(*) from emp1 where empno=2001

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE dept_salary_rpt (
  p_deptno         IN  NUMBER, 
  todays_date      OUT DATE, 
  rpt_title        OUT VARCHAR2(60),
  base_sal         OUT INTEGER, 
  base_comm_rate   OUT NUMBER,   base_annual      OUT NUMBER 
)
IS
BEGIN
    todays_date := SYSDATE;
    rpt_title := 'Report For Department # ' || p_deptno || ' on '
 || todays_date;
    base_sal := 35525;
    base_comm_rate := 1.33;
    base_annual := ROUND(base_sal * base_comm_rate, 2);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_delete (
   p_empno  IN  emp1.empno%TYPE, 
   msg      OUT VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg := 'Deleted Employee # : ' || p_empno;
    ELSE
        msg='Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE dept_salary_rpt (
  p_deptno         IN  NUMBER, 
  todays_date      OUT DATE, 
  rpt_title        OUT VARCHAR2(60),
  base_sal         OUT INTEGER, 
  base_comm_rate   OUT NUMBER,   base_annual      OUT NUMBER 
)
IS
BEGIN
    todays_date := SYSDATE;
    rpt_title := 'Report For Department # ' || p_deptno || ' on '
 || todays_date;
    base_sal := 35525;
    base_comm_rate := 1.33;
    base_annual := ROUND(base_sal * base_comm_rate, 2);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_delete (
   p_empno  IN  emp1.empno%TYPE, 
   msg      OUT VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg := 'Deleted Employee # : ' || p_empno;
    ELSE
        msg='Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_insert (
    p_empno         IN emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_ename         IN emp1.ename%TYPE,
    p_job           IN emp1.job%TYPE,
    p_mgr           IN emp1.mgr%TYPE,
    p_hiredate      IN emp1.hiredate%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN emp1.comm%TYPE,
    p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE
)
IS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO emp1 VALUES (
        p_empno,
        p_ename,
        p_job,
        p_mgr,
        p_hiredate,
        p_sal,
        p_comm,
        p_deptno);

EXCEPTION
    WHEN OTHERS THEN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('OTHERS exception on INSERT of employee # '
            || p_empno);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLCODE : ' || SQLCODE);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLERRM : ' || SQLERRM);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE divide_it (
    p_numerator     IN  NUMBER,
    p_denominator   IN  NUMBER,
    p_result        OUT NUMBER
)
IS
BEGIN
    IF p_denominator = 0 THEN
        NULL;
    ELSE
        p_result := p_numerator / p_denominator;
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE return_into (
    p_empno         IN  emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN  emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN  emp1.comm%TYPE,
    v_empno         OUT emp1.empno%TYPE,
    v_ename         OUT emp1.ename%TYPE,
    v_job           OUT emp1.job%TYPE,
    v_sal           OUT emp1.sal%TYPE,
    v_comm          OUT emp1.comm%TYPE,
    v_deptno        OUT emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    v_msg           OUT VARCHAR2(60) )
IS
BEGIN
    UPDATE emp1 SET sal = p_sal, comm = p_comm WHERE empno = p_empno
    RETURNING
        empno,
        ename,
        job,
        sal,
        comm,
        deptno
    INTO
        v_empno,
        v_ename,
        v_job,
        v_sal,
        v_comm,
        v_deptno;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        v_msg := 'Updated Employee # : ' || v_empno;
    ELSE
        v_msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE return_into_from_delete (
    p_empno         IN    emp1.empno%TYPE, 
    r_emp           OUT   emp1%ROWTYPE,     msg             OUT   VARCHAR2(60) )
IS
BEGIN
    DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno
    RETURNING
        *
    INTO
        r_emp;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg := 'Deleted Employee # : ' || r_emp.empno;
    ELSE
        msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE select_into_query (
    p_empno         IN  emp1.empno%TYPE,
    r_emp           OUT emp1%ROWTYPE, 
    v_avgsal        OUT emp1.sal%TYPE, 
    v_msg           OUT VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    SELECT * INTO r_emp
        FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;

    SELECT AVG(sal) INTO v_avgsal
        FROM emp1 WHERE deptno = r_emp.deptno;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
        v_msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE select_into_exception_query (
    p_deptno        IN   emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    v_ename         OUT  emp1.ename%TYPE, 
    v_msg           OUT  VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    SELECT ename INTO v_ename FROM emp1 WHERE deptno = p_deptno ORDER BY ename;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN TOO_MANY_ROWS THEN
        v_msg := 'More than one employee found';
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_comp_update (
    p_empno         IN emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN emp1.comm%TYPE, 
    msg             OUT VARCHAR2(60) )
IS
BEGIN
    UPDATE emp1 SET sal = p_sal, comm = p_comm WHERE empno = p_empno;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg := 'Updated Employee # : ' || p_empno;
    ELSE
        msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE status_query(
    p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    v_count         OUT NUMBER(8),
    msg_found       OUT VARCHAR2(60),     msg_not_found   OUT VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    UPDATE emp1 SET  mgr = 300 WHERE deptno = p_deptno;
    v_count :=  SQL%ROWCOUNT; 
     IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg_found := '# rows updated: ' || SQL%ROWCOUNT; 
    END IF;    IF SQL%NOTFOUND THEN
        msg_not_found :='No rows were updated';
    END IF;END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS dept_salary_rpt
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS emp_delete
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS emp_insert
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS divide_it
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS return_into
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS return_into_from_delete
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS select_into_query
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS select_into_exception_query
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS emp_comp_update
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS status_query
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS emp1 CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE emp1(empno NUMBER(8),  ename VARCHAR2(10),job VARCHAR2(9), mgr NUMBER(8), hiredate DATE, sal NUMBER(10,2), comm NUMBER(10,2), deptno NUMBER(4))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,mgr, hiredate, sal, comm,  deptno)  VALUES(1001,'SMITH','Sales',200,to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),120000,0,11)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,mgr, hiredate, sal, comm,  deptno)  VALUES(3001,'WARD','Sales',200,to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),100000,0,31)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,mgr, hiredate, sal, comm,  deptno)  VALUES(4001,'JONES','Sales',200,to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),120000,0,41)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,mgr, hiredate, sal, comm,  deptno)  VALUES(4002,'MARTIN','Sales',200,to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),100000,0,41)

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,mgr, hiredate, sal, comm,  deptno)  VALUES(5001,'BLAKE','Sales',200,to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),120000,0,51)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE dept_salary_rpt (
  p_deptno         IN  NUMBER, 
  todays_date      OUT DATE, 
  rpt_title        OUT VARCHAR2(60),
  base_sal         OUT INTEGER, 
  base_comm_rate   OUT NUMBER,   base_annual      OUT NUMBER 
)
IS
BEGIN
    todays_date := SYSDATE;
    rpt_title := 'Report For Department # ' || p_deptno || ' on '
 || todays_date;
    base_sal := 35525;
    base_comm_rate := 1.33;
    base_annual := ROUND(base_sal * base_comm_rate, 2);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_delete (
   p_empno  IN  emp1.empno%TYPE, 
   msg      OUT VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg := 'Deleted Employee # : ' || p_empno;
    ELSE
        msg='Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_insert (
    p_empno         IN emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_ename         IN emp1.ename%TYPE,
    p_job           IN emp1.job%TYPE,
    p_mgr           IN emp1.mgr%TYPE,
    p_hiredate      IN emp1.hiredate%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN emp1.comm%TYPE,
    p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE
)
IS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO emp1 VALUES (
        p_empno,
        p_ename,
        p_job,
        p_mgr,
        p_hiredate,
        p_sal,
        p_comm,
        p_deptno);

EXCEPTION
    WHEN OTHERS THEN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('OTHERS exception on INSERT of employee # '
            || p_empno);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLCODE : ' || SQLCODE);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLERRM : ' || SQLERRM);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE divide_it (
    p_numerator     IN  NUMBER,
    p_denominator   IN  NUMBER,
    p_result        OUT NUMBER
)
IS
BEGIN
    IF p_denominator = 0 THEN
        NULL;
    ELSE
        p_result := p_numerator / p_denominator;
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE return_into (
    p_empno         IN  emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN  emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN  emp1.comm%TYPE,
    v_empno         OUT emp1.empno%TYPE,
    v_ename         OUT emp1.ename%TYPE,
    v_job           OUT emp1.job%TYPE,
    v_sal           OUT emp1.sal%TYPE,
    v_comm          OUT emp1.comm%TYPE,
    v_deptno        OUT emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    v_msg           OUT VARCHAR2(60) )
IS
BEGIN
    UPDATE emp1 SET sal = p_sal, comm = p_comm WHERE empno = p_empno
    RETURNING
        empno,
        ename,
        job,
        sal,
        comm,
        deptno
    INTO
        v_empno,
        v_ename,
        v_job,
        v_sal,
        v_comm,
        v_deptno;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        v_msg := 'Updated Employee # : ' || v_empno;
    ELSE
        v_msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE return_into_from_delete (
    p_empno         IN    emp1.empno%TYPE, 
    r_emp           OUT   emp1%ROWTYPE,     msg             OUT   VARCHAR2(60) )
IS
BEGIN
    DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno
    RETURNING
        *
    INTO
        r_emp;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg := 'Deleted Employee # : ' || r_emp.empno;
    ELSE
        msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE select_into_query (
    p_empno         IN  emp1.empno%TYPE,
    r_emp           OUT emp1%ROWTYPE, 
    v_avgsal        OUT emp1.sal%TYPE, 
    v_msg           OUT VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    SELECT * INTO r_emp
        FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;

    SELECT AVG(sal) INTO v_avgsal
        FROM emp1 WHERE deptno = r_emp.deptno;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
        v_msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE select_into_exception_query (
    p_deptno        IN   emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    v_ename         OUT  emp1.ename%TYPE, 
    v_msg           OUT  VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    SELECT ename INTO v_ename FROM emp1 WHERE deptno = p_deptno ORDER BY ename;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN TOO_MANY_ROWS THEN
        v_msg := 'More than one employee found';
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_comp_update (
    p_empno         IN emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN emp1.comm%TYPE, 
    msg             OUT VARCHAR2(60) )
IS
BEGIN
    UPDATE emp1 SET sal = p_sal, comm = p_comm WHERE empno = p_empno;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg := 'Updated Employee # : ' || p_empno;
    ELSE
        msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE status_query(
    p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    v_count         OUT NUMBER(8),
    msg_found       OUT VARCHAR2(60),     msg_not_found   OUT VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    UPDATE emp1 SET  mgr = 300 WHERE deptno = p_deptno;
    v_count :=  SQL%ROWCOUNT; 
     IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg_found := '# rows updated: ' || SQL%ROWCOUNT; 
    END IF;    IF SQL%NOTFOUND THEN
        msg_not_found :='No rows were updated';
    END IF;END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select count(*) from emp1 where empno=3002
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS dept_salary_rpt
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS emp_delete
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS emp_insert
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS divide_it
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS return_into
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS return_into_from_delete
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS select_into_query
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS select_into_exception_query
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS emp_comp_update
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS status_query
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS emp1 CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE emp1(empno NUMBER(8),  ename VARCHAR2(10),job VARCHAR2(9), mgr NUMBER(8), hiredate DATE, sal NUMBER(10,2), comm NUMBER(10,2), deptno NUMBER(4))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE dept_salary_rpt (
  p_deptno         IN  NUMBER, 
  todays_date      OUT DATE, 
  rpt_title        OUT VARCHAR2(60),
  base_sal         OUT INTEGER, 
  base_comm_rate   OUT NUMBER,   base_annual      OUT NUMBER 
)
IS
BEGIN
    todays_date := SYSDATE;
    rpt_title := 'Report For Department # ' || p_deptno || ' on '
 || todays_date;
    base_sal := 35525;
    base_comm_rate := 1.33;
    base_annual := ROUND(base_sal * base_comm_rate, 2);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_delete (
   p_empno  IN  emp1.empno%TYPE, 
   msg      OUT VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg := 'Deleted Employee # : ' || p_empno;
    ELSE
        msg='Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_insert (
    p_empno         IN emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_ename         IN emp1.ename%TYPE,
    p_job           IN emp1.job%TYPE,
    p_mgr           IN emp1.mgr%TYPE,
    p_hiredate      IN emp1.hiredate%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN emp1.comm%TYPE,
    p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE
)
IS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO emp1 VALUES (
        p_empno,
        p_ename,
        p_job,
        p_mgr,
        p_hiredate,
        p_sal,
        p_comm,
        p_deptno);

EXCEPTION
    WHEN OTHERS THEN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('OTHERS exception on INSERT of employee # '
            || p_empno);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLCODE : ' || SQLCODE);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLERRM : ' || SQLERRM);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE divide_it (
    p_numerator     IN  NUMBER,
    p_denominator   IN  NUMBER,
    p_result        OUT NUMBER
)
IS
BEGIN
    IF p_denominator = 0 THEN
        NULL;
    ELSE
        p_result := p_numerator / p_denominator;
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE return_into (
    p_empno         IN  emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN  emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN  emp1.comm%TYPE,
    v_empno         OUT emp1.empno%TYPE,
    v_ename         OUT emp1.ename%TYPE,
    v_job           OUT emp1.job%TYPE,
    v_sal           OUT emp1.sal%TYPE,
    v_comm          OUT emp1.comm%TYPE,
    v_deptno        OUT emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    v_msg           OUT VARCHAR2(60) )
IS
BEGIN
    UPDATE emp1 SET sal = p_sal, comm = p_comm WHERE empno = p_empno
    RETURNING
        empno,
        ename,
        job,
        sal,
        comm,
        deptno
    INTO
        v_empno,
        v_ename,
        v_job,
        v_sal,
        v_comm,
        v_deptno;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        v_msg := 'Updated Employee # : ' || v_empno;
    ELSE
        v_msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE return_into_from_delete (
    p_empno         IN    emp1.empno%TYPE, 
    r_emp           OUT   emp1%ROWTYPE,     msg             OUT   VARCHAR2(60) )
IS
BEGIN
    DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno
    RETURNING
        *
    INTO
        r_emp;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg := 'Deleted Employee # : ' || r_emp.empno;
    ELSE
        msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE select_into_query (
    p_empno         IN  emp1.empno%TYPE,
    r_emp           OUT emp1%ROWTYPE, 
    v_avgsal        OUT emp1.sal%TYPE, 
    v_msg           OUT VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    SELECT * INTO r_emp
        FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;

    SELECT AVG(sal) INTO v_avgsal
        FROM emp1 WHERE deptno = r_emp.deptno;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
        v_msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE select_into_exception_query (
    p_deptno        IN   emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    v_ename         OUT  emp1.ename%TYPE, 
    v_msg           OUT  VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    SELECT ename INTO v_ename FROM emp1 WHERE deptno = p_deptno ORDER BY ename;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN TOO_MANY_ROWS THEN
        v_msg := 'More than one employee found';
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_comp_update (
    p_empno         IN emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN emp1.comm%TYPE, 
    msg             OUT VARCHAR2(60) )
IS
BEGIN
    UPDATE emp1 SET sal = p_sal, comm = p_comm WHERE empno = p_empno;

    IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg := 'Updated Employee # : ' || p_empno;
    ELSE
        msg := 'Employee # ' || p_empno || ' not found';
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE status_query(
    p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    v_count         OUT NUMBER(8),
    msg_found       OUT VARCHAR2(60),     msg_not_found   OUT VARCHAR2(60))
IS
BEGIN
    UPDATE emp1 SET  mgr = 300 WHERE deptno = p_deptno;
    v_count :=  SQL%ROWCOUNT; 
     IF SQL%FOUND THEN
        msg_found := '# rows updated: ' || SQL%ROWCOUNT; 
    END IF;    IF SQL%NOTFOUND THEN
        msg_not_found :='No rows were updated';
    END IF;END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select count(*) from emp1 where empno=3001
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
SELECT sal, comm FROM emp1 where  empno = 3001

        empno,

        deptno

        v_sal,

CREATE TABLE clerkemp AS SELECT * FROM emp1 WHERE job = 'CLERK';
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE FetchBulkCollect_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE FetchBulkCollect_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE emp_tbl IS TABLE OF emp1%ROWTYPE INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    t_emp           EMP_TBL;
    CURSOR emp_cur IS SELECT * FROM emp1;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_cur;
    FETCH emp_cur BULK COLLECT INTO t_emp;
    CLOSE emp_cur;
    FOR i IN 1..t_emp.COUNT LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(t_emp(i).empno || '   ' ||
            RPAD(t_emp(i).ename,8) || ' ' ||
            RPAD(t_emp(i).job,10) || ' ' ||
            TO_CHAR(t_emp(i).hiredate,'DD-MON-YY') || ' ' ||
            TO_CHAR(t_emp(i).sal,'99,999.99') || ' ' ||
            TO_CHAR(NVL(t_emp(i).comm,0),'99,999.99') || '  ' ||
            t_emp(i).deptno);
    END LOOP;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE ReturningBulkCollectDeleteRows_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE ReturningBulkCollectDeleteRows_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE emp_rec IS RECORD (
        empno       emp1.empno%TYPE,
        ename       emp1.ename%TYPE,
        job         emp1.job%TYPE,
        hiredate    emp1.hiredate%TYPE,
        sal         emp1.sal%TYPE,
        comm        emp1.comm%TYPE,
        deptno      emp1.deptno%TYPE
    );
    TYPE emp_tbl IS TABLE OF emp_rec INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    r_emp           EMP_TBL;
BEGIN
    UPDATE clerkemp SET sal = sal * 1.5;    DELETE FROM clerkemp RETURNING empno, ename, job, hiredate, sal,
        comm, deptno BULK COLLECT INTO r_emp;
    FOR i IN 1..r_emp.COUNT LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(r_emp(i).empno || '   ' ||
            RPAD(r_emp(i).ename,8) || ' ' ||
            RPAD(r_emp(i).job,10) || ' ' ||
            TO_CHAR(r_emp(i).hiredate,'DD-MON-YY') || ' ' ||
            TO_CHAR(r_emp(i).sal,'99,999.99') || ' ' ||
            TO_CHAR(NVL(r_emp(i).comm,0),'99,999.99') || '  ' ||
            r_emp(i).deptno);
    END LOOP;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE ReturningBulkCollectIncreasingSalary_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE ReturningBulkCollectIncreasingSalary_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE empno_tbl IS TABLE OF emp1.empno%TYPE INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    TYPE ename_tbl IS TABLE OF emp1.ename%TYPE INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    TYPE sal_tbl   IS TABLE OF emp1.sal%TYPE   INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    t_empno         EMPNO_TBL;
    t_ename         ENAME_TBL;
    t_sal           SAL_TBL;
BEGIN
    UPDATE clerkemp SET sal = sal * 1.5 RETURNING empno, ename, sal
        BULK COLLECT INTO t_empno, t_ename, t_sal;
    FOR i IN 1..t_empno.COUNT LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(t_empno(i) || '   ' || RPAD(t_ename(i),8) ||
            ' ' || TO_CHAR(t_sal(i),'99,999.99'));
    END LOOP;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE ReturningBulkCollectRecordType_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE ReturningBulkCollectRecordType_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE emp_rec IS RECORD (
        empno       emp1.empno%TYPE,
        ename       emp1.ename%TYPE,
        sal         emp1.sal%TYPE
    );
    TYPE emp_tbl IS TABLE OF emp_rec INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    t_emp           EMP_TBL;
BEGIN
    UPDATE clerkemp SET sal = sal * 1.5 RETURNING empno, ename, sal
        BULK COLLECT INTO t_emp;
    FOR i IN 1..t_emp.COUNT LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(t_emp(i).empno || '   ' ||
            RPAD(t_emp(i).ename,8) || ' ' ||
            TO_CHAR(t_emp(i).sal,'99,999.99'));
    END LOOP;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE SelectBulkCollectRowtype_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE SelectBulkCollectRowtype_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE emp_tbl IS TABLE OF emp1%ROWTYPE INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    t_emp           EMP_TBL;
BEGIN
    SELECT * BULK COLLECT INTO t_emp FROM emp1;
    FOR i IN 1..t_emp.COUNT LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(t_emp(i).empno || '   ' ||
            RPAD(t_emp(i).ename,8) || ' ' ||
            RPAD(t_emp(i).job,10) || ' ' ||
            TO_CHAR(t_emp(i).hiredate,'DD-MON-YY') || ' ' ||
            TO_CHAR(t_emp(i).sal,'99,999.99') || ' ' ||
            TO_CHAR(NVL(t_emp(i).comm,0),'99,999.99') || '  ' ||
            t_emp(i).deptno);
    END LOOP;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE SelectBulkCollectSigleField_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE SelectBulkCollectSigleField_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE empno_tbl    IS TABLE OF emp1.empno%TYPE    INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    TYPE ename_tbl    IS TABLE OF emp1.ename%TYPE    INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    TYPE job_tbl      IS TABLE OF emp1.job%TYPE      INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    TYPE hiredate_tbl IS TABLE OF emp1.hiredate%TYPE INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    TYPE sal_tbl      IS TABLE OF emp1.sal%TYPE      INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    TYPE comm_tbl     IS TABLE OF emp1.comm%TYPE     INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    TYPE deptno_tbl   IS TABLE OF emp1.deptno%TYPE   INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    t_empno           EMPNO_TBL;
    t_ename           ENAME_TBL;
    t_job             JOB_TBL;
    t_hiredate        HIREDATE_TBL;
    t_sal             SAL_TBL;
    t_comm            COMM_TBL;
    t_deptno          DEPTNO_TBL;
BEGIN
    SELECT empno, ename, job, hiredate, sal, comm, deptno BULK COLLECT
       INTO t_empno, t_ename, t_job, t_hiredate, t_sal, t_comm, t_deptno
       FROM emp1;
    FOR i IN 1..t_empno.COUNT LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(t_empno(i) || '   ' ||
            RPAD(t_ename(i),8) || ' ' ||
            RPAD(t_job(i),10) || ' ' ||
            TO_CHAR(t_hiredate(i),'DD-MON-YY') || ' ' ||
            TO_CHAR(t_sal(i),'99,999.99') || ' ' ||
            TO_CHAR(NVL(t_comm(i),0),'99,999.99') || '  ' ||
            t_deptno(i));
    END LOOP;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE Delete_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE Delete_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE empno_tbl  IS TABLE OF emp1.empno%TYPE INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    t_empno         EMPNO_TBL;
BEGIN
    t_empno(1)  := 9001;
    t_empno(2)  := 9002;
    t_empno(3)  := 9003;
    FORALL i IN t_empno.FIRST..t_empno.LAST
        DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = t_empno(i);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select count(*) from emp1

INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,sal,deptno) VALUES(9003,'WARD','SALESMAN',1250,30)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,sal,deptno) VALUES(9004,'JONES','SOFTWARE ENGINEER',2975,20)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,sal,deptno) VALUES(9005,'MARTIN','SALESMAN',1250,30)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE emp_copy(LIKE emp1);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE EmpCopy_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE EmpCopy_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE emp_tbl IS TABLE OF emp1%ROWTYPE INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    t_emp emp_tbl;
BEGIN
    SELECT * FROM emp1 BULK COLLECT INTO t_emp;
    FORALL i IN t_emp.FIRST .. t_emp.LAST
     INSERT INTO emp_copy VALUES t_emp(i);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select count(*) from emp1
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS emp1 CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS emp_copy CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE emp1(empno NUMBER(4),  ename VARCHAR2(20), job VARCHAR2(20), sal NUMBER(10,2), deptno NUMBER(4))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,sal,deptno) VALUES(9004,'JONES','SOFTWARE ENGINEER',2975,20)

CREATE TABLE emp_copy(LIKE emp1);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE Update_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE Update_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE empno_tbl  IS TABLE OF emp1.empno%TYPE INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    TYPE sal_tbl    IS TABLE OF emp1.ename%TYPE INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    t_empno         EMPNO_TBL;
    t_sal           SAL_TBL;
BEGIN
    t_empno(1)  := 9001;
    t_sal(1)    := 3350.00;
    t_empno(2)  := 9002;
    t_sal(2)    := 2000.00;
    t_empno(3)  := 9003;
    t_sal(3)    := 4100.00;
    FORALL i IN t_empno.FIRST..t_empno.LAST
        UPDATE emp1 SET sal = t_sal(i) WHERE empno = t_empno(i);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select sal from emp1 where empno=9001
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select sal from emp1 where empno=9002
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select sal from emp1 where empno=9003

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION collection_count()
   RETURN INT 
IS 
DECLARE
    TYPE sparse_arr_typ IS TABLE OF NUMBER INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    sparse_arr      sparse_arr_typ;
BEGIN
    sparse_arr(-100)  := -100;
    sparse_arr(-10)   := -10;
    sparse_arr(0)     := 0;
    sparse_arr(10)    := 10;
    sparse_arr(100)   := 100;
    return  sparse_arr.COUNT;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE collection_exists(
 exists10 OUT Boolean, 
 exists20 OUT Boolean 
)
IS
DECLARE
    TYPE sparse_arr_typ IS TABLE OF NUMBER INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    sparse_arr      sparse_arr_typ;
BEGIN
    sparse_arr(-100)  := -100;
    sparse_arr(-10)   := -10;
    sparse_arr(0)     := 0;
    sparse_arr(10)    := 10;
    sparse_arr(100)   := 100;
    exists10 := sparse_arr.exists(10);     exists20 := sparse_arr.exists(20); END;

 v_limit OUT Int, 
 v_count OUT Int 
)
IS
DECLARE
    TYPE dname_varray_typ IS VARRAY(4) OF VARCHAR2(14);
    dname_varray    dname_varray_typ;
BEGIN
    dname_varray := dname_varray_typ(NULL, NULL, NULL);
    v_limit := dname_varray.LIMIT;     v_count := dname_varray.COUNT; END;

DROP PROCEDURE Delete_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE Delete_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE sparse_arr_typ IS TABLE OF NUMBER INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    sparse_arr      sparse_arr_typ;
    v_results       VARCHAR2(50);
    v_sub           NUMBER;
BEGIN
    sparse_arr(-100)  := -100;
    sparse_arr(-10)   := -10;
    sparse_arr(0)     := 0;
    sparse_arr(10)    := 10;
    sparse_arr(100)   := 100;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('COUNT: ' || sparse_arr.COUNT);
    sparse_arr.DELETE(0);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('COUNT: ' || sparse_arr.COUNT);
    v_sub := sparse_arr.FIRST;
    WHILE v_sub IS NOT NULL LOOP
        IF sparse_arr(v_sub) IS NULL THEN
            v_results := v_results || 'NULL ';
        ELSE
            v_results := v_results || sparse_arr(v_sub) || ' ';
        END IF;
        v_sub := sparse_arr.NEXT(v_sub);
    END LOOP;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Results: ' || v_results);
 sparse_arr.DELETE(-10, 10);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('COUNT: ' || sparse_arr.COUNT);
 sparse_arr.DELETE;
      DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('COUNT: ' || sparse_arr.COUNT);
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE Extend_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE Extend_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE sparse_arr_typ IS TABLE OF NUMBER;
    sparse_arr      sparse_arr_typ := sparse_arr_typ(-100,-10,0,10,100);
    v_results       VARCHAR2(50);
BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('COUNT: ' || sparse_arr.COUNT);
    sparse_arr.EXTEND;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('COUNT: ' || sparse_arr.COUNT);
    FOR i IN sparse_arr.FIRST .. sparse_arr.LAST LOOP
        IF sparse_arr(i) IS NULL THEN
            v_results := v_results || 'NULL ';
        ELSE
            v_results := v_results || sparse_arr(i) || ' ';
        END IF;
    END LOOP;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Results: ' || v_results);
END;

    v_limit := dname_varray.LIMIT;     v_count := dname_varray.COUNT; END;

   RETURN INT 
IS 
DECLARE
    TYPE sparse_arr_typ IS TABLE OF NUMBER INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    sparse_arr      sparse_arr_typ;

    sparse_arr(-100)  := -100;
    sparse_arr(-10)   := -10;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE ExtendWithElement_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE ExtendWithElement_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE sparse_arr_typ IS TABLE OF NUMBER;
    sparse_arr      sparse_arr_typ := sparse_arr_typ(-100,-10,0,10,100);
    v_results       VARCHAR2(50);
BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('COUNT: ' || sparse_arr.COUNT);
    sparse_arr.EXTEND(3, 2);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('COUNT: ' || sparse_arr.COUNT);
    FOR i IN sparse_arr.FIRST .. sparse_arr.LAST LOOP
        IF sparse_arr(i) IS NULL THEN
            v_results := v_results || 'NULL ';
        ELSE
            v_results := v_results || sparse_arr(i) || ' ';
        END IF;
    END LOOP;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Results: ' || v_results);
END;

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE ExtendwithNumber_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE sparse_arr_typ IS TABLE OF NUMBER;
    sparse_arr      sparse_arr_typ := sparse_arr_typ(-100,-10,0,10,100);
    v_results       VARCHAR2(50);
BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('COUNT: ' || sparse_arr.COUNT);
    sparse_arr.EXTEND(3);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('COUNT: ' || sparse_arr.COUNT);
    FOR i IN sparse_arr.FIRST .. sparse_arr.LAST LOOP
        IF sparse_arr(i) IS NULL THEN
            v_results := v_results || 'NULL ';
        ELSE
            v_results := v_results || sparse_arr(i) || ' ';
        END IF;
    END LOOP;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Results: ' || v_results);
END;

    sparse_arr      sparse_arr_typ;
BEGIN
    sparse_arr(-100)  := -100;
    sparse_arr(-10)   := -10;
    sparse_arr(0)     := 0;
    sparse_arr(10)    := 10;
    sparse_arr(100)   := 100;
    return sparse_arr(sparse_arr.FIRST);
END;

   RETURN INT 
IS

    TYPE sparse_arr_typ IS TABLE OF NUMBER INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    sparse_arr      sparse_arr_typ;

 v_limit OUT Int, 
 v_count OUT Int 
)
IS

    TYPE dname_varray_typ IS VARRAY(4) OF VARCHAR2(14);
    dname_varray    dname_varray_typ;
BEGIN
    dname_varray := dname_varray_typ(NULL, NULL, NULL);
    v_limit := dname_varray.LIMIT;     v_count := dname_varray.COUNT; END;

DROP PROCEDURE Trim_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE Trim_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE sparse_arr_typ IS TABLE OF NUMBER;
    sparse_arr      sparse_arr_typ := sparse_arr_typ(-100,-10,0,10,100);
BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('COUNT: ' || sparse_arr.COUNT);
    sparse_arr.TRIM;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('COUNT: ' || sparse_arr.COUNT);
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE TrimWithNumber_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE TrimWithNumber_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE sparse_arr_typ IS TABLE OF NUMBER;
    sparse_arr      sparse_arr_typ := sparse_arr_typ(-100,-10,0,10,100);
    v_results       VARCHAR2(50);
BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('COUNT: ' || sparse_arr.COUNT);
    sparse_arr.TRIM(2);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('COUNT: ' || sparse_arr.COUNT);
    FOR i IN sparse_arr.FIRST .. sparse_arr.LAST LOOP
        IF sparse_arr(i) IS NULL THEN
            v_results := v_results || 'NULL ';
        ELSE
            v_results := v_results || sparse_arr(i) || ' ';
        END IF;
    END LOOP;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Results: ' || v_results);
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP Trigger hr_trigger;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE emp1 CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE emp1(EMPNO INT, ENAME TEXT, SAL INT, DEPTNO INT)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1 (EMPNO, ENAME, SAL, DEPTNO) VALUES(1111,'SMITH', 1600, 20);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
UPDATE emp1 SET SAL = 7500 where EMPNO = 1111;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER hr_trigger
  FOR INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON emp1
  REFERENCING NEW AS new OLD AS old
  WHEN (old.sal > 5000 OR new.sal < 8000)
    COMPOUND TRIGGER
  BEFORE STATEMENT IS
  BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Before Statement');
  END BEFORE STATEMENT;
  BEFORE EACH ROW IS
  BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Before Each Row: ' || :OLD.sal ||' ' || :NEW.sal);
  END BEFORE EACH ROW;
  AFTER EACH ROW IS
  BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('After Each Row: ' || :OLD.sal ||' ' || :NEW.sal);
  END AFTER EACH ROW;
  AFTER STATEMENT IS
  BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('After Statement');
  END AFTER STATEMENT;
END hr_trigger;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DELETE from emp1 where EMPNO = 1111;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP Trigger hr_trigger;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE emp1 CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE emp1(EMPNO INT, ENAME TEXT, SAL INT, DEPTNO INT)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

  AFTER STATEMENT IS
  BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('After Statement');
  END AFTER STATEMENT;
END hr_trigger;

CREATE TABLE emp1(EMPNO INT, ENAME TEXT, SAL INT, DEPTNO INT)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1 (EMPNO, ENAME, SAL, DEPTNO) VALUES(1111,'SMITH', 10000, 20);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER hr_trigger
  FOR INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON emp1
    COMPOUND TRIGGER
  -- Global declaration.
  var_sal NUMBER := 10000;
  BEFORE STATEMENT IS
  BEGIN
    var_sal := var_sal + 1000;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Before Statement: ' || var_sal);
  END BEFORE STATEMENT;
  BEFORE EACH ROW IS
  BEGIN
    var_sal := var_sal + 1000;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Before Each Row: ' || var_sal);
  END BEFORE EACH ROW;
  AFTER EACH ROW IS
  BEGIN
    var_sal := var_sal + 1000;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('After Each Row: ' || var_sal);
  END AFTER EACH ROW;
  AFTER STATEMENT IS
  BEGIN
    var_sal := var_sal + 1000;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('After Statement: ' || var_sal);
  END AFTER STATEMENT;
END hr_trigger;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE SearchedCaseExpr_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE SearchedCaseExpr_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_ename         emp1.ename%TYPE;
    v_deptno        emp1.deptno%TYPE;
    v_dname         VARCHAR2(20);
    CURSOR emp_cursor IS SELECT empno, ename, deptno FROM emp1 order by empno;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_cursor;
    LOOP
        FETCH emp_cursor INTO v_empno, v_ename, v_deptno;
        EXIT WHEN emp_cursor%NOTFOUND;
        v_dname :=
            CASE
                WHEN v_deptno = 10 THEN 'Accounting'
                WHEN v_deptno = 20 THEN 'Research'
                WHEN v_deptno = 30 THEN 'Sales'
                WHEN v_deptno = 40 THEN 'Operations'
                ELSE 'unknown'
            END;
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_empno || ' ' || RPAD(v_ename, 10) ||
            ' ' || v_deptno || ' ' || v_dname);
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE emp_cursor;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE SearchedCaseStmt_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE SearchedCaseStmt_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_ename         emp1.ename%TYPE;
    v_deptno        emp1.deptno%TYPE;
    v_dname         VARCHAR2(20);
    v_loc           VARCHAR2(20);
    CURSOR emp_cursor IS SELECT empno, ename, deptno FROM emp1 order by empno;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_cursor;
    LOOP
        FETCH emp_cursor INTO v_empno, v_ename, v_deptno;
        EXIT WHEN emp_cursor%NOTFOUND;
        CASE v_deptno
            WHEN 10 THEN v_dname := 'Accounting';
                         v_loc   := 'New York';
            WHEN 20 THEN v_dname := 'Research';
                         v_loc   := 'Dallas';
            WHEN 30 THEN v_dname := 'Sales';
                         v_loc   := 'Chicago';
            WHEN 40 THEN v_dname := 'Operations';
                         v_loc   := 'Boston';
            ELSE v_dname := 'unknown';
                         v_loc   := '';
        END CASE;
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_empno || ' ' || RPAD(v_ename, 10) ||
            ' ' || v_deptno || ' ' || RPAD(v_dname, 12) || ' ' ||
            v_loc);
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE emp_cursor;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE SelectorCaseExpr_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_ename         emp1.ename%TYPE;
    v_deptno        emp1.deptno%TYPE;
    v_dname         VARCHAR2(20);
    CURSOR emp_cursor IS SELECT empno, ename, deptno FROM emp1 order by empno;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_cursor;
    LOOP
        FETCH emp_cursor INTO v_empno, v_ename, v_deptno;
        EXIT WHEN emp_cursor%NOTFOUND;
        v_dname :=
            CASE v_deptno
                WHEN 10 THEN 'Accounting'
                WHEN 20 THEN 'Research'
                WHEN 30 THEN 'Sales'
                WHEN 40 THEN 'Operations'
                ELSE 'unknown'
            END;
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_empno || ' ' || RPAD(v_ename, 10) ||
            ' ' || v_deptno || ' ' || v_dname);
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE emp_cursor;
END;

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE SelectorCaseStmt_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_ename         emp1.ename%TYPE;
    v_deptno        emp1.deptno%TYPE;
    v_dname         VARCHAR2(20);
    v_loc           VARCHAR2(20);
    CURSOR emp_cursor IS SELECT empno, ename, deptno FROM emp1 order by empno;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_cursor;
    LOOP
        FETCH emp_cursor INTO v_empno, v_ename, v_deptno;
        EXIT WHEN emp_cursor%NOTFOUND;
        CASE
            WHEN v_deptno = 10 THEN v_dname := 'Accounting';
                                    v_loc   := 'New York';
            WHEN v_deptno = 20 THEN v_dname := 'Research';
                                    v_loc   := 'Dallas';
            WHEN v_deptno = 30 THEN v_dname := 'Sales';
                                    v_loc   := 'Chicago';
            WHEN v_deptno = 40 THEN v_dname := 'Operations';
                                    v_loc   := 'Boston';
            ELSE v_dname := 'unknown';
                                    v_loc   := '';
        END CASE;
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_empno || ' ' || RPAD(v_ename, 10) ||
            ' ' || v_deptno || ' ' || RPAD(v_dname, 12) || ' ' ||
            v_loc);
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE emp_cursor;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IfThenElseIfStatement_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE IfThenElseIfStatement_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_sal           emp1.sal%TYPE;
    v_comm          emp1.comm%TYPE;
    v_avg           NUMBER(7,2);
    CURSOR emp_cursor IS SELECT empno, sal, comm FROM emp1;
BEGIN
--
--  Calculate the average yearly compensation in the company
--
    SELECT AVG((sal + NVL(comm,0)) * 24) INTO v_avg FROM emp1;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Average Yearly Compensation: ' ||
        TO_CHAR(v_avg,'$FM999,999.00'));
    OPEN emp_cursor;
    LOOP
        FETCH emp_cursor INTO v_empno, v_sal, v_comm;
        EXIT WHEN emp_cursor%NOTFOUND;
--
--  Test whether or not the employee gets a commission
--
        IF v_comm IS NOT NULL AND v_comm > 0 THEN
--
--  Test if the employee's compensation with commission exceeds the average
--
            IF (v_sal + v_comm) * 24 > v_avg THEN
                DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_empno || ' ' ||
                    TO_CHAR((v_sal + v_comm) * 24,'$FM999,999.00') || ' Exceeds Average');
            ELSE
                DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_empno || ' ' ||
                    TO_CHAR((v_sal + v_comm) * 24,'$FM999,999.00') || ' Below Average');
            END IF;
        ELSE
--
--  Test if the employee's compensation without commission exceeds the
-- average
--
            IF v_sal * 24 > v_avg THEN
                DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_empno || ' ' ||
                    TO_CHAR(v_sal * 24,'$FM999,999.00') || ' Exceeds Average');
            ELSE
                DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_empno || ' ' ||
                    TO_CHAR(v_sal * 24,'$FM999,999.00') || ' Below Average');
            END IF;
        END IF;
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE emp_cursor;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE IfThenElseStatement_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_comm          emp1.comm%TYPE;
    CURSOR emp_cursor IS SELECT empno, comm FROM emp1 order by empno;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_cursor;
    LOOP
        FETCH emp_cursor INTO v_empno, v_comm;
        EXIT WHEN emp_cursor%NOTFOUND;
--
--  Test whether or not the employee gets a commission
--
        IF v_comm IS NOT NULL AND v_comm > 0 THEN
            DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_empno || ' ' ||
            TO_CHAR(v_comm,'$FM99999.00'));
        ELSE
            DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_empno || ' ' || 'Non-commission');
        END IF;
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE emp_cursor;
END;

DROP PROCEDURE IfThenElsifElseStatement_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE IfThenElsifElseStatement_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_comp          NUMBER(8,2);
    v_lt_25K        SMALLINT := 0;
    v_25K_50K       SMALLINT := 0;
    v_50K_75K       SMALLINT := 0;
    v_75K_100K      SMALLINT := 0;
    v_ge_100K       SMALLINT := 0;
    CURSOR emp_cursor IS SELECT empno, (sal + NVL(comm,0)) * 24 FROM emp1;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_cursor;
    LOOP
        FETCH emp_cursor INTO v_empno, v_comp;
        EXIT WHEN emp_cursor%NOTFOUND;
        IF v_comp < 25000 THEN
            v_lt_25K := v_lt_25K + 1;
        ELSIF v_comp < 50000 THEN
            v_25K_50K := v_25K_50K + 1;
        ELSIF v_comp < 75000 THEN
            v_50K_75K := v_50K_75K + 1;
        ELSIF v_comp < 100000 THEN
            v_75K_100K := v_75K_100K + 1;
        ELSE
            v_ge_100K := v_ge_100K + 1;
        END IF;
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE emp_cursor;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Less than 25,000 : ' || v_lt_25K);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('25,000 - 49,9999 : ' || v_25K_50K);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('50,000 - 74,9999 : ' || v_50K_75K);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('75,000 - 99,9999 : ' || v_75K_100K);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('100,000 and over : ' || v_ge_100K);
END;

DROP PROCEDURE IfThenStatement_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE IfThenStatement_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_comm          emp1.comm%TYPE;
    CURSOR emp_cursor IS SELECT empno, comm FROM emp1 order by empno;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_cursor;
    LOOP
        FETCH emp_cursor INTO v_empno, v_comm;
        EXIT WHEN emp_cursor%NOTFOUND;
        IF v_comm IS NOT NULL AND v_comm > 0 THEN
            DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_empno || ' ' ||
            TO_CHAR(v_comm,'$FM99999.00'));
        END IF;
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE emp_cursor;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE ContinueTest_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE ContinueTest_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    v_counter       NUMBER(2);
BEGIN
    v_counter := 0;
    LOOP
        v_counter := v_counter + 1;
        EXIT WHEN v_counter > 10;
        CONTINUE WHEN MOD(v_counter,2) = 1;
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Iteration # ' || v_counter);
    END LOOP;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE ExitTest_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE ExitTest_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    v_counter       NUMBER(2);
BEGIN
    v_counter := 1;
    LOOP
        EXIT WHEN v_counter > 10;
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Iteration # ' || v_counter);
        v_counter := v_counter + 1;
    END LOOP;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE ForTest_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE ForTest_SP()
 IS
BEGIN
    FOR i IN 1 .. 10 LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Iteration # ' || i);
    END LOOP;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE WhileTest_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE WhileTest_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    v_counter       NUMBER(2);
BEGIN
    v_counter := 1;
    WHILE v_counter <= 10 LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Iteration # ' || v_counter);
        v_counter := v_counter + 1;
    END LOOP;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE ar1 AS
  overdrawn EXCEPTION;
  PRAGMA EXCEPTION_INIT (overdrawn, -20100);  PROCEDURE check_balance(p_balance NUMBER, p_amount NUMBER);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY ar1 AS
  PROCEDURE check_balance(p_balance NUMBER, p_amount  NUMBER)
  IS
  BEGIN
      IF (p_amount > p_balance) THEN
        RAISE overdrawn;
      END IF;
   END;
 END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE purchase1(customerID int, amount NUMERIC)
AS
  BEGIN
     ar1.check_balance(getcustomerbalance1(customerid), amount);
       record_purchase1(customerid, amount);
  EXCEPTION
     WHEN ar1.overdrawn THEN
      DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE ('This account is overdrawn.');
      DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE ('SQLCode :'||SQLCODE||' '||SQLERRM );
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE function getcustomerbalance1(customerID INT) 
       RETURN NUMERIC
AS
    v_balance        NUMERIC ;
BEGIN
   SELECT balance INTO v_balance           FROM customer1 WHERE cust_id = customerId;
   return v_balance;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
      DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Customer # ' || customerId 
          || ' not found');
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE procedure record_purchase1(
   customerID INT, amount  NUMERIC)
AS 
BEGIN  
    update customer1 set balance = balance - amount,          stmt_amount = stmt_amount +amount 
         WHERE cust_id = customerId;
    IF SQL%NOTFOUND THEN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Customer # ' || customerId || 
           ' not found');
    END IF;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select stmt_amount from customer1 where cust_id=1001
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select balance from customer1 where cust_id=1001

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE verify_emp2
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE emp2 CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE emp2(empno NUMBER(8),  ename VARCHAR2(10),job VARCHAR2(9), mgr NUMBER(8), hiredate DATE, sal NUMBER(10,2))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp2(empno,ename,job,mgr, hiredate, sal) VALUES(7369,'SMITH','Sales',200,to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),800)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp2(empno,ename,job,mgr, hiredate, sal) VALUES(7499,null,'Sales',200,to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),1600)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp2(empno,ename,job,mgr, hiredate, sal) VALUES(7521,'WARD',null,200,to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),1250)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp2(empno,ename,job,mgr, hiredate, sal) VALUES(7566,'JONES','Sales',null,to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),2975)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp2(empno,ename,job,mgr, hiredate, sal) VALUES(7654,'MARTIN','Sales',200,null,1250)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE verify_emp2 (
    p_empno         NUMBER
)
IS
    v_ename         emp2.ename%TYPE;
    v_job           emp2.job%TYPE;
    v_mgr           emp2.mgr%TYPE;
    v_hiredate      emp2.hiredate%TYPE;
BEGIN
    SELECT ename, job, mgr, hiredate
        INTO v_ename, v_job, v_mgr, v_hiredate FROM emp2
        WHERE empno = p_empno;
    IF v_ename IS NULL THEN
        RAISE_APPLICATION_ERROR(-20010, 'No name for ' || p_empno);
    END IF;
    IF v_job IS NULL THEN
        RAISE_APPLICATION_ERROR(-20020, 'No job for ' || p_empno);
    END IF;
    IF v_mgr IS NULL THEN
        RAISE_APPLICATION_ERROR(-20030, 'No manager for ' || p_empno);
    END IF;
    IF v_hiredate IS NULL THEN
        RAISE_APPLICATION_ERROR(-20040, 'No hire date for ' || p_empno);
    END IF;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Employee ' || p_empno ||
        ' validated without errors');
EXCEPTION
    WHEN OTHERS THEN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLCODE: ' || SQLCODE);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLERRM: ' || SQLERRM);
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE emp1 CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE emp1(empno NUMBER(8),  ename VARCHAR2(10),job VARCHAR2(9), hiredate DATE, sal NUMBER(10,2))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,hiredate, sal) VALUES(1001,'SMITH','Sales',to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),120000) 
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename, job,hiredate, sal) VALUES(4001,null, 'Sales',to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),120000)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,hiredate, sal) VALUES(4002,'MARTIN',null,to_date('01-11-07','DD-MM-YY'),100000)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO emp1(empno,ename,job,hiredate, sal) VALUES(5001,'BLAKE','Sales',null,120000)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION emp_comp (
    p_sal           NUMBER,
    p_comm          NUMBER
) RETURN NUMBER
IS
BEGIN
    RETURN (p_sal + NVL(p_comm, 0)) * 24;
END emp_comp;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE verify_emp (
    p_empno    IN     NUMBER, 
    msg        OUT    VARCHAR2(60) 
)
IS
    v_ename         emp1.ename%TYPE;
    v_job           emp1.job%TYPE;
    v_hiredate      emp1.hiredate%TYPE;
BEGIN
    SELECT ename, job, hiredate
        INTO v_ename, v_job, v_hiredate FROM emp1
        WHERE empno = p_empno;
    IF v_ename IS NULL THEN
        GOTO invalid_emp;
    END IF;
    IF v_job IS NULL THEN
        GOTO invalid_emp;
    END IF;
    IF v_hiredate IS NULL THEN
        GOTO invalid_emp;
    END IF;
    msg := 'Employee ' || p_empno ||
        ' validated without errors.';
    RETURN;
    <<invalid_emp>> msg := 'Employee ' || p_empno ||
        ' is not a valid employee.';
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

DROP PROCEDURE purchase3

DROP TABLE customer3 CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE customer3(cust_id NUMBER(8), cust_name VARCHAR2(20), balance NUMBER(10,2), stmt_amount NUMBER(10,2))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
insert into customer3 (cust_id, cust_name, balance, stmt_amount)  values (1001, 'Mike', 20000,1000);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
insert into customer3 (cust_id, cust_name, balance, stmt_amount)  values (1002, 'Mike', 20000,1000);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE ar3 AS
  overdrawn EXCEPTION;
  PROCEDURE check_balance(p_balance NUMBER, p_amount NUMBER);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY ar3 AS
  PROCEDURE check_balance(p_balance NUMBER, p_amount  NUMBER)
  IS
  BEGIN
      IF (p_amount > p_balance) THEN
        RAISE overdrawn;
      END IF;
   END;
 END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE purchase3(customerID INT, amount NUMERIC)
AS
  BEGIN
     ar3.check_balance(getcustomerbalance3(customerid), amount);
       record_purchase3(customerid, amount);
  EXCEPTION
     WHEN ar3.overdrawn THEN
       raise_credit_limit3(customerid, amount*1.5);
  END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE function getcustomerbalance3(customerID INT) 
       RETURN NUMERIC
AS
    v_balance        NUMERIC ;
BEGIN
   SELECT balance INTO v_balance           FROM customer3 WHERE cust_id = customerId;
   return v_balance;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
      DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Customer # ' || customerId 
          || ' not found');
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE procedure raise_credit_limit3( 
   customerID INT, amount NUMERIC)
AS
BEGIN
      update customer3 set balance = amount 
   WHERE cust_id = customerId; 
EXCEPTION
   WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
      DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Customer # ' || customerId 
       || ' not found');
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE procedure record_purchase3 (
   customerID INT, amount  NUMERIC)
AS 
BEGIN  
    update customer3 set balance = balance - amount,          stmt_amount = stmt_amount +amount 
         WHERE cust_id = customerId;
    IF SQL%NOTFOUND THEN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Customer # ' || customerId || 
           ' not found');
    END IF;
END;

  PROCEDURE check_balance(p_balance NUMBER, p_amount NUMBER);
