### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY ar4 AS
  PROCEDURE check_balance(p_balance NUMBER, p_amount  NUMBER)
  IS
  BEGIN
      IF (p_amount > p_balance) THEN
        RAISE overdrawn;
      END IF;
   END;
 END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE purchase4(customerID INT, amount NUMERIC)
AS
  BEGIN
     ar4.check_balance(getcustomerbalance4(customerid), amount);
       record_purchase4(customerid, amount);
  EXCEPTION
     WHEN ar4.overdrawn THEN
       raise_credit_limit4(customerid, amount*1.5);
  END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE function getcustomerbalance4(customerID INT) 
       RETURN NUMERIC
AS
    v_balance        NUMERIC ;
BEGIN
   SELECT balance INTO v_balance           FROM customer4 WHERE cust_id = customerId;
   return v_balance;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
      DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Customer # ' || customerId 
          || ' not found');
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE procedure raise_credit_limit4( 
   customerID INT, amount NUMERIC)
AS
BEGIN
      update customer4 set balance = amount 
   WHERE cust_id = customerId; 
EXCEPTION
   WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
      DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Customer # ' || customerId 
       || ' not found');
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE procedure record_purchase4 (
   customerID INT, amount  NUMERIC)
AS 
BEGIN  
    update customer4 set balance = balance - amount,          stmt_amount = stmt_amount +amount 
         WHERE cust_id = customerId;
    IF SQL%NOTFOUND THEN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Customer # ' || customerId || 
           ' not found');
    END IF;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select stmt_amount from customer4 where cust_id=1002
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select balance from customer4 where cust_id=1002
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS job CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE job(jobno NUMBER(3), jname VARCHAR2(9))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO job VALUES (100, 'ANALYST')
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO job VALUES (200, 'CLERK')
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE IntoClauseDynamicSQL_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE IntoClauseDynamicSQL_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    v_sql           VARCHAR2(60);
    v_jobno         job.jobno%TYPE;
    v_jname         job.jname%TYPE;
    r_job           job%ROWTYPE;
BEGIN
    v_sql := 'SELECT jobno, jname FROM job WHERE jobno = :p_jobno';
    EXECUTE IMMEDIATE v_sql INTO v_jobno, v_jname USING 100;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_jobno || ' ' || v_jname);
    EXECUTE IMMEDIATE v_sql INTO v_jobno, v_jname USING 200;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_jobno || ' ' || v_jname);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS job CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE SimpleDynamicSQL_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    v_sql           VARCHAR2(50);
BEGIN
EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'CREATE TABLE job (jobno NUMBER(3),' ||
        ' jname VARCHAR2(9))';    v_sql := 'INSERT INTO job VALUES (100, ''ANALYST'')';
    EXECUTE IMMEDIATE v_sql;
    v_sql := 'INSERT INTO job VALUES (200, ''CLERK'')';
    EXECUTE IMMEDIATE v_sql;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select jobno from job order by jobno
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS job CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE job(jobno NUMBER(3), jname VARCHAR2(9))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE UsingClauseDynamicSQL_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE UsingClauseDynamicSQL_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    v_sql           VARCHAR2(50) := 'INSERT INTO job VALUES ' ||
                        '(:p_jobno, :p_jname)';
    v_jobno         job.jobno%TYPE;
    v_jname         job.jname%TYPE;
BEGIN
    v_jobno := 300;
    v_jname := 'MANAGER';
    EXECUTE IMMEDIATE v_sql USING v_jobno, v_jname;
    v_jobno := 400;
    v_jname := 'SALESMAN';
    EXECUTE IMMEDIATE v_sql USING v_jobno, v_jname;
    v_jobno := 500;
    v_jname := 'PRESIDENT';
    EXECUTE IMMEDIATE v_sql USING v_jobno, v_jname;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select jobno from job order by jobno

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE pkgDomainTypeTest Is
    TYPE type_tbl_type IS TABLE OF boolean;
    Procedure domainTestProc(type_tbl Out type_tbl_type);
End pkgDomainTypeTest; 
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY pkgDomainTypeTest IS
    Procedure domainTestProc(type_tbl Out type_tbl_type) IS
    BEGIN
        type_tbl := type_tbl_type(True,False,True);
    END domainTestProc;
END pkgDomainTypeTest;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

SELECT
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargnames IS NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill(''::name,ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_agg(pg_attribute.attname ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proargnames
END AS proargnames,
pg_proc.proargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proallargtypes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(string_to_array(pg_proc.proargtypes::text,' ')::oid[],array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proallargtypes
END AS proallargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargmodes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill('i'::"char",ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_fill('o'::"char",ARRAY[array_length(array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid), 1)]))
    ELSE COALESCE(pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.proargmodes) -- EnterpriseDB
END AS proargmodes
FROM pg_proc
LEFT JOIN pg_type ON pg_proc.prorettype = pg_type.oid
LEFT JOIN pg_attribute ON pg_type.typrelid = pg_attribute.attrelid AND pg_attribute.attnum >= 1 AND NOT pg_attribute.attisdropped
WHERE pg_proc.oid = :proname::regproc
GROUP BY pg_proc.proargnames, pg_proc.proargtypes, pg_proc.proallargtypes, pg_proc.proargmodes, pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.pronargs;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE BODY pkgDomainTypeTest;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE pkgDomainTypeTest;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE pkgDomainTypeTest Is
    TYPE type_tbl_type IS TABLE OF double precision;
    Procedure domainTestProc(type_tbl Out type_tbl_type);
End pkgDomainTypeTest; 
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY pkgDomainTypeTest IS
    Procedure domainTestProc(type_tbl Out type_tbl_type) IS
    BEGIN
        type_tbl := type_tbl_type(0,1.1,2.02,-1,-2.345);
    END domainTestProc;
END pkgDomainTypeTest;

    ELSE COALESCE(pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.proargmodes) -- EnterpriseDB
END AS proargmodes
FROM pg_proc
LEFT JOIN pg_type ON pg_proc.prorettype = pg_type.oid
LEFT JOIN pg_attribute ON pg_type.typrelid = pg_attribute.attrelid AND pg_attribute.attnum >= 1 AND NOT pg_attribute.attisdropped
WHERE pg_proc.oid = :proname::regproc
GROUP BY pg_proc.proargnames, pg_proc.proargtypes, pg_proc.proallargtypes, pg_proc.proargmodes, pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.pronargs;

SELECT
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargnames IS NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill(''::name,ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_agg(pg_attribute.attname ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proargnames
END AS proargnames,
pg_proc.proargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proallargtypes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(string_to_array(pg_proc.proargtypes::text,' ')::oid[],array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proallargtypes
END AS proallargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargmodes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill('i'::"char",ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_fill('o'::"char",ARRAY[array_length(array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid), 1)]))
    ELSE COALESCE(pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.proargmodes) -- EnterpriseDB
END AS proargmodes
FROM pg_proc
LEFT JOIN pg_type ON pg_proc.prorettype = pg_type.oid
LEFT JOIN pg_attribute ON pg_type.typrelid = pg_attribute.attrelid AND pg_attribute.attnum >= 1 AND NOT pg_attribute.attisdropped
WHERE pg_proc.oid = :proname::regproc
GROUP BY pg_proc.proargnames, pg_proc.proargtypes, pg_proc.proallargtypes, pg_proc.proargmodes, pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.pronargs;

	WHEN pg_proc.proargmodes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill('i'::"char",ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_fill('o'::"char",ARRAY[array_length(array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid), 1)]))
    ELSE COALESCE(pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.proargmodes) -- EnterpriseDB
END AS proargmodes
FROM pg_proc
LEFT JOIN pg_type ON pg_proc.prorettype = pg_type.oid
LEFT JOIN pg_attribute ON pg_type.typrelid = pg_attribute.attrelid AND pg_attribute.attnum >= 1 AND NOT pg_attribute.attisdropped
WHERE pg_proc.oid = :proname::regproc
GROUP BY pg_proc.proargnames, pg_proc.proargtypes, pg_proc.proallargtypes, pg_proc.proargmodes, pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.pronargs;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
 CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE pkgExtendTest Is 
   TYPE emp_rec_typ IS RECORD ( 
      empno  NUMBER(4), 
      ename       VARCHAR2(10) 
     );
   TYPE emp_tbl_typ IS TABLE OF emp_rec_typ; 
   Procedure nestedTableExtendTest(emp_tbl Out emp_tbl_typ);  End pkgExtendTest;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
 CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY pkgExtendTest 
 Is 
  Procedure nestedTableExtendTest(emp_tbl Out emp_tbl_typ) 
    Is 
   DECLARE 
      CURSOR emp_cur IS SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1 WHERE ROWNUM <= 10 order by empno; 
      i  INTEGER := 0; 
   BEGIN
    emp_tbl := emp_tbl_typ(); 
    FOR r_emp IN emp_cur LOOP 
        i := i + 1; 
        emp_tbl.EXTEND; 
        emp_tbl(i) := r_emp; 
    END LOOP; 
  End nestedTableExtendTest;  End pkgExtendTest;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE BODY pkgExtendTest;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE pkgExtendTest;

    test_num2 := 456;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
 CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE pkgExtendTest Is 
   TYPE emp_rec_typ IS RECORD ( 
      empno  NUMBER(4), 
      ename       VARCHAR2(10) 
     );
   TYPE emp_tbl_typ IS TABLE OF emp_rec_typ; 
   Procedure nestedTableExtendTest(emp_tbl Out emp_tbl_typ);  End pkgExtendTest;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY pkgExtendTest 
IS
Procedure nestedTableExtendTest(emp_tbl Out emp_tbl_typ) 
 Is
 DECLARE
    CURSOR emp_cur IS SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1 WHERE ROWNUM <= 10 order by empno;
    i  INTEGER := 0;
 BEGIN
  emp_tbl := emp_tbl_typ();
  FOR r_emp IN emp_cur LOOP
        FOR n IN 1..1000 LOOP
            i := i + 1;
            emp_tbl.EXTEND;
            emp_tbl(i) := r_emp;
        END LOOP;
  END LOOP;
End nestedTableExtendTest;
End pkgExtendTest;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE BODY pkgExtendTest;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE pkgExtendTest;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
 CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE pkgExtendTest Is 
   TYPE emp_rec_typ IS RECORD ( 
      empno  NUMBER(4), 
      ename       VARCHAR2(10) 
     );
   TYPE emp_tbl_typ IS TABLE OF emp_rec_typ; 
   Procedure nestedTableExtendTest(emp_tbl Out emp_tbl_typ);  End pkgExtendTest;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
 CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY pkgExtendTest 
 Is 
  Procedure nestedTableExtendTest(emp_tbl Out emp_tbl_typ) 
    Is 
   DECLARE 
      CURSOR emp_cur IS SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1 WHERE ROWNUM <= 10 order by empno; 
      i  INTEGER := 0; 
   BEGIN
    emp_tbl := emp_tbl_typ(); 
    FOR r_emp IN emp_cur LOOP 
        i := i + 1; 
        emp_tbl.EXTEND; 
        emp_tbl(i) := r_emp; 
    END LOOP; 
  End nestedTableExtendTest;  End pkgExtendTest;

      ename       VARCHAR2(10) 
     );
   TYPE emp_tbl_typ IS TABLE OF emp_rec_typ;

      CURSOR emp_cur IS SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1 WHERE ROWNUM <= 10 order by empno;

SELECT
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargnames IS NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill(''::name,ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_agg(pg_attribute.attname ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proargnames
END AS proargnames,
pg_proc.proargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proallargtypes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(string_to_array(pg_proc.proargtypes::text,' ')::oid[],array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proallargtypes
END AS proallargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargmodes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill('i'::"char",ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_fill('o'::"char",ARRAY[array_length(array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid), 1)]))
    ELSE COALESCE(pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.proargmodes) -- EnterpriseDB
END AS proargmodes
FROM pg_proc
LEFT JOIN pg_type ON pg_proc.prorettype = pg_type.oid
LEFT JOIN pg_attribute ON pg_type.typrelid = pg_attribute.attrelid AND pg_attribute.attnum >= 1 AND NOT pg_attribute.attisdropped
WHERE pg_proc.oid = :proname::regproc
GROUP BY pg_proc.proargnames, pg_proc.proargtypes, pg_proc.proallargtypes, pg_proc.proargmodes, pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.pronargs;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE pkgObjectTypeTest Is 
  TYPE dept_tbl_typ IS TABLE OF dept_obj_typ; 
  Procedure objectTypeNestedTableTest(dept_tbl Out dept_tbl_typ); 
End pkgObjectTypeTest;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY pkgObjectTypeTest 
  Is     Procedure objectTypeNestedTableTest(dept_tbl  Out dept_tbl_typ)      Is      DECLARE
       CURSOR dept_cur IS SELECT dname, loc FROM dept1 ORDER BY dname;
       i               INTEGER := 0;
    BEGIN
        dept_tbl := dept_tbl_typ( 
           dept_obj_typ(NULL,NULL), 
           dept_obj_typ(NULL,NULL), 
           dept_obj_typ(NULL,NULL), 
           dept_obj_typ(NULL,NULL) 
        ); 
        FOR r_dept IN dept_cur LOOP 
          i := i + 1; 
          dept_tbl(i).dname := r_dept.dname; 
          dept_tbl(i).loc   := r_dept.loc; 
       END LOOP;
   End objectTypeNestedTableTest; 
 End pkgObjectTypeTest;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE BODY pkgObjectTypeTest;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE pkgObjectTypeTest;

End pkgObjectTypeTestComposite;

       CURSOR dept_cur IS SELECT dname, loc FROM dept1 ORDER BY dname;
       i               INTEGER := 0;
    BEGIN
        dept_tbl := dept_tbl_typ_composite( 
           dept_obj_typ(NULL,NULL), 
           dept_obj_typ(NULL,NULL), 
           dept_obj_typ(NULL,NULL), 
           dept_obj_typ(NULL,NULL) 
        ); 
        FOR r_dept IN dept_cur LOOP 
          i := i + 1; 
          dept_tbl(i).dname := r_dept.dname; 
          dept_tbl(i).loc   := r_dept.loc; 
       END LOOP;
   End objectTypeNestedTableTestComposite; 
 End pkgObjectTypeTestComposite;

CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE pkgObjectTypeTestNestedCompositeJoint Is 
   TYPE emp_rec_typ IS RECORD ( 
      empno  NUMBER(4), 
      ename       VARCHAR2(10) 
     );
   TYPE dept_rec_typ IS RECORD ( 
      dname  VARCHAR2(14), 
      loc  VARCHAR2(13) 
     );
   TYPE joint_composite IS RECORD ( 
     emp   emp_rec_typ,
     loc     dept_rec_typ
     );
   TYPE comp_tbl_typ IS TABLE OF joint_composite; 
  Procedure objectTypeNestedTableTestCompositeJoint(comp_tbl Out comp_tbl_typ); 
End pkgObjectTypeTestNestedCompositeJoint;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY pkgObjectTypeTestNestedCompositeJoint 
  Is     Procedure objectTypeNestedTableTestCompositeJoint(comp_tbl Out comp_tbl_typ)      Is      DECLARE
       CURSOR total_cur IS SELECT dname, loc, empno, ename FROM dept1, emp1;
       i               INTEGER := 0;
    BEGIN
        comp_tbl := comp_tbl_typ(); 
        FOR r_total IN total_cur LOOP 
          i := i + 1; 
          comp_tbl.EXTEND;          comp_tbl(i).emp := emp_rec_typ(r_total.empno, r_total.ename); 
          comp_tbl(i).loc := dept_rec_typ(r_total.dname, r_total.loc); 
       END LOOP;
   End objectTypeNestedTableTestCompositeJoint; 
 End pkgObjectTypeTestNestedCompositeJoint;

FROM pg_proc
LEFT JOIN pg_type ON pg_proc.prorettype = pg_type.oid
LEFT JOIN pg_attribute ON pg_type.typrelid = pg_attribute.attrelid AND pg_attribute.attnum >= 1 AND NOT pg_attribute.attisdropped
WHERE pg_proc.oid = :proname::regproc
GROUP BY pg_proc.proargnames, pg_proc.proargtypes, pg_proc.proallargtypes, pg_proc.proargmodes, pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.pronargs;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE BODY pkgSimpleTestInt;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE pkgSimpleTestInt;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
 CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE pkgSimpleTestInt Is 
   TYPE dname_int_tbl_typ IS TABLE OF INT; 
   Procedure simpleNestedTableTestInt(dname_tbl Out dname_int_tbl_typ); 
 End pkgSimpleTestInt; 
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
 CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY pkgSimpleTestInt 
  Is 
  Procedure simpleNestedTableTestInt(dname_tbl Out dname_int_tbl_typ) 
    Is 
    DECLARE 
     CURSOR emp_cur IS SELECT empno FROM emp1 ORDER BY empno; 
     i INTEGER := 0; 
    BEGIN
      dname_tbl := dname_int_tbl_typ(NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL); 
      FOR r_emp IN emp_cur LOOP 
        i := i + 1; 
        dname_tbl(i) := r_emp.empno; 
      END LOOP; 
  End simpleNestedTableTestInt; 
 End pkgSimpleTestInt;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE BODY pkgSimpleTestInt;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE pkgSimpleTestInt;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE addr_obj_typ AS OBJECT
(
    street          VARCHAR2(30),
    city            VARCHAR2(20),
    state           CHAR(2),
    zip             NUMBER(5)
);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE emp_obj_typ AS OBJECT
(
    empno           NUMBER(4),
    ename           VARCHAR2(20),
    addr            ADDR_OBJ_TYP,
    MEMBER PROCEDURE display_emp01(SELF IN OUT emp_obj_typ),
    MEMBER PROCEDURE display_emp02(SELF IN OUT emp_obj_typ)
);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE BODY emp_obj_typ AS
    MEMBER PROCEDURE display_emp01 (SELF IN OUT emp_obj_typ)
    IS
    BEGIN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Employee No   : ' || empno);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Name          : ' || ename);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Street        : ' || addr.street);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('City/State/Zip: ' || addr.city || ', ' ||
            addr.state || ' ' || LPAD(addr.zip,5,'0'));
    END;
    MEMBER PROCEDURE display_emp02 (SELF IN OUT emp_obj_typ)
    IS
    BEGIN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Employee No   : ' || SELF.empno);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Name          : ' || SELF.ename);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Street        : ' || SELF.addr.street);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('City/State/Zip: ' || SELF.addr.city || ', ' ||
            SELF.addr.state || ' ' || LPAD(SELF.addr.zip,5,'0'));
    END;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE dept_obj_type AS OBJECT (
    deptno          NUMBER(2),
    STATIC FUNCTION get_dname(p_deptno IN NUMBER) RETURN VARCHAR2,
    MEMBER PROCEDURE display_dept
);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE BODY dept_obj_type AS
    STATIC FUNCTION get_dname(p_deptno IN NUMBER) RETURN VARCHAR2
    IS
        v_dname     VARCHAR2(14);
    BEGIN
        CASE p_deptno
            WHEN 10 THEN v_dname := 'ACCOUNTING';
            WHEN 20 THEN v_dname := 'RESEARCH';
            WHEN 30 THEN v_dname := 'SALES';
            WHEN 40 THEN v_dname := 'OPERATIONS';
            ELSE v_dname := 'UNKNOWN';
        END CASE;
        RETURN v_dname;
    END;

    MEMBER PROCEDURE display_dept
    IS
    BEGIN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Dept No    : ' || SELF.deptno);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Dept Name  : ' ||
            dept_obj_type.get_dname(SELF.deptno));
    END;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE citydata(post_code  VARCHAR2(10),  city VARCHAR2(40), state VARCHAR2(2))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
insert into citydata values ('01801','Woburn','MA')
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
insert into citydata values ('02203','Boston','MA')
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION postal_code_to_city(p_post_code VARCHAR2)
    RETURN VARCHAR2
IS
 v_city         citydata.city%TYPE;BEGIN
   SELECT city INTO v_city FROM citydata WHERE post_code = p_post_code; RETURN v_city;END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION postal_code_to_state(p_post_code VARCHAR2)
    RETURN VARCHAR2
IS
 v_state         citydata.state%TYPE;BEGIN
   SELECT state INTO v_state from citydata WHERE post_code = p_post_code; RETURN v_state;END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE address AS OBJECT
(
  street_address VARCHAR2(40),
  postal_code    VARCHAR2(10),
  city           VARCHAR2(40),
  state          VARCHAR2(2),

  CONSTRUCTOR FUNCTION address
   (
     street_address VARCHAR2,
     postal_code VARCHAR2
    ) RETURN self AS RESULT
)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE BODY address AS
 CONSTRUCTOR FUNCTION address
  (
    street_address VARCHAR2,
    postal_code VARCHAR2
   ) RETURN self AS RESULT
 IS
   BEGIN
     self.street_address := street_address;
     self.postal_code := postal_code;
     self.city := postal_code_to_city(postal_code);
     self.state := postal_code_to_state(postal_code);
     RETURN;
   END;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE ConstuctorMethod_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE ConstuctorMethod_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
  cust_addr address := address('100 Main Street', '02203');
BEGIN
  DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(cust_addr.city);
  DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(cust_addr.state);
END;

 IS

    v_dept          DEPT_OBJ_TYPE := dept_obj_type (20);
BEGIN
    v_dept.display_dept;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE ReferencingAnObject_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    v_emp          EMP_OBJ_TYP;
BEGIN
    v_emp := emp_obj_typ(9001,'JONES',
        addr_obj_typ('123 MAIN STREET','EDISON','NJ',08817));
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Employee No   : ' || v_emp.empno);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Name          : ' || v_emp.ename);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Street        : ' || v_emp.addr.street);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('City/State/Zip: ' || v_emp.addr.city || ', ' ||
        v_emp.addr.state || ' ' || LPAD(v_emp.addr.zip,5,'0'));
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE emp_obj_typ AS OBJECT
(
    empno           NUMBER(4),
    ename           VARCHAR2(20),
    addr            ADDR_OBJ_TYP,
    MEMBER PROCEDURE display_emp01(SELF IN OUT emp_obj_typ),
    MEMBER PROCEDURE display_emp02(SELF IN OUT emp_obj_typ)
);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE BODY emp_obj_typ AS
    MEMBER PROCEDURE display_emp01 (SELF IN OUT emp_obj_typ)
    IS
    BEGIN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Employee No   : ' || empno);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Name          : ' || ename);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Street        : ' || addr.street);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('City/State/Zip: ' || addr.city || ', ' ||
            addr.state || ' ' || LPAD(addr.zip,5,'0'));
    END;
    MEMBER PROCEDURE display_emp02 (SELF IN OUT emp_obj_typ)
    IS
    BEGIN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Employee No   : ' || SELF.empno);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Name          : ' || SELF.ename);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Street        : ' || SELF.addr.street);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('City/State/Zip: ' || SELF.addr.city || ', ' ||
            SELF.addr.state || ' ' || LPAD(SELF.addr.zip,5,'0'));
    END;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE dept_obj_type AS OBJECT (
    deptno          NUMBER(2),
    STATIC FUNCTION get_dname(p_deptno IN NUMBER) RETURN VARCHAR2,
    MEMBER PROCEDURE display_dept
);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE BODY dept_obj_type AS
    STATIC FUNCTION get_dname(p_deptno IN NUMBER) RETURN VARCHAR2
    IS
        v_dname     VARCHAR2(14);
    BEGIN
        CASE p_deptno
            WHEN 10 THEN v_dname := 'ACCOUNTING';
            WHEN 20 THEN v_dname := 'RESEARCH';
            WHEN 30 THEN v_dname := 'SALES';
            WHEN 40 THEN v_dname := 'OPERATIONS';
            ELSE v_dname := 'UNKNOWN';
        END CASE;
        RETURN v_dname;
    END;

    MEMBER PROCEDURE display_dept
    IS
    BEGIN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Dept No    : ' || SELF.deptno);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Dept Name  : ' ||
            dept_obj_type.get_dname(SELF.deptno));
    END;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION postal_code_to_city(p_post_code VARCHAR2)
    RETURN VARCHAR2
IS
 v_city         citydata.city%TYPE;BEGIN
   SELECT city INTO v_city FROM citydata WHERE post_code = p_post_code; RETURN v_city;END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION postal_code_to_state(p_post_code VARCHAR2)
    RETURN VARCHAR2
IS
 v_state         citydata.state%TYPE;BEGIN
   SELECT state INTO v_state from citydata WHERE post_code = p_post_code; RETURN v_state;END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE address AS OBJECT
(
  street_address VARCHAR2(40),
  postal_code    VARCHAR2(10),
  city           VARCHAR2(40),
  state          VARCHAR2(2),

  CONSTRUCTOR FUNCTION address
   (
     street_address VARCHAR2,
     postal_code VARCHAR2
    ) RETURN self AS RESULT
)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE BODY address AS
 CONSTRUCTOR FUNCTION address
  (
    street_address VARCHAR2,
    postal_code VARCHAR2
   ) RETURN self AS RESULT
 IS
   BEGIN
     self.street_address := street_address;
     self.postal_code := postal_code;
     self.city := postal_code_to_city(postal_code);
     self.state := postal_code_to_state(postal_code);
     RETURN;
   END;
END;

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE ReferencingAnObjectWithMemberMethod_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    v_emp          EMP_OBJ_TYP;
BEGIN
    v_emp := emp_obj_typ(9001,'JONES',
        addr_obj_typ('123 MAIN STREET','EDISON','NJ',08817));
    v_emp.display_emp01;
END;

     v_dept.display_dept();END;

CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE emp_admin
IS
   FUNCTION get_dept_name (
      p_deptno NUMBER DEFAULT 10
   )
   RETURN VARCHAR2;
   FUNCTION update_emp_sal (
      p_empno NUMBER,
      p_raise NUMBER
   )
   RETURN NUMBER;
   PROCEDURE hire_emp (
      p_empno           NUMBER,
      p_ename           VARCHAR2,
      p_job             VARCHAR2,
      p_sal             NUMBER,
      p_hiredate        DATE      DEFAULT   sysdate,
      p_comm            NUMBER    DEFAULT   0,
      p_mgr             NUMBER,
      p_deptno          NUMBER    DEFAULT   10
   );
   PROCEDURE fire_emp (
      p_empno NUMBER
   );
END emp_admin;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY emp_admin
IS
   --
   --  Function that queries the 'dept1' table based on the department
   --  number and returns the corresponding department name.
   --
   FUNCTION get_dept_name (
      p_deptno        IN NUMBER DEFAULT 10
   )
   RETURN VARCHAR2
   IS
      v_dname         VARCHAR2(14);
   BEGIN
      SELECT dname INTO v_dname FROM dept1 WHERE deptno = p_deptno;
      RETURN v_dname;
   EXCEPTION
      WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Invalid department number ' || p_deptno);
         RETURN '';
   END;
   --
   --  Function that updates an employee's salary based on the
   --  employee number and salary increment/decrement passed
   --  as IN parameters.  Upon successful completion the function
   --  returns the new updated salary.
   --
   FUNCTION update_emp_sal (
      p_empno         IN NUMBER,
      p_raise         IN NUMBER
   )
   RETURN NUMBER
   IS
      v_sal           NUMBER := 0;
   BEGIN
      SELECT sal INTO v_sal FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;
      v_sal := v_sal + p_raise;
      UPDATE emp1 SET sal = v_sal WHERE empno = p_empno;
      RETURN v_sal;
   EXCEPTION
      WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Employee ' || p_empno || ' not found');
         RETURN -1;
      WHEN OTHERS THEN
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('The following is SQLERRM:');
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(SQLERRM);
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('The following is SQLCODE:');
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(SQLCODE);
         RETURN -1;
   END;
   --
   --  Procedure that inserts a new employee record into the 'emp1' table.
   --
   PROCEDURE hire_emp (
      p_empno         NUMBER,
      p_ename         VARCHAR2,
      p_job           VARCHAR2,
      p_sal           NUMBER,
      p_hiredate      DATE    DEFAULT sysdate,
      p_comm          NUMBER  DEFAULT 0,
      p_mgr           NUMBER,
      p_deptno        NUMBER  DEFAULT 10
   )
   AS
   BEGIN
      INSERT INTO emp1(empno, ename, job, sal, hiredate, comm, mgr, deptno)
         VALUES(p_empno, p_ename, p_job, p_sal,
                p_hiredate, p_comm, p_mgr, p_deptno);
   END;
   --
   --  Procedure that deletes an employee record from the 'emp1' table based
   --  on the employee number.
   --
   PROCEDURE fire_emp (
      p_empno         NUMBER
   )
   AS
   BEGIN
      DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;
   END;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE emp_rpt
IS
    TYPE emprec_typ IS RECORD (
        empno       NUMBER(4),
        ename       VARCHAR(10)
    );
    TYPE emp_refcur IS REF CURSOR;

    FUNCTION get_dept_name (
        p_deptno    IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN VARCHAR2;
    FUNCTION open_emp_by_dept (
        p_deptno    IN emp1.deptno%TYPE
    ) RETURN EMP_REFCUR;
    PROCEDURE fetch_emp (
        p_refcur    IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    );
    PROCEDURE close_refcur (
        p_refcur    IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    );
END emp_rpt;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY emp_rpt
IS
    CURSOR dept_cur IS SELECT * FROM dept1;
    TYPE depttab_typ IS TABLE of dept1%ROWTYPE
        INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    t_dept          DEPTTAB_TYP;
    t_dept_max      INTEGER := 1;
    r_emp           EMPREC_TYP;

    FUNCTION get_dept_name (
        p_deptno    IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN VARCHAR2
    IS
    BEGIN
        FOR i IN 1..t_dept_max LOOP
            IF p_deptno = t_dept(i).deptno THEN
                RETURN t_dept(i).dname;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        RETURN 'Unknown';
    END;

    FUNCTION open_emp_by_dept(
        p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE
    ) RETURN EMP_REFCUR
    IS
        emp_by_dept EMP_REFCUR;
    BEGIN
        OPEN emp_by_dept FOR SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1
            WHERE deptno = p_deptno;
        RETURN emp_by_dept;
    END;

    PROCEDURE fetch_emp (
        p_refcur      IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    )
    IS
    BEGIN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('EMPNO ENAME');
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('----- -------');
        LOOP
            FETCH p_refcur INTO r_emp;
            EXIT WHEN p_refcur%NOTFOUND;
            DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(r_emp.empno || '  ' || r_emp.ename);
        END LOOP;
    END;

    PROCEDURE close_refcur (
        p_refcur      IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    )
    IS
    BEGIN
        CLOSE p_refcur;
    END;
BEGIN
    OPEN dept_cur;
    LOOP
        FETCH dept_cur INTO t_dept(t_dept_max);
        EXIT WHEN dept_cur%NOTFOUND;
        t_dept_max := t_dept_max + 1;
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE dept_cur;
    t_dept_max := t_dept_max - 1;
END emp_rpt;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE emp_admin
IS
   FUNCTION get_dept_name (
      p_deptno NUMBER DEFAULT 10
   )
   RETURN VARCHAR2;
   FUNCTION update_emp_sal (
      p_empno NUMBER,
      p_raise NUMBER
   )
   RETURN NUMBER;
   PROCEDURE hire_emp (
      p_empno           NUMBER,
      p_ename           VARCHAR2,
      p_job             VARCHAR2,
      p_sal             NUMBER,
      p_hiredate        DATE      DEFAULT   sysdate,
      p_comm            NUMBER    DEFAULT   0,
      p_mgr             NUMBER,
      p_deptno          NUMBER    DEFAULT   10
   );
   PROCEDURE fire_emp (
      p_empno NUMBER
   );
END emp_admin;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY emp_admin
IS
   --
   --  Function that queries the 'dept1' table based on the department
   --  number and returns the corresponding department name.
   --
   FUNCTION get_dept_name (
      p_deptno        IN NUMBER DEFAULT 10
   )
   RETURN VARCHAR2
   IS
      v_dname         VARCHAR2(14);
   BEGIN
      SELECT dname INTO v_dname FROM dept1 WHERE deptno = p_deptno;
      RETURN v_dname;
   EXCEPTION
      WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Invalid department number ' || p_deptno);
         RETURN '';
   END;
   --
   --  Function that updates an employee's salary based on the
   --  employee number and salary increment/decrement passed
   --  as IN parameters.  Upon successful completion the function
   --  returns the new updated salary.
   --
   FUNCTION update_emp_sal (
      p_empno         IN NUMBER,
      p_raise         IN NUMBER
   )
   RETURN NUMBER
   IS
      v_sal           NUMBER := 0;
   BEGIN
      SELECT sal INTO v_sal FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;
      v_sal := v_sal + p_raise;
      UPDATE emp1 SET sal = v_sal WHERE empno = p_empno;
      RETURN v_sal;
   EXCEPTION
      WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Employee ' || p_empno || ' not found');
         RETURN -1;
      WHEN OTHERS THEN
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('The following is SQLERRM:');
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(SQLERRM);
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('The following is SQLCODE:');
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(SQLCODE);
         RETURN -1;
   END;
   --
   --  Procedure that inserts a new employee record into the 'emp1' table.
   --
   PROCEDURE hire_emp (
      p_empno         NUMBER,
      p_ename         VARCHAR2,
      p_job           VARCHAR2,
      p_sal           NUMBER,
      p_hiredate      DATE    DEFAULT sysdate,
      p_comm          NUMBER  DEFAULT 0,
      p_mgr           NUMBER,
      p_deptno        NUMBER  DEFAULT 10
   )
   AS
   BEGIN
      INSERT INTO emp1(empno, ename, job, sal, hiredate, comm, mgr, deptno)
         VALUES(p_empno, p_ename, p_job, p_sal,
                p_hiredate, p_comm, p_mgr, p_deptno);
   END;
   --
   --  Procedure that deletes an employee record from the 'emp1' table based
   --  on the employee number.
   --
   PROCEDURE fire_emp (
      p_empno         NUMBER
   )
   AS
   BEGIN
      DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;
   END;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE emp_rpt
IS
    TYPE emprec_typ IS RECORD (
        empno       NUMBER(4),
        ename       VARCHAR(10)
    );
    TYPE emp_refcur IS REF CURSOR;

    FUNCTION get_dept_name (
        p_deptno    IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN VARCHAR2;
    FUNCTION open_emp_by_dept (
        p_deptno    IN emp1.deptno%TYPE
    ) RETURN EMP_REFCUR;
    PROCEDURE fetch_emp (
        p_refcur    IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    );
    PROCEDURE close_refcur (
        p_refcur    IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    );
END emp_rpt;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY emp_rpt
IS
    CURSOR dept_cur IS SELECT * FROM dept1;
    TYPE depttab_typ IS TABLE of dept1%ROWTYPE
        INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    t_dept          DEPTTAB_TYP;
    t_dept_max      INTEGER := 1;
    r_emp           EMPREC_TYP;

    FUNCTION get_dept_name (
        p_deptno    IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN VARCHAR2
    IS
    BEGIN
        FOR i IN 1..t_dept_max LOOP
            IF p_deptno = t_dept(i).deptno THEN
                RETURN t_dept(i).dname;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        RETURN 'Unknown';
    END;

    FUNCTION open_emp_by_dept(
        p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE
    ) RETURN EMP_REFCUR
    IS
        emp_by_dept EMP_REFCUR;
    BEGIN
        OPEN emp_by_dept FOR SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1
            WHERE deptno = p_deptno;
        RETURN emp_by_dept;
    END;

    PROCEDURE fetch_emp (
        p_refcur      IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    )
    IS
    BEGIN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('EMPNO ENAME');
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('----- -------');
        LOOP
            FETCH p_refcur INTO r_emp;
            EXIT WHEN p_refcur%NOTFOUND;
            DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(r_emp.empno || '  ' || r_emp.ename);
        END LOOP;
    END;

    PROCEDURE close_refcur (
        p_refcur      IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    )
    IS
    BEGIN
        CLOSE p_refcur;
    END;
BEGIN
    OPEN dept_cur;
    LOOP
        FETCH dept_cur INTO t_dept(t_dept_max);
        EXIT WHEN dept_cur%NOTFOUND;
        t_dept_max := t_dept_max + 1;
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE dept_cur;
    t_dept_max := t_dept_max - 1;
END emp_rpt;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE emp1
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE BODY emp_admin;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE emp_admin;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE BODY emp_rpt;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PACKAGE emp_rpt;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE emp1 CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE dept1 CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE emp1(empno NUMBER(4),  ename VARCHAR2(20), job VARCHAR2(20), hiredate DATE, sal NUMBER(10,2), comm NUMBER(10,2), mgr NUMBER(4), deptno NUMBER(4))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE dept1(deptno NUMBER(4), dname VARCHAR2(14), loc VARCHAR2(20))

CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE emp_admin
IS
   FUNCTION get_dept_name (
      p_deptno NUMBER DEFAULT 10
   )
   RETURN VARCHAR2;
   FUNCTION update_emp_sal (
      p_empno NUMBER,
      p_raise NUMBER
   )
   RETURN NUMBER;
   PROCEDURE hire_emp (
      p_empno           NUMBER,
      p_ename           VARCHAR2,
      p_job             VARCHAR2,
      p_sal             NUMBER,
      p_hiredate        DATE      DEFAULT   sysdate,
      p_comm            NUMBER    DEFAULT   0,
      p_mgr             NUMBER,
      p_deptno          NUMBER    DEFAULT   10
   );
   PROCEDURE fire_emp (
      p_empno NUMBER
   );
END emp_admin;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY emp_admin
IS
   --
   --  Function that queries the 'dept1' table based on the department
   --  number and returns the corresponding department name.
   --
   FUNCTION get_dept_name (
      p_deptno        IN NUMBER DEFAULT 10
   )
   RETURN VARCHAR2
   IS
      v_dname         VARCHAR2(14);
   BEGIN
      SELECT dname INTO v_dname FROM dept1 WHERE deptno = p_deptno;
      RETURN v_dname;
   EXCEPTION
      WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Invalid department number ' || p_deptno);
         RETURN '';
   END;
   --
   --  Function that updates an employee's salary based on the
   --  employee number and salary increment/decrement passed
   --  as IN parameters.  Upon successful completion the function
   --  returns the new updated salary.
   --
   FUNCTION update_emp_sal (
      p_empno         IN NUMBER,
      p_raise         IN NUMBER
   )
   RETURN NUMBER
   IS
      v_sal           NUMBER := 0;
   BEGIN
      SELECT sal INTO v_sal FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;
      v_sal := v_sal + p_raise;
      UPDATE emp1 SET sal = v_sal WHERE empno = p_empno;
      RETURN v_sal;
   EXCEPTION
      WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Employee ' || p_empno || ' not found');
         RETURN -1;
      WHEN OTHERS THEN
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('The following is SQLERRM:');
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(SQLERRM);
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('The following is SQLCODE:');
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(SQLCODE);
         RETURN -1;
   END;
   --
   --  Procedure that inserts a new employee record into the 'emp1' table.
   --
   PROCEDURE hire_emp (
      p_empno         NUMBER,
      p_ename         VARCHAR2,
      p_job           VARCHAR2,
      p_sal           NUMBER,
      p_hiredate      DATE    DEFAULT sysdate,
      p_comm          NUMBER  DEFAULT 0,
      p_mgr           NUMBER,
      p_deptno        NUMBER  DEFAULT 10
   )
   AS
   BEGIN
      INSERT INTO emp1(empno, ename, job, sal, hiredate, comm, mgr, deptno)
         VALUES(p_empno, p_ename, p_job, p_sal,
                p_hiredate, p_comm, p_mgr, p_deptno);
   END;
   --
   --  Procedure that deletes an employee record from the 'emp1' table based
   --  on the employee number.
   --
   PROCEDURE fire_emp (
      p_empno         NUMBER
   )
   AS
   BEGIN
      DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;
   END;
END;

CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY emp_rpt
IS

        p_deptno    IN NUMBER

    IS

            IF p_deptno = t_dept(i).deptno THEN
                RETURN t_dept(i).dname;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        RETURN 'Unknown';
    END;

        p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE
    ) RETURN EMP_REFCUR
    IS
        emp_by_dept EMP_REFCUR;
    BEGIN

            WHERE deptno = p_deptno;
        RETURN emp_by_dept;
    END;

    PROCEDURE fetch_emp (
        p_refcur      IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    )
    IS
    BEGIN

        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('----- -------');

            FETCH p_refcur INTO r_emp;

        END LOOP;
    END;

    PROCEDURE close_refcur (
        p_refcur      IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    )
    IS
    BEGIN
        CLOSE p_refcur;
    END;
BEGIN
    OPEN dept_cur;
    LOOP
        FETCH dept_cur INTO t_dept(t_dept_max);
        EXIT WHEN dept_cur%NOTFOUND;
        t_dept_max := t_dept_max + 1;
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE dept_cur;
    t_dept_max := t_dept_max - 1;
END emp_rpt;

                    sal, comm, mgr, deptno  FROM emp1 WHERE empno =2009;

         RETURN -1;
      WHEN OTHERS THEN
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('The following is SQLERRM:');
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(SQLERRM);
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('The following is SQLCODE:');
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(SQLCODE);
         RETURN -1;
   END;
   --
   --  Procedure that inserts a new employee record into the 'emp1' table.
   --
   PROCEDURE hire_emp (
      p_empno         NUMBER,
      p_ename         VARCHAR2,
      p_job           VARCHAR2,
      p_sal           NUMBER,
      p_hiredate      DATE    DEFAULT sysdate,
      p_comm          NUMBER  DEFAULT 0,
      p_mgr           NUMBER,
      p_deptno        NUMBER  DEFAULT 10
   )
   AS
   BEGIN
      INSERT INTO emp1(empno, ename, job, sal, hiredate, comm, mgr, deptno)
         VALUES(p_empno, p_ename, p_job, p_sal,
                p_hiredate, p_comm, p_mgr, p_deptno);
   END;
   --
   --  Procedure that deletes an employee record from the 'emp1' table based
   --  on the employee number.
   --
   PROCEDURE fire_emp (
      p_empno         NUMBER
   )
   AS
   BEGIN
      DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;
   END;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE emp_rpt
IS
    TYPE emprec_typ IS RECORD (
        empno       NUMBER(4),
        ename       VARCHAR(10)
    );
    TYPE emp_refcur IS REF CURSOR;

    FUNCTION get_dept_name (
        p_deptno    IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN VARCHAR2;
    FUNCTION open_emp_by_dept (
        p_deptno    IN emp1.deptno%TYPE
    ) RETURN EMP_REFCUR;
    PROCEDURE fetch_emp (
        p_refcur    IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    );
    PROCEDURE close_refcur (
        p_refcur    IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    );
END emp_rpt;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY emp_rpt
IS
    CURSOR dept_cur IS SELECT * FROM dept1;
    TYPE depttab_typ IS TABLE of dept1%ROWTYPE
        INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    t_dept          DEPTTAB_TYP;
    t_dept_max      INTEGER := 1;
    r_emp           EMPREC_TYP;

    FUNCTION get_dept_name (
        p_deptno    IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN VARCHAR2
    IS
    BEGIN
        FOR i IN 1..t_dept_max LOOP
            IF p_deptno = t_dept(i).deptno THEN
                RETURN t_dept(i).dname;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        RETURN 'Unknown';
    END;

    FUNCTION open_emp_by_dept(
        p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE
    ) RETURN EMP_REFCUR
    IS
        emp_by_dept EMP_REFCUR;
    BEGIN
        OPEN emp_by_dept FOR SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1
            WHERE deptno = p_deptno;
        RETURN emp_by_dept;
    END;

    PROCEDURE fetch_emp (
        p_refcur      IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    )
    IS
    BEGIN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('EMPNO ENAME');
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('----- -------');
        LOOP
            FETCH p_refcur INTO r_emp;
            EXIT WHEN p_refcur%NOTFOUND;
            DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(r_emp.empno || '  ' || r_emp.ename);
        END LOOP;
    END;

    PROCEDURE close_refcur (
        p_refcur      IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    )
    IS
    BEGIN
        CLOSE p_refcur;
    END;
BEGIN
    OPEN dept_cur;
    LOOP
        FETCH dept_cur INTO t_dept(t_dept_max);
        EXIT WHEN dept_cur%NOTFOUND;
        t_dept_max := t_dept_max + 1;
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE dept_cur;
    t_dept_max := t_dept_max - 1;
END emp_rpt;

CREATE TABLE dept1(deptno NUMBER(4), dname VARCHAR2(14), loc VARCHAR2(20))

CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE emp_admin
IS
   FUNCTION get_dept_name (
      p_deptno NUMBER DEFAULT 10
   )
   RETURN VARCHAR2;
   FUNCTION update_emp_sal (
      p_empno NUMBER,
      p_raise NUMBER
   )
   RETURN NUMBER;
   PROCEDURE hire_emp (
      p_empno           NUMBER,
      p_ename           VARCHAR2,
      p_job             VARCHAR2,
      p_sal             NUMBER,
      p_hiredate        DATE      DEFAULT   sysdate,
      p_comm            NUMBER    DEFAULT   0,
      p_mgr             NUMBER,
      p_deptno          NUMBER    DEFAULT   10
   );
   PROCEDURE fire_emp (
      p_empno NUMBER
   );
END emp_admin;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY emp_admin
IS
   --
   --  Function that queries the 'dept1' table based on the department
   --  number and returns the corresponding department name.
   --
   FUNCTION get_dept_name (
      p_deptno        IN NUMBER DEFAULT 10
   )
   RETURN VARCHAR2
   IS
      v_dname         VARCHAR2(14);
   BEGIN
      SELECT dname INTO v_dname FROM dept1 WHERE deptno = p_deptno;
      RETURN v_dname;
   EXCEPTION
      WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Invalid department number ' || p_deptno);
         RETURN '';
   END;
   --
   --  Function that updates an employee's salary based on the
   --  employee number and salary increment/decrement passed
   --  as IN parameters.  Upon successful completion the function
   --  returns the new updated salary.
   --
   FUNCTION update_emp_sal (
      p_empno         IN NUMBER,
      p_raise         IN NUMBER
   )
   RETURN NUMBER
   IS
      v_sal           NUMBER := 0;
   BEGIN
      SELECT sal INTO v_sal FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;
      v_sal := v_sal + p_raise;
      UPDATE emp1 SET sal = v_sal WHERE empno = p_empno;
      RETURN v_sal;
   EXCEPTION
      WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Employee ' || p_empno || ' not found');
         RETURN -1;
      WHEN OTHERS THEN
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('The following is SQLERRM:');
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(SQLERRM);
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('The following is SQLCODE:');
         DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(SQLCODE);
         RETURN -1;
   END;
   --
   --  Procedure that inserts a new employee record into the 'emp1' table.
   --
   PROCEDURE hire_emp (
      p_empno         NUMBER,
      p_ename         VARCHAR2,
      p_job           VARCHAR2,
      p_sal           NUMBER,
      p_hiredate      DATE    DEFAULT sysdate,
      p_comm          NUMBER  DEFAULT 0,
      p_mgr           NUMBER,
      p_deptno        NUMBER  DEFAULT 10
   )
   AS
   BEGIN
      INSERT INTO emp1(empno, ename, job, sal, hiredate, comm, mgr, deptno)
         VALUES(p_empno, p_ename, p_job, p_sal,
                p_hiredate, p_comm, p_mgr, p_deptno);
   END;
   --
   --  Procedure that deletes an employee record from the 'emp1' table based
   --  on the employee number.
   --
   PROCEDURE fire_emp (
      p_empno         NUMBER
   )
   AS
   BEGIN
      DELETE FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;
   END;
END;

        empno       NUMBER(4),
        ename       VARCHAR(10)
    );
    TYPE emp_refcur IS REF CURSOR;

    FUNCTION get_dept_name (
        p_deptno    IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN VARCHAR2;
    FUNCTION open_emp_by_dept (
        p_deptno    IN emp1.deptno%TYPE
    ) RETURN EMP_REFCUR;
    PROCEDURE fetch_emp (
        p_refcur    IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    );
    PROCEDURE close_refcur (
        p_refcur    IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    );
END emp_rpt;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY emp_rpt
IS
    CURSOR dept_cur IS SELECT * FROM dept1;
    TYPE depttab_typ IS TABLE of dept1%ROWTYPE
        INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
    t_dept          DEPTTAB_TYP;
    t_dept_max      INTEGER := 1;
    r_emp           EMPREC_TYP;

    FUNCTION get_dept_name (
        p_deptno    IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN VARCHAR2
    IS
    BEGIN
        FOR i IN 1..t_dept_max LOOP
            IF p_deptno = t_dept(i).deptno THEN
                RETURN t_dept(i).dname;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        RETURN 'Unknown';
    END;

    FUNCTION open_emp_by_dept(
        p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE
    ) RETURN EMP_REFCUR
    IS
        emp_by_dept EMP_REFCUR;
    BEGIN
        OPEN emp_by_dept FOR SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1
            WHERE deptno = p_deptno;
        RETURN emp_by_dept;
    END;

    PROCEDURE fetch_emp (
        p_refcur      IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    )
    IS
    BEGIN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('EMPNO ENAME');
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('----- -------');
        LOOP
            FETCH p_refcur INTO r_emp;
            EXIT WHEN p_refcur%NOTFOUND;
            DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(r_emp.empno || '  ' || r_emp.ename);
        END LOOP;
    END;

    PROCEDURE close_refcur (
        p_refcur      IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
    )
    IS
    BEGIN
        CLOSE p_refcur;
    END;
BEGIN
    OPEN dept_cur;
    LOOP
        FETCH dept_cur INTO t_dept(t_dept_max);
        EXIT WHEN dept_cur%NOTFOUND;
        t_dept_max := t_dept_max + 1;
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE dept_cur;
    t_dept_max := t_dept_max - 1;
END emp_rpt;

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_by_dept (
    p_deptno        emp1.deptno%TYPE
)
IS
    emp_refcur      SYS_REFCURSOR;
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_ename         emp1.ename%TYPE;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_refcur FOR SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1 WHERE deptno = p_deptno order by empno;
    LOOP
        FETCH emp_refcur INTO v_empno, v_ename;
        EXIT WHEN emp_refcur%NOTFOUND;
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_empno || ' ' || v_ename);
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE emp_refcur;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION emp_by_job (p_job VARCHAR2)
RETURN SYS_REFCURSOR
IS
    emp_refcur      SYS_REFCURSOR;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_refcur FOR SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1 WHERE job = p_job order by empno;
    RETURN emp_refcur;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE open_all_emp (
    p_emp_refcur    IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
)
IS
BEGIN
    OPEN p_emp_refcur FOR SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1  order by empno;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE open_emp_by_dept (
    p_emp_refcur    IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR,
    p_deptno        emp1.deptno%TYPE
)
IS
BEGIN
    OPEN p_emp_refcur FOR SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1
        WHERE deptno = p_deptno  order by empno;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION open_dept (
    p_dept_refcur    IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
) RETURN SYS_REFCURSOR
IS
    v_dept_refcur    SYS_REFCURSOR;
BEGIN
    v_dept_refcur := p_dept_refcur;
    OPEN v_dept_refcur FOR SELECT deptno, dname FROM dept1 order by deptno;
    RETURN v_dept_refcur;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE fetch_emp (
    p_emp_refcur    IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
)
IS
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_ename         emp1.ename%TYPE;
BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('EMPNO    ENAME');
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('-----    -------');
    LOOP
        FETCH p_emp_refcur INTO v_empno, v_ename;
        EXIT WHEN p_emp_refcur%NOTFOUND;
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_empno || '     ' || v_ename);
    END LOOP;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE fetch_dept (
    p_dept_refcur   IN SYS_REFCURSOR
)
IS
    v_deptno        dept1.deptno%TYPE;
    v_dname         dept1.dname%TYPE;
BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('DEPT   DNAME');
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('----   ---------');
    LOOP
        FETCH p_dept_refcur INTO v_deptno, v_dname;
        EXIT WHEN p_dept_refcur%NOTFOUND;
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_deptno || '     ' || v_dname);
    END LOOP;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE close_refcur (
    p_refcur   IN OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
)
IS
BEGIN
    CLOSE p_refcur;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE dept_query( emp_refcur  OUT SYS_REFCURSOR
)
IS
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_ename         emp1.ename%TYPE;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_refcur FOR 'SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1 WHERE deptno = 30' ||
        ' AND sal >= 1500 order by empno';
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE dept_query_with_parameters (
    p_deptno        emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    p_sal           emp1.sal%TYPE
)
IS
    emp_refcur      SYS_REFCURSOR;
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_ename         emp1.ename%TYPE;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_refcur FOR 'SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1 WHERE deptno = :dept1'
        || ' AND sal >= :sal order by empno' USING p_deptno, p_sal;
    LOOP
        FETCH emp_refcur INTO v_empno, v_ename;
        EXIT WHEN emp_refcur%NOTFOUND;
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_empno || ' ' || v_ename);
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE emp_refcur;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE dept_query_from_string (
    p_deptno        emp1.deptno%TYPE,
    p_sal           emp1.sal%TYPE
)
IS
    emp_refcur      SYS_REFCURSOR;
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_ename         emp1.ename%TYPE;
    p_query_string  VARCHAR2(100);
BEGIN
    p_query_string := 'SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1 WHERE ' ||
        'deptno = :dept1 AND sal >= :sal order by empno';
    OPEN emp_refcur FOR p_query_string USING p_deptno, p_sal;
    LOOP
        FETCH emp_refcur INTO v_empno, v_ename;
        EXIT WHEN emp_refcur%NOTFOUND;
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_empno || ' ' || v_ename);
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE emp_refcur;
END;

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE fetching_rows( 
   v_empno   OUT     NUMBER(4), 
   v_ename   OUT     VARCHAR2(10)) 
IS
    CURSOR emp_cur_3 IS SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1 
        ORDER BY empno;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_cur_3;
    FETCH emp_cur_3 INTO v_empno, v_ename;
    CLOSE emp_cur_3;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE fetching_rows_variable_type(
    v_empno  OUT   emp1.empno%TYPE,
    v_ename  OUT   emp1.ename%TYPE)
IS
    CURSOR emp_cur_3 IS SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1
        ORDER BY empno;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_cur_3;
    FETCH emp_cur_3 INTO v_empno, v_ename;
    CLOSE emp_cur_3;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE fetching_rows_record_rowtype(
    v_emp_rec   OUT emp1%ROWTYPE)
IS
    CURSOR emp_cur_1 IS SELECT * FROM emp1 order by empno;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_cur_1;
    FETCH emp_cur_1 INTO v_emp_rec;
    CLOSE emp_cur_1;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE using_rowtype_with_cursors
IS
    CURSOR empcur IS SELECT ename, deptno FROM emp1;
    myvar           empcur%ROWTYPE;
BEGIN
    OPEN empcur;
    LOOP
        FETCH empcur INTO myvar;
        EXIT WHEN empcur%NOTFOUND;
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE( myvar.ename || ' works in department '
            || myvar.deptno );
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE empcur;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE cursor_attribute_isopen(
 v_beforOpen  OUT Boolean, v_afterOpen  OUT Boolean, v_afterClose OUT Boolean)
IS
    CURSOR emp_cur_1 IS SELECT * FROM emp1;
BEGIN
    v_beforOpen := emp_cur_1%ISOPEN; 
    OPEN emp_cur_1;
    v_afterOpen := emp_cur_1%ISOPEN; 
    CLOSE emp_cur_1;
    v_afterClose := emp_cur_1%ISOPEN; 
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE cursor_attribute_found
IS
    v_emp_rec       emp1%ROWTYPE;
    CURSOR emp_cur_1 IS SELECT * FROM emp1;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_cur_1;
    FETCH emp_cur_1 INTO v_emp_rec;
    WHILE emp_cur_1%FOUND LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_emp_rec.empno || ' ' || v_emp_rec.ename);
        FETCH emp_cur_1 INTO v_emp_rec;
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE emp_cur_1;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE cursor_attribute_not_found
IS
    v_emp_rec       emp1%ROWTYPE;
    CURSOR emp_cur_1 IS SELECT * FROM emp1;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_cur_1;
    LOOP
        FETCH emp_cur_1 INTO v_emp_rec;
        EXIT WHEN emp_cur_1%NOTFOUND;
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_emp_rec.empno || ' ' || v_emp_rec.ename);
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE emp_cur_1;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE cursor_attribute_count(
   v_count  OUT Number)
IS
   v_emp_rec   emp1%ROWTYPE;
   CURSOR emp_cur_1 IS SELECT * FROM emp1;
BEGIN
   OPEN emp_cur_1;
      LOOP
        FETCH emp_cur_1 INTO v_emp_rec;
        EXIT WHEN emp_cur_1%NOTFOUND;
      END LOOP;
        v_count := emp_cur_1%ROWCOUNT;
   CLOSE emp_cur_1;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE cursor_for_loop
IS
    CURSOR emp_cur_1 IS SELECT * FROM emp1 order by empno;
BEGIN
    FOR v_emp_rec IN emp_cur_1 LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_emp_rec.empno || ' ' || v_emp_rec.ename);
    END LOOP;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP function test_max_three();
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION test_max_three() RETURN NUMBER  IS     FUNCTION add_one (
        p_add       IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN NUMBER;
    FUNCTION test_max (
        p_test      IN NUMBER)
    RETURN NUMBER
    IS
    BEGIN
        IF p_test < 5 THEN
            RETURN add_one(p_test);
        END IF;
        RETURN p_test;
    END;
    FUNCTION add_one (
        p_add       IN NUMBER)
    RETURN NUMBER
    IS
    BEGIN
        RETURN test_max(p_add + 1);
    END;
BEGIN
    RETURN test_max(3);
END;

        p_add       IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN NUMBER;
    FUNCTION test_max (
        p_test      IN NUMBER)
    RETURN NUMBER
    IS
    BEGIN
        IF p_test < 5 THEN
            RETURN add_one(p_test);
        END IF;
        RETURN p_test;
    END;
    FUNCTION add_one (
        p_add       IN NUMBER)
    RETURN NUMBER
    IS
    BEGIN
        RETURN test_max(p_add + 1);
    END;
BEGIN
    RETURN test_max(3);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE OverloadFunction_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE OverloadFunction_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    FUNCTION add_it (
        p_add_1     IN BINARY_INTEGER,
        p_add_2     IN BINARY_INTEGER
    ) RETURN VARCHAR2
    IS
    BEGIN
        RETURN 'add_it BINARY_INTEGER: ' || TO_CHAR(p_add_1 + p_add_2,9999.9999);
    END add_it;
    FUNCTION add_it (
        p_add_1     IN NUMBER,
        p_add_2     IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN VARCHAR2
    IS
    BEGIN
        RETURN 'add_it NUMBER: ' || TO_CHAR(p_add_1 + p_add_2,9999.9999);
    END add_it;
    FUNCTION add_it (
        p_add_1     IN REAL,
        p_add_2     IN REAL
    ) RETURN VARCHAR2
    IS
    BEGIN
        RETURN 'add_it REAL: ' || TO_CHAR(p_add_1 + p_add_2,9999.9999);
    END add_it;
    FUNCTION add_it (
        p_add_1     IN DOUBLE PRECISION,
        p_add_2     IN DOUBLE PRECISION
    ) RETURN VARCHAR2
    IS
    BEGIN
        RETURN 'add_it DOUBLE PRECISION: ' || TO_CHAR(p_add_1 + p_add_2,9999.9999);
    END add_it;
BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(add_it (25, 50));
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(add_it (25.3333, 50.3333));
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(add_it (TO_NUMBER(25.3333), TO_NUMBER(50.3333)));
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(add_it (CAST('25.3333' AS REAL), CAST('50.3333' AS REAL)));
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(add_it (CAST('25.3333' AS DOUBLE PRECISION),
        CAST('50.3333' AS DOUBLE PRECISION)));
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP function test_max_three();
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION test_max_three() RETURN NUMBER  IS     FUNCTION add_one (
        p_add       IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN NUMBER;
    FUNCTION test_max (
        p_test      IN NUMBER)
    RETURN NUMBER
    IS
    BEGIN
        IF p_test < 5 THEN
            RETURN add_one(p_test);
        END IF;
        RETURN p_test;
    END;
    FUNCTION add_one (
        p_add       IN NUMBER)
    RETURN NUMBER
    IS
    BEGIN
        RETURN test_max(p_add + 1);
    END;
BEGIN
    RETURN test_max(3);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE SimpleFunction_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE SimpleFunction_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    FUNCTION factorial (
        n           BINARY_INTEGER
    ) RETURN BINARY_INTEGER
    IS
    BEGIN
        IF n = 1 THEN
            RETURN n;
        ELSE
            RETURN n * factorial(n-1);
        END IF;
    END factorial;
BEGIN
    FOR i IN 1..5 LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(i || '! = ' || factorial(i));
    END LOOP;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER dept_audit_trig
    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON dept1
DECLARE
    v_action        VARCHAR2(24);
    PROCEDURE display_action (
        p_action    IN  VARCHAR2
    )
    IS
    BEGIN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('User ' || USER || ' ' || p_action ||
            ' dept on ' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'));
    END display_action;
BEGIN
    IF INSERTING THEN
        v_action := 'added';
    ELSIF UPDATING THEN
        v_action := 'updated';
    ELSIF DELETING THEN
        v_action := 'deleted';
    END IF;
    display_action(v_action);
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER dept_audit_trig
    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON dept1
DECLARE
    v_action        VARCHAR2(24);
    PROCEDURE display_action (
        p_action    IN  VARCHAR2
    )
    IS
    BEGIN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('User ' || USER || ' ' || p_action ||
            ' dept on ' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'));
    END display_action;
BEGIN
    IF INSERTING THEN
        v_action := 'added';
    ELSIF UPDATING THEN
        v_action := 'updated';
    ELSIF DELETING THEN
        v_action := 'deleted';
    END IF;
    display_action(v_action);
END;

DECLARE

        p_action    IN  VARCHAR2
    )
    IS
    BEGIN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('User ' || USER || ' ' || p_action ||
            ' dept on ' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'));
    END display_action;

        v_action := 'added';

        v_action := 'deleted';

    display_action(v_action);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE SimpleSubProcedure_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE SimpleSubProcedure_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    PROCEDURE list_emp
    IS
        v_empno     NUMBER(4);
        v_ename     VARCHAR2(10);
        CURSOR emp_cur IS
            SELECT empno, ename FROM emp1 ORDER BY empno;
    BEGIN
        OPEN emp_cur;
        LOOP
            FETCH emp_cur INTO v_empno, v_ename;
            EXIT WHEN emp_cur%NOTFOUND;
            DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_empno || ':' || v_ename);
        END LOOP;
        CLOSE emp_cur;
    END;
BEGIN
    list_emp;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE dept1(deptno NUMBER(8) UNIQUE,dname VARCHAR2(14), loc  VARCHAR2(13))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE emp1(empno NUMBER(8),  ename VARCHAR2(10),job VARCHAR2(9), mgr NUMBER(8), hiredate DATE, sal NUMBER(10,2), comm NUMBER(10,2), deptno NUMBER(8) references dept1(deptno))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
SET edb_stmt_level_tx TO on;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
insert into dept1 (deptno, dname, loc) values (10, 'ACCOUNTING','NEW YORK');
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
insert into dept1 (deptno, dname, loc) values (20, 'RESEARCH','DALLAS');
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
insert into dept1 (deptno, dname, loc) values (30, 'SALES','CHICAGO');
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
insert into dept1 (deptno, dname, loc) values (40, 'OPERATIONS','BOSTON');
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_insert (
    p_empno         IN emp1.empno%TYPE,
    p_ename         IN emp1.ename%TYPE,
    p_job           IN emp1.job%TYPE,
    p_mgr           IN emp1.mgr%TYPE,
    p_hiredate      IN emp1.hiredate%TYPE,
    p_sal           IN emp1.sal%TYPE,
    p_comm          IN emp1.comm%TYPE,
    p_deptno        IN emp1.deptno%TYPE
)
IS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO emp1 VALUES (
        p_empno,
        p_ename,
        p_job,
        p_mgr,
        p_hiredate,
        p_sal,
        p_comm,
        p_deptno);
DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Add employee: ' || p_empno);END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE InsertDeptCommit_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE InsertDeptCommit_SP()
 IS
 BEGIN
    INSERT INTO dept1 VALUES (50, 'FINANCE', 'DALLAS');
    INSERT INTO dept1 VALUES (60, 'MARKETING', 'CHICAGO');
    COMMIT;
    INSERT INTO dept1 VALUES (70, 'HUMAN RESOURCES', 'CHICAGO');
EXCEPTION
    WHEN OTHERS THEN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLERRM: ' || SQLERRM);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLCODE: ' || SQLCODE);
END;

    WHEN OTHERS THEN

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE InsertEmpRollBack_SP()
 IS
 BEGIN
    emp_insert(9603,'HARRISON','SALESMAN',7902,'13-DEC-07',5000,3000,20);
    emp_insert(9604,'JARVIS','SALESMAN',7902,'05-MAY-08',4800,4100,11);
    COMMIT;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN OTHERS THEN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('SQLERRM: ' || SQLERRM);
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('An error occurred - roll back inserts');
        ROLLBACK;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE dept1(deptno NUMBER(8) UNIQUE,dname VARCHAR2(14), loc  VARCHAR2(13))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE emp1(empno NUMBER(8),  ename VARCHAR2(10),job VARCHAR2(9), mgr NUMBER(8), hiredate DATE, sal NUMBER(10,2), comm NUMBER(10,2), deptno NUMBER(8))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE empauditlog(audit_date DATE, audit_user VARCHAR2(20), audit_desc VARCHAR2(20))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE insert_dept_70 IS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO dept1 VALUES (70,'MARKETING','LOS ANGELES');
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE insert_dept_70_rollback IS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO dept1 VALUES (70,'MARKETING','LOS ANGELES');
    ROLLBACK;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE insert_dept_70_auto IS
    PRAGMA AUTONOMOUS_TRANSACTION;
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO dept1 VALUES (70,'MARKETING','LOS ANGELES');
    ROLLBACK;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER emp_audit_trig
    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON emp1
DECLARE
    PRAGMA AUTONOMOUS_TRANSACTION;
    v_action        VARCHAR2(20);
BEGIN
    IF INSERTING THEN
        v_action := 'Added employee(s)';
    ELSIF UPDATING THEN
        v_action := 'Updated employee(s)';
    ELSIF DELETING THEN
        v_action := 'Deleted employee(s)';
    END IF;
    INSERT INTO empauditlog VALUES (SYSDATE, USER,
        v_action);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE insert_dept_typ AS OBJECT (
    deptno          NUMBER(2),
    dname           VARCHAR2(14),
    loc             VARCHAR2(13),
    MEMBER PROCEDURE insert_dept
);

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE BODY insert_dept_typ AS
    MEMBER PROCEDURE insert_dept
    IS
        PRAGMA AUTONOMOUS_TRANSACTION;
    BEGIN
        INSERT INTO dept1 VALUES (SELF.deptno,SELF.dname,SELF.loc);
        COMMIT;
    END;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE AutonomousTransactionObjectTypeMethod_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE AutonomousTransactionObjectTypeMethod_SP()
 IS
DECLARE
    v_dept          INSERT_DEPT_TYP :=
                      insert_dept_typ(60,'FINANCE','CHICAGO');
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO dept1 VALUES (50,'HR','DENVER');
    v_dept.insert_dept;
    ROLLBACK;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS empauditlog CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE dept1(deptno NUMBER(8) UNIQUE,dname VARCHAR2(14), loc  VARCHAR2(13))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE emp1(empno NUMBER(8),  ename VARCHAR2(10),job VARCHAR2(9), mgr NUMBER(8), hiredate DATE, sal NUMBER(10,2), comm NUMBER(10,2), deptno NUMBER(8))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE empauditlog(audit_date DATE, audit_user VARCHAR2(20), audit_desc VARCHAR2(20))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE insert_dept_70 IS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO dept1 VALUES (70,'MARKETING','LOS ANGELES');
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE insert_dept_70_rollback IS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO dept1 VALUES (70,'MARKETING','LOS ANGELES');
    ROLLBACK;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE insert_dept_70_auto IS
    PRAGMA AUTONOMOUS_TRANSACTION;
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO dept1 VALUES (70,'MARKETING','LOS ANGELES');
    ROLLBACK;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER emp_audit_trig
    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON emp1
DECLARE
    PRAGMA AUTONOMOUS_TRANSACTION;
    v_action        VARCHAR2(20);
BEGIN
    IF INSERTING THEN
        v_action := 'Added employee(s)';
    ELSIF UPDATING THEN
        v_action := 'Updated employee(s)';
    ELSIF DELETING THEN
        v_action := 'Deleted employee(s)';
    END IF;
    INSERT INTO empauditlog VALUES (SYSDATE, USER,
        v_action);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE insert_dept_typ AS OBJECT (
    deptno          NUMBER(2),
    dname           VARCHAR2(14),
    loc             VARCHAR2(13),
    MEMBER PROCEDURE insert_dept
);

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE BODY insert_dept_typ AS
    MEMBER PROCEDURE insert_dept
    IS
        PRAGMA AUTONOMOUS_TRANSACTION;
    BEGIN
        INSERT INTO dept1 VALUES (SELF.deptno,SELF.dname,SELF.loc);
        COMMIT;
    END;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

 IS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO dept1 VALUES (60,'FINANCE','CHICAGO');
    insert_dept_70;
END;
COMMIT;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP Trigger emp_alert_trig;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP Trigger emp_audit_trig;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP Trigger emp_comm_trig;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP Trigger emp_chg_trig;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP Trigger empvw_instead_of_trig;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP View emp_vw;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE emp1 CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE dept1 CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE empauditlog CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE empchglog CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE jobhist1 CASCADE
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE emp1(empno NUMBER(4),  ename VARCHAR2(20), job VARCHAR2(20), hiredate DATE, sal NUMBER(10,2), comm NUMBER(10,2), deptno NUMBER(4))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE dept1(deptno NUMBER(4),  dname VARCHAR2(20), loc VARCHAR2(20))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE empauditlog(audit_date  DATE, audit_user VARCHAR2(20), audit_desc VARCHAR2(20))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE empchglog(chg_date DATE, chg_desc VARCHAR2(30))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE jobhist1(EMPNO NUMBER(4), STARTDATE DATE, ENDDATE DATE, JOB VARCHAR2(20),SAL  NUMBER(10,2), COMM  NUMBER(10,2), DEPTNO  NUMBER(4), CHGDESC VARCHAR2(30))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE VIEW emp_vw AS SELECT * FROM emp1 e JOIN dept1 d USING(deptno);

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER emp_alert_trig
    BEFORE INSERT ON emp1
BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('New employees are about to be added');
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER emp_audit_trig
    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON emp1
DECLARE
    v_action        VARCHAR2(20);
BEGIN
    IF INSERTING THEN
        v_action := 'Added employee(s)';
    ELSIF UPDATING THEN
        v_action := 'Updated employee(s)';
    ELSIF DELETING THEN
        v_action := 'Deleted employee(s)';
    END IF;
    INSERT INTO empauditlog VALUES (SYSDATE, USER,
        v_action);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER emp_comm_trig
    BEFORE INSERT ON emp1
    FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    IF :NEW.deptno = 30 THEN
        :NEW.comm := :NEW.sal * .4;
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER emp_chg_trig
    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON emp1
    FOR EACH ROW
DECLARE
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_deptno        emp1.deptno%TYPE;
    v_dname         dept1.dname%TYPE;
    v_action        VARCHAR2(7);
    v_chgdesc       jobhist1.chgdesc%TYPE;
BEGIN
    IF INSERTING THEN
        v_action := 'Added';
        v_empno := :NEW.empno;
        v_deptno := :NEW.deptno;
        INSERT INTO jobhist1 VALUES (:NEW.empno, SYSDATE, NULL,
            :NEW.job, :NEW.sal, :NEW.comm, :NEW.deptno, 'New Hire');
    ELSIF UPDATING THEN
        v_action := 'Updated';
        v_empno := :NEW.empno;
        v_deptno := :NEW.deptno;
        v_chgdesc := '';
        IF NVL(:OLD.ename, '-null-') != NVL(:NEW.ename, '-null-') THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'name, ';
        END IF;
        IF NVL(:OLD.job, '-null-') != NVL(:NEW.job, '-null-') THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'job, ';
        END IF;
        IF NVL(:OLD.sal, -1) != NVL(:NEW.sal, -1) THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'salary, ';
        END IF;
        IF NVL(:OLD.comm, -1) != NVL(:NEW.comm, -1) THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'commission, ';
        END IF;
        IF NVL(:OLD.deptno, -1) != NVL(:NEW.deptno, -1) THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'department, ';
        END IF;
        v_chgdesc := 'Changed ' || RTRIM(v_chgdesc, ', ');
        UPDATE jobhist1 SET enddate = SYSDATE WHERE empno = :OLD.empno
            AND enddate IS NULL;
        INSERT INTO jobhist1 VALUES (:NEW.empno, SYSDATE, NULL,
            :NEW.job, :NEW.sal, :NEW.comm, :NEW.deptno, v_chgdesc);
    ELSIF DELETING THEN
        v_action := 'Deleted';
        v_empno := :OLD.empno;
        v_deptno := :OLD.deptno;
    END IF;
    INSERT INTO empchglog VALUES (SYSDATE,
        v_action || ' employee # ' || v_empno);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER empvw_instead_of_trig
    INSTEAD OF INSERT ON emp_vw
    FOR EACH ROW
DECLARE
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_ename         emp1.ename%TYPE;
    v_deptno        emp1.deptno%TYPE;
    v_dname         dept1.dname%TYPE;
    v_loc           dept1.loc%TYPE;
    v_action        VARCHAR2(7);
BEGIN
    v_empno     := :NEW.empno;
    v_ename     := :New.ename;
    v_deptno    := :NEW.deptno;
    v_dname     := :NEW.dname;
    v_loc       := :NEW.loc;
     INSERT INTO emp1(empno, ename, deptno) VALUES(v_empno, v_ename, v_deptno);
     INSERT INTO dept1(deptno, dname, loc) VALUES(v_deptno, v_dname, v_loc);
END;

INSERT INTO emp1 VALUES (9003,'PETERS','ANALYST',SYSDATE,5000.00,NULL,40);

UPDATE emp1 SET comm = sal * 1.1 WHERE empno IN (9003, 9004);

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
SELECT empno, to_char(STARTDATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS "startdate", to_char(ENDDATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS "enddate", JOB, sal, comm,DEPTNO, CHGDESC FROM jobhist1  WHERE empno IN (9003, 9004);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select to_char(CHG_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS "CHG_DATE", CHG_DESC from empchglog;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE emp1(empno NUMBER(4),  ename VARCHAR2(20), job VARCHAR2(20), hiredate DATE, sal NUMBER(10,2), comm NUMBER(10,2), deptno NUMBER(4))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE dept1(deptno NUMBER(4),  dname VARCHAR2(20), loc VARCHAR2(20))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE empauditlog(audit_date  DATE, audit_user VARCHAR2(20), audit_desc VARCHAR2(20))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE empchglog(chg_date DATE, chg_desc VARCHAR2(30))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE jobhist1(EMPNO NUMBER(4), STARTDATE DATE, ENDDATE DATE, JOB VARCHAR2(20),SAL  NUMBER(10,2), COMM  NUMBER(10,2), DEPTNO  NUMBER(4), CHGDESC VARCHAR2(30))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE VIEW emp_vw AS SELECT * FROM emp1 e JOIN dept1 d USING(deptno);

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER emp_alert_trig
    BEFORE INSERT ON emp1
BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('New employees are about to be added');
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER emp_audit_trig
    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON emp1
DECLARE
    v_action        VARCHAR2(20);
BEGIN
    IF INSERTING THEN
        v_action := 'Added employee(s)';
    ELSIF UPDATING THEN
        v_action := 'Updated employee(s)';
    ELSIF DELETING THEN
        v_action := 'Deleted employee(s)';
    END IF;
    INSERT INTO empauditlog VALUES (SYSDATE, USER,
        v_action);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER emp_comm_trig
    BEFORE INSERT ON emp1
    FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    IF :NEW.deptno = 30 THEN
        :NEW.comm := :NEW.sal * .4;
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER emp_chg_trig
    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON emp1
    FOR EACH ROW
DECLARE
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_deptno        emp1.deptno%TYPE;
    v_dname         dept1.dname%TYPE;
    v_action        VARCHAR2(7);
    v_chgdesc       jobhist1.chgdesc%TYPE;
BEGIN
    IF INSERTING THEN
        v_action := 'Added';
        v_empno := :NEW.empno;
        v_deptno := :NEW.deptno;
        INSERT INTO jobhist1 VALUES (:NEW.empno, SYSDATE, NULL,
            :NEW.job, :NEW.sal, :NEW.comm, :NEW.deptno, 'New Hire');
    ELSIF UPDATING THEN
        v_action := 'Updated';
        v_empno := :NEW.empno;
        v_deptno := :NEW.deptno;
        v_chgdesc := '';
        IF NVL(:OLD.ename, '-null-') != NVL(:NEW.ename, '-null-') THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'name, ';
        END IF;
        IF NVL(:OLD.job, '-null-') != NVL(:NEW.job, '-null-') THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'job, ';
        END IF;
        IF NVL(:OLD.sal, -1) != NVL(:NEW.sal, -1) THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'salary, ';
        END IF;
        IF NVL(:OLD.comm, -1) != NVL(:NEW.comm, -1) THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'commission, ';
        END IF;
        IF NVL(:OLD.deptno, -1) != NVL(:NEW.deptno, -1) THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'department, ';
        END IF;
        v_chgdesc := 'Changed ' || RTRIM(v_chgdesc, ', ');
        UPDATE jobhist1 SET enddate = SYSDATE WHERE empno = :OLD.empno
            AND enddate IS NULL;
        INSERT INTO jobhist1 VALUES (:NEW.empno, SYSDATE, NULL,
            :NEW.job, :NEW.sal, :NEW.comm, :NEW.deptno, v_chgdesc);
    ELSIF DELETING THEN
        v_action := 'Deleted';
        v_empno := :OLD.empno;
        v_deptno := :OLD.deptno;
    END IF;
    INSERT INTO empchglog VALUES (SYSDATE,
        v_action || ' employee # ' || v_empno);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER empvw_instead_of_trig
    INSTEAD OF INSERT ON emp_vw
    FOR EACH ROW
DECLARE
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_ename         emp1.ename%TYPE;
    v_deptno        emp1.deptno%TYPE;
    v_dname         dept1.dname%TYPE;
    v_loc           dept1.loc%TYPE;
    v_action        VARCHAR2(7);
BEGIN
    v_empno     := :NEW.empno;
    v_ename     := :New.ename;
    v_deptno    := :NEW.deptno;
    v_dname     := :NEW.dname;
    v_loc       := :NEW.loc;
     INSERT INTO emp1(empno, ename, deptno) VALUES(v_empno, v_ename, v_deptno);
     INSERT INTO dept1(deptno, dname, loc) VALUES(v_deptno, v_dname, v_loc);
END;

    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON emp1
    FOR EACH ROW
DECLARE

    v_deptno        emp1.deptno%TYPE;
    v_dname         dept1.dname%TYPE;
    v_action        VARCHAR2(7);
    v_chgdesc       jobhist1.chgdesc%TYPE;
