        v_action := 'Added';
        v_empno := :NEW.empno;
        v_deptno := :NEW.deptno;
        INSERT INTO jobhist1 VALUES (:NEW.empno, SYSDATE, NULL,
            :NEW.job, :NEW.sal, :NEW.comm, :NEW.deptno, 'New Hire');
    ELSIF UPDATING THEN
        v_action := 'Updated';
        v_empno := :NEW.empno;
        v_deptno := :NEW.deptno;
        v_chgdesc := '';
        IF NVL(:OLD.ename, '-null-') != NVL(:NEW.ename, '-null-') THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'name, ';
        END IF;
        IF NVL(:OLD.job, '-null-') != NVL(:NEW.job, '-null-') THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'job, ';
        END IF;
        IF NVL(:OLD.sal, -1) != NVL(:NEW.sal, -1) THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'salary, ';
        END IF;
        IF NVL(:OLD.comm, -1) != NVL(:NEW.comm, -1) THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'commission, ';
        END IF;
        IF NVL(:OLD.deptno, -1) != NVL(:NEW.deptno, -1) THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'department, ';
        END IF;
        v_chgdesc := 'Changed ' || RTRIM(v_chgdesc, ', ');
        UPDATE jobhist1 SET enddate = SYSDATE WHERE empno = :OLD.empno
            AND enddate IS NULL;
        INSERT INTO jobhist1 VALUES (:NEW.empno, SYSDATE, NULL,
            :NEW.job, :NEW.sal, :NEW.comm, :NEW.deptno, v_chgdesc);
    ELSIF DELETING THEN
        v_action := 'Deleted';
        v_empno := :OLD.empno;
        v_deptno := :OLD.deptno;
    END IF;
    INSERT INTO empchglog VALUES (SYSDATE,
        v_action || ' employee # ' || v_empno);

    FROM emp1 WHERE empno BETWEEN 7900 AND 7999;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE emp1(empno NUMBER(4),  ename VARCHAR2(20), job VARCHAR2(20), hiredate DATE, sal NUMBER(10,2), comm NUMBER(10,2), deptno NUMBER(4))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE dept1(deptno NUMBER(4),  dname VARCHAR2(20), loc VARCHAR2(20))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE empauditlog(audit_date  DATE, audit_user VARCHAR2(20), audit_desc VARCHAR2(20))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE empchglog(chg_date DATE, chg_desc VARCHAR2(30))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE jobhist1(EMPNO NUMBER(4), STARTDATE DATE, ENDDATE DATE, JOB VARCHAR2(20),SAL  NUMBER(10,2), COMM  NUMBER(10,2), DEPTNO  NUMBER(4), CHGDESC VARCHAR2(30))
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE VIEW emp_vw AS SELECT * FROM emp1 e JOIN dept1 d USING(deptno);

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER emp_alert_trig
    BEFORE INSERT ON emp1
BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('New employees are about to be added');
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER emp_audit_trig
    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON emp1
DECLARE
    v_action        VARCHAR2(20);
BEGIN
    IF INSERTING THEN
        v_action := 'Added employee(s)';
    ELSIF UPDATING THEN
        v_action := 'Updated employee(s)';
    ELSIF DELETING THEN
        v_action := 'Deleted employee(s)';
    END IF;
    INSERT INTO empauditlog VALUES (SYSDATE, USER,
        v_action);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER emp_comm_trig
    BEFORE INSERT ON emp1
    FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    IF :NEW.deptno = 30 THEN
        :NEW.comm := :NEW.sal * .4;
    END IF;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER emp_chg_trig
    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON emp1
    FOR EACH ROW
DECLARE
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_deptno        emp1.deptno%TYPE;
    v_dname         dept1.dname%TYPE;
    v_action        VARCHAR2(7);
    v_chgdesc       jobhist1.chgdesc%TYPE;
BEGIN
    IF INSERTING THEN
        v_action := 'Added';
        v_empno := :NEW.empno;
        v_deptno := :NEW.deptno;
        INSERT INTO jobhist1 VALUES (:NEW.empno, SYSDATE, NULL,
            :NEW.job, :NEW.sal, :NEW.comm, :NEW.deptno, 'New Hire');
    ELSIF UPDATING THEN
        v_action := 'Updated';
        v_empno := :NEW.empno;
        v_deptno := :NEW.deptno;
        v_chgdesc := '';
        IF NVL(:OLD.ename, '-null-') != NVL(:NEW.ename, '-null-') THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'name, ';
        END IF;
        IF NVL(:OLD.job, '-null-') != NVL(:NEW.job, '-null-') THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'job, ';
        END IF;
        IF NVL(:OLD.sal, -1) != NVL(:NEW.sal, -1) THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'salary, ';
        END IF;
        IF NVL(:OLD.comm, -1) != NVL(:NEW.comm, -1) THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'commission, ';
        END IF;
        IF NVL(:OLD.deptno, -1) != NVL(:NEW.deptno, -1) THEN
            v_chgdesc := v_chgdesc || 'department, ';
        END IF;
        v_chgdesc := 'Changed ' || RTRIM(v_chgdesc, ', ');
        UPDATE jobhist1 SET enddate = SYSDATE WHERE empno = :OLD.empno
            AND enddate IS NULL;
        INSERT INTO jobhist1 VALUES (:NEW.empno, SYSDATE, NULL,
            :NEW.job, :NEW.sal, :NEW.comm, :NEW.deptno, v_chgdesc);
    ELSIF DELETING THEN
        v_action := 'Deleted';
        v_empno := :OLD.empno;
        v_deptno := :OLD.deptno;
    END IF;
    INSERT INTO empchglog VALUES (SYSDATE,
        v_action || ' employee # ' || v_empno);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER empvw_instead_of_trig
    INSTEAD OF INSERT ON emp_vw
    FOR EACH ROW
DECLARE
    v_empno         emp1.empno%TYPE;
    v_ename         emp1.ename%TYPE;
    v_deptno        emp1.deptno%TYPE;
    v_dname         dept1.dname%TYPE;
    v_loc           dept1.loc%TYPE;
    v_action        VARCHAR2(7);
BEGIN
    v_empno     := :NEW.empno;
    v_ename     := :New.ename;
    v_deptno    := :NEW.deptno;
    v_dname     := :NEW.dname;
    v_loc       := :NEW.loc;
     INSERT INTO emp1(empno, ename, deptno) VALUES(v_empno, v_ename, v_deptno);
     INSERT INTO dept1(deptno, dname, loc) VALUES(v_deptno, v_dname, v_loc);
END;

DROP PROCEDURE dept_salary_rpt
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE dept_salary_rpt (
    p_deptno  NUMBER
)
IS
    todays_date     DATE := SYSDATE;
    rpt_title       VARCHAR2(60) := 'Report For Department # ' || p_deptno
                                    || ' on ' || todays_date;
    base_sal        INTEGER := 35525;
    base_comm_rate  NUMBER := 1.33333;
    base_annual     NUMBER := ROUND(base_sal * base_comm_rate, 2);
BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(rpt_title);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Base Annual Salary: ' || base_annual);
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE emp_sal_query
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE emp_sal_query (
    p_empno         IN emp1.empno%TYPE
)
IS
    v_ename         emp1.ename%TYPE;
    v_job           emp1.job%TYPE;
    v_hiredate      emp1.hiredate%TYPE;
    v_sal           emp1.sal%TYPE;
    v_deptno        emp1.deptno%TYPE;
    v_avgsal        v_sal%TYPE;
BEGIN
    SELECT ename, job, hiredate, sal, deptno
        INTO v_ename, v_job, v_hiredate, v_sal, v_deptno
        FROM emp1 WHERE empno = p_empno;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Employee # : ' || p_empno);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Name       : ' || v_ename);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Job        : ' || v_job);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Hire Date  : ' || v_hiredate);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Salary     : ' || v_sal);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Dept #     : ' || v_deptno);

    SELECT AVG(sal) INTO v_avgsal
        FROM emp1 WHERE deptno = v_deptno;
    IF v_sal > v_avgsal THEN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Employee''s salary is more than the '
            || 'department average of: ' || v_avgsal);
    ELSE
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Employee''s salary does not exceed the '
            || 'department average of: ' || v_avgsal);
    END IF;
END;

DROP PROCEDURE Varray_SP;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE Varray_SP()
 IS
 DECLARE
    TYPE dname_varray_typ IS VARRAY(4) OF VARCHAR2(14);
    dname_varray    dname_varray_typ;
    CURSOR dept_cur IS SELECT dname FROM dept1 ORDER BY dname;
    i               INTEGER := 0;
BEGIN
    dname_varray := dname_varray_typ(NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL);
    FOR r_dept IN dept_cur LOOP
        i := i + 1;
        dname_varray(i) := r_dept.dname;
    END LOOP;
    FOR j IN 1..i LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(dname_varray(j));
    END LOOP;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DECLARE    
	TYPE rec IS RECORD (x INT, y INT);
	rec_var rec;
	row_var db1425_t1%ROWTYPE;
	comp_var db1425_t1;
BEGIN    
	rec_var = row(1000, 1000);    
	UPDATE db1425_t1 SET ROW=rec_var WHERE a = 1;	
	row_var.a = 2000;	
	row_var.b = 2000;    
	UPDATE db1425_t1 SET ROW=row_var WHERE a = 2;	
	comp_var = row(3000, 3000);    
	UPDATE db1425_t1 SET ROW=comp_var WHERE a = 3;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DECLARE
    gen_refcur      SYS_REFCURSOR;
BEGIN
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('ALL EMPLOYEES');
    open_all_emp(gen_refcur);
    fetch_emp(gen_refcur);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('****************');

    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('EMPLOYEES IN DEPT #10');
    open_emp_by_dept(gen_refcur, 10);
    fetch_emp(gen_refcur);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('****************');

    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('DEPARTMENTS');
    fetch_dept(open_dept(gen_refcur));
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('*****************');

    close_refcur(gen_refcur);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE FUNCTION "CustomerOrderCount" ("customerId" INTEGER) RETURNS INTEGER
AS $$ SELECT COUNT("Id")::INTEGER FROM "Orders" WHERE "CustomerId" = $1 $$
LANGUAGE SQL;

CREATE FUNCTION "StarValue" ("starCount" INTEGER, value TEXT) RETURNS TEXT
AS $$ SELECT repeat('*', $1) || $2 $$
LANGUAGE SQL;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DECLARE
    v_deptno     dept.deptno%TYPE DEFAULT 30;
    v_emp_cur    emp_rpt.EMP_REFCUR;
    r_emp        emp_rpt.EMPREC_TYP;
BEGIN
    v_emp_cur := emp_rpt.open_emp_by_dept(v_deptno);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('EMPLOYEES IN DEPT #' || v_deptno ||
        ': ' || emp_rpt.get_dept_name(v_deptno));
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('EMPNO ENAME');
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('----- -------');
    LOOP
        FETCH v_emp_cur INTO r_emp;
        EXIT WHEN v_emp_cur%NOTFOUND;
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(r_emp.empno || '  ' ||
            r_emp.ename);
    END LOOP;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('**********************');
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_emp_cur%ROWCOUNT || ' rows were retrieved');
    CLOSE v_emp_cur;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DECLARE
    v_deptno dept.deptno%TYPE DEFAULT 30;
    v_emp_cur emp_rpt.EMP_REFCUR;
BEGIN
    v_emp_cur := emp_rpt.open_emp_by_dept(v_deptno);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('EMPLOYEES IN DEPT #' || v_deptno ||
        ': ' || emp_rpt.get_dept_name(v_deptno));
    emp_rpt.fetch_emp(v_emp_cur);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('**********************');
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_emp_cur%ROWCOUNT || ' rows were retrieved');
    emp_rpt.close_refcur(v_emp_cur);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE CUR_TEST(v_id OUT NUMERIC)
IS
v_name varchar2(20);
CURSOR c_name IS SELECT EMPNO,ENAME FROM EMP where EMPNO=7521;
BEGIN
OPEN c_name;
FETCH c_name into v_id,v_name;
CLOSE c_name;
DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_id);
DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_name);
END;

 AS 
d        NUMBER(2);
 BEGIN

    d:=d+c; 
    RETURN 'EnterpriseDB'; 
 END;

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION mixArgFunc_test(a INOUT NUMERIC, b OUT NUMERIC, c IN NUMERIC)
    RETURN int
AS
BEGIN
    b:=c;
    a:=a+a;
    return b-1;
END;

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION mixArgFuncNull_test(a INOUT NUMERIC, b OUT NUMERIC, c IN NUMERIC)
    RETURN int
AS
BEGIN
    b:=c;
    a:=NULL;
    return b-1;
END;

create or replace procedure quoteproc(abc in integer)
is
declare
i integer:=0;
begin
while i < abc loop
INSERT INTO Quote values(1, 't');
i := i+1;
end loop;
end;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

SELECT
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargnames IS NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill(''::name,ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_agg(pg_attribute.attname ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proargnames
END AS proargnames,
pg_proc.proargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proallargtypes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(string_to_array(pg_proc.proargtypes::text,' ')::oid[],array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proallargtypes
END AS proallargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargmodes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill('i'::"char",ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_fill('o'::"char",ARRAY[array_length(array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid), 1)]))
    ELSE COALESCE(pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.proargmodes) -- EnterpriseDB
END AS proargmodes
FROM pg_proc
LEFT JOIN pg_type ON pg_proc.prorettype = pg_type.oid
LEFT JOIN pg_attribute ON pg_type.typrelid = pg_attribute.attrelid AND pg_attribute.attnum >= 1 AND NOT pg_attribute.attisdropped
WHERE pg_proc.oid = :proname::regproc
GROUP BY pg_proc.proargnames, pg_proc.proargtypes, pg_proc.proallargtypes, pg_proc.proargmodes, pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.pronargs;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE CMP_TRIG_TBL (id number(4) primary key, description varchar2(200));
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER CMP_TRIG FOR INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON CMP_TRIG_TBL
COMPOUND TRIGGER
V_ID  NUMBER;

BEFORE STATEMENT
IS BEGIN 

IF INSERTING THEN DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line ('INSERT - Before Statement Trigger');
END IF;

IF UPDATING THEN DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line ('UPDATE - Before Statement Trigger');
END IF;

IF DELETING THEN DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line ('DELETE - Before Statement Trigger');
END IF;
END BEFORE STATEMENT;

AFTER STATEMENT
IS
BEGIN
IF INSERTING THEN DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line ('INSERT - After Statement Trigger');
END IF;

IF UPDATING THEN DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line ('UPDATE - After Statement Trigger');
END IF;

IF DELETING THEN DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line ('DELETE - After Statement Trigger');
END IF;
END AFTER STATEMENT;

BEFORE EACH ROW IS BEGIN IF INSERTING THEN DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line ('INSERT - Before Each Row Trigger'); 
END IF;

IF UPDATING THEN DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line ('UPDATE - Before Each Row Trigger'); 
END IF;

IF DELETING THEN DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line ('DELETE - Before Each Row Trigger');
END IF;
END BEFORE EACH ROW;

AFTER EACH ROW IS BEGIN IF INSERTING THEN DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line ('INSERT - After Each Row Trigger');
END IF;

IF UPDATING THEN DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line ('UPDATE - After Each Row Trigger');
END IF;

IF DELETING THEN DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line ('DELETE - After Each Row Trigger');
END IF; 
END AFTER EACH ROW;

END CMP_TRIG;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS CMP_TRIG_TBL

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE dbmssql_proc1() IS cur_id               INTEGER; v_long VARCHAR2(20); sql_stmt VARCHAR2(50) := 'SELECT col_int, col_long ' || ' FROM rm44142_dtypes'; status INTEGER; length INTEGER; BEGIN cur_id := DBMS_SQL.OPEN_CURSOR; DBMS_SQL.PARSE(cur_id, sql_stmt, DBMS_SQL.native); DBMS_SQL.DEFINE_COLUMN_LONG(cur_id, 2); status:= DBMS_SQL.EXECUTE(cur_id); status:= DBMS_SQL.FETCH_ROWS(cur_id); DBMS_SQL.COLUMN_VALUE_LONG(cur_id, 2, 12, 10, v_long, length); DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('col_long: ' || v_long); DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('value_length: ' || length); DBMS_SQL.CLOSE_CURSOR(cur_id); END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE rm44142_tbl(col_int INTEGER PRIMARY KEY);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO rm44142_tbl VALUES(1);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE dbmssql_proc2() IS cur_id               INTEGER; sql_stmt VARCHAR2(50) := 'SELECT col_int FROM rm44142'; position INTEGER; BEGIN cur_id := DBMS_SQL.OPEN_CURSOR; DBMS_SQL.PARSE(cur_id, sql_stmt, DBMS_SQL.native); EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN position:= DBMS_SQL.LAST_ERROR_POSITION; DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('error position = ' || position); DBMS_SQL.CLOSE_CURSOR(cur_id); END;

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE dbms_output_proc() IS BEGIN SET dbms_output.serveroutput = OFF; dbms_output.put_line('when "set dbms_output.serveroutput OFF" is used.'); SET dbms_output.serveroutput = ON; dbms_output.put_line('when "set dbms_output.serveroutput ON" is used.'); SET dbms_output.serveroutput = OFF; dbms_output.put_line('when "set dbms_output.serveroutput OFF" is used.'); END;

CREATE TABLE db563_list_list (
col1        NUMBER,
col2        NUMBER
)
PARTITION BY LIST (col1)
SUBPARTITION BY LIST (col2)
SUBPARTITION TEMPLATE(
SUBPARTITION s1 VALUES (10),
SUBPARTITION s2 VALUES (20)
)
(
PARTITION p1 VALUES (100),
PARTITION p2 VALUES (200)

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION read_bin_file() return void as
DECLARE
v_tempfile UTL_FILE.FILE_TYPE;
v_filename  varchar(20) := 'small_test.png';
v_temprec BYTEA;
v_count INTEGER := 0;
BEGIN
v_tempfile := UTL_FILE.FOPEN('edatadir', v_filename, 'rb');
UTL_FILE.GET_RAW(v_tempfile,v_temprec);
UTL_FILE.GET_RAW(v_tempfile,v_temprec);
UTL_FILE.GET_RAW(v_tempfile,v_temprec);
EXCEPTION WHEN no_data_found THEN
DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(SQLCODE||' : '||SQLERRM);
UTL_FILE.FCLOSE(v_tempfile);
WHEN others THEN
RAISE notice 'exception, others : SQLERRM: %', sqlerrm;
UTL_FILE.FCLOSE(v_tempfile);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select read_bin_file();

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION db1408_fn_double(n IN number) RETURN number IS BEGIN   raise notice 'number %', n;   return n * 2; END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE db1408_pr_in(arg_in number) IS BEGIN   EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'BEGIN db1408_pr_print(:arg_in); END;'     USING IN arg_in; END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO db1425_t1 VALUES(3,2);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DECLARE    
	TYPE rec IS RECORD (x INT, y INT);
	rec_var rec;
	row_var db1425_t1%ROWTYPE;
	comp_var db1425_t1;
BEGIN    
	rec_var = row(1000, 1000);    
	UPDATE db1425_t1 SET ROW=rec_var WHERE a = 1;	
	row_var.a = 2000;	
	row_var.b = 2000;    
	UPDATE db1425_t1 SET ROW=row_var WHERE a = 2;	
	comp_var = row(3000, 3000);    
	UPDATE db1425_t1 SET ROW=comp_var WHERE a = 3;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
SELECT * FROM db1425_t1 ORDER BY a, b

CREATE TABLE emp1 (  emp1no           NUMBER(4) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT emp1_pk PRIMARY KEY,  ename           VARCHAR2(10),  job             VARCHAR2(9),  mgr             NUMBER(4),  hiredate        DATE,  sal             NUMBER(7,2) CONSTRAINT emp1_sal_ck CHECK (sal > 0),  comm            NUMBER(7,2),  dept1no          NUMBER(2) CONSTRAINT emp1_ref_dept1_fk REFERENCES dept1(dept1no) );

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE target;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE source;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE target(tid integer, balance integer);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE source(sid integer, delta integer);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO source VALUES (1, 100);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO source VALUES (2, 200);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO source VALUES (3, 300);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO source VALUES (4, 100);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO source VALUES (5, 300);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO source VALUES (6, 600);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO target VALUES (1, 0);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO target VALUES (2, 20);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO target VALUES (3, 0);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
BEGIN;  MERGE INTO target t  USING source s  ON (t.tid = s.sid)  WHEN MATCHED THEN      UPDATE SET balance = s.delta WHERE balance = 0  WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN      INSERT VALUES (s.sid, s.delta) WHERE s.sid >= 5;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select * from target order by tid;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS db2021_fn2
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TYPE IF EXISTS ct1
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TYPE IF EXISTS ct3
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TYPE ct1 AS (x int, y int);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TYPE ct3 AS (x text, y text);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION db2021_fn2(OUT o1 ct1, OUT o2 ct3) RETURN void AS  BEGIN    o1.x := 10;   o1.y := 20;   o2.x := 'ten';   o2.y := 'twenty';   return; END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

SELECT
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargnames IS NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill(''::name,ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_agg(pg_attribute.attname ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proargnames
END AS proargnames,
pg_proc.proargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proallargtypes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(string_to_array(pg_proc.proargtypes::text,' ')::oid[],array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proallargtypes
END AS proallargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargmodes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill('i'::"char",ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_fill('o'::"char",ARRAY[array_length(array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid), 1)]))
    ELSE COALESCE(pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.proargmodes) -- EnterpriseDB
END AS proargmodes
FROM pg_proc
LEFT JOIN pg_type ON pg_proc.prorettype = pg_type.oid
LEFT JOIN pg_attribute ON pg_type.typrelid = pg_attribute.attrelid AND pg_attribute.attnum >= 1 AND NOT pg_attribute.attisdropped
WHERE pg_proc.oid = :proname::regproc
GROUP BY pg_proc.proargnames, pg_proc.proargtypes, pg_proc.proallargtypes, pg_proc.proargmodes, pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.pronargs;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE db2021_proc2
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TYPE ct1
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TYPE ct3
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TYPE ct1 AS (x int, y int);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TYPE ct3 AS (x text, y text);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE db2021_proc2(OUT o1 ct1, OUT o2 ct3) AS  BEGIN    o1.x := 10;   o1.y := 20;   o2.x := 'ten';   o2.y := 'twenty'; END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

SELECT
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargnames IS NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill(''::name,ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_agg(pg_attribute.attname ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proargnames
END AS proargnames,
pg_proc.proargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proallargtypes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(string_to_array(pg_proc.proargtypes::text,' ')::oid[],array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proallargtypes
END AS proallargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargmodes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill('i'::"char",ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_fill('o'::"char",ARRAY[array_length(array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid), 1)]))
    ELSE COALESCE(pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.proargmodes) -- EnterpriseDB
END AS proargmodes
FROM pg_proc
LEFT JOIN pg_type ON pg_proc.prorettype = pg_type.oid
LEFT JOIN pg_attribute ON pg_type.typrelid = pg_attribute.attrelid AND pg_attribute.attnum >= 1 AND NOT pg_attribute.attisdropped
WHERE pg_proc.oid = :proname::regproc
GROUP BY pg_proc.proargnames, pg_proc.proargtypes, pg_proc.proallargtypes, pg_proc.proargmodes, pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.pronargs;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP FUNCTION db2021_fn1
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TYPE ct1
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TYPE ct3
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TYPE ct1 AS (x int, y int);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TYPE ct3 AS (x text, y text);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION db2021_fn1(INOUT o1 ct1, INOUT o2 ct3) RETURN void AS  BEGIN    o1.x := 10;   o1.y := 20;   o2.x := 'ten';   o2.y := 'twenty';   return; END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

SELECT
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargnames IS NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill(''::name,ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_agg(pg_attribute.attname ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proargnames
END AS proargnames,
pg_proc.proargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proallargtypes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(string_to_array(pg_proc.proargtypes::text,' ')::oid[],array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid ORDER BY pg_attribute.attnum))
	ELSE pg_proc.proallargtypes
END AS proallargtypes,
CASE
	WHEN pg_proc.proargmodes IS NULL AND (array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid))[1] IS NOT NULL THEN array_cat(array_fill('i'::"char",ARRAY[pg_proc.pronargs]),array_fill('o'::"char",ARRAY[array_length(array_agg(pg_attribute.atttypid), 1)]))
    ELSE COALESCE(pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.proargmodes) -- EnterpriseDB
END AS proargmodes
FROM pg_proc
LEFT JOIN pg_type ON pg_proc.prorettype = pg_type.oid
LEFT JOIN pg_attribute ON pg_type.typrelid = pg_attribute.attrelid AND pg_attribute.attnum >= 1 AND NOT pg_attribute.attisdropped
WHERE pg_proc.oid = :proname::regproc
GROUP BY pg_proc.proargnames, pg_proc.proargtypes, pg_proc.proallargtypes, pg_proc.proargmodes, pg_proc.proargdeclaredmodes, pg_proc.pronargs;

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE define_array_test()
IS
    names    DBMS_SQL.VARCHAR2_TABLE;
    sals     DBMS_SQL.NUMBER_TABLE;
    dob      DBMS_SQL.TIMESTAMP_TABLE;
    height   DBMS_SQL.FLOAT_TABLE;
    dpt_id   DBMS_SQL.INTEGER_TABLE;
    c        NUMBER;
    r        NUMBER;
    sql_stmt VARCHAR2(32767) :=
        'SELECT first_name, salary, department_id, dob, height FROM employees_db1750 WHERE department_id = :b1';
BEGIN
    c := DBMS_SQL.OPEN_CURSOR;
    DBMS_SQL.PARSE(c, sql_stmt, dbms_sql.native);
    DBMS_SQL.BIND_VARIABLE(c, 'b1', 1);
    DBMS_SQL.DEFINE_ARRAY(c, 1, names, 5, 11);
    DBMS_SQL.DEFINE_ARRAY(c, 5, height, 5, 11);
    DBMS_SQL.DEFINE_ARRAY(c, 4, dob, 5, 11);
    DBMS_SQL.DEFINE_ARRAY(c, 2, sals, 5, 11);
    DBMS_SQL.DEFINE_ARRAY(c, 3, dpt_id, 5, 11);
    r := DBMS_SQL.EXECUTE(c);
    LOOP
      r := DBMS_SQL.FETCH_ROWS(c);
      EXIT WHEN r = 0;
      DBMS_SQL.COLUMN_VALUE(c, 5, height);
      DBMS_SQL.COLUMN_VALUE(c, 1, names);
      DBMS_SQL.COLUMN_VALUE(c, 2, sals);
      DBMS_SQL.COLUMN_VALUE(c, 3, dpt_id);
      DBMS_SQL.COLUMN_VALUE(c, 4, dob);
    END LOOP;
    DBMS_SQL.CLOSE_CURSOR(c);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('last index in table = ' || sals.LAST);
    -- loop through the names and sals collections
    FOR i IN sals.FIRST .. sals.LAST  LOOP
      DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('salary = ' || sals(i) || ' name = ' ||names(i) || ' department_id = ' || dpt_id(i) || ' dob = ' || dob(i) || ' height = ' || height(i) );
    END LOOP;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE describe_columns3_test()
IS
  curid      NUMBER;
  desctab    DBMS_SQL.DESC_TAB3;
  colcnt     NUMBER;
  sql_stmt   VARCHAR2(200) := 'SELECT * FROM projecttab_db2145';
BEGIN
    curid := DBMS_SQL.OPEN_CURSOR;
    DBMS_SQL.PARSE(curid, sql_stmt, DBMS_SQL.NATIVE);
    DBMS_SQL.DESCRIBE_COLUMNS3(curid, colcnt, desctab);
    FOR i IN 1 .. colcnt LOOP
      IF desctab(i).col_type = 109 THEN
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT(desctab(i).col_name || ' is user-defined type: ');
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('COL_TYPE_NAME = ' || desctab(i).col_type_name
        || ' COL_TYPE_NAME_LEN = ' || desctab(i).col_type_name_len);
      ELSE
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT(desctab(i).col_name || ' is not user-defined type: ');
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('COL_TYPE_NAME is NULL and '
        || 'COL_TYPE_NAME_LEN = ' || desctab(i).col_type_name_len);
      END IF;
    END LOOP;
    DBMS_SQL.CLOSE_CURSOR(curid);
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE test_expand_sql_text_select_valid()
IS
  result CLOB;
BEGIN
  DBMS_UTILITY.expand_sql_text (
    input_sql_text  => 'SELECT * from v1',
    output_sql_text => result
  );
  DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line(result);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE test_expand_sql_text_noselect_invalid()
IS
  l_clob text;
BEGIN
  DBMS_UTILITY.expand_sql_text (
    input_sql_text  => 'DELETE FROM non_existing_view',
    output_sql_text => l_clob
  );
  DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line(l_clob);
END;

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE fetch_cursor_bulk_collection_intoxy()
IS
  TYPE tt_tbl  IS TABLE OF db2028_tt  INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
  TYPE s1_tbl  IS TABLE OF number     INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
  TYPE tt1_tbl IS TABLE OF db2028_tt1 INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
  TYPE s2_tbl  IS TABLE OF timestamp  INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
  x  tt_tbl;
  s1 s1_tbl;
  y  tt1_tbl;
  s2 s2_tbl;
  CURSOR c1 IS SELECT * FROM db2028_tab ORDER BY s1;
BEGIN
  OPEN c1;
  FETCH c1 BULK COLLECT INTO x, s1, y, s2;
  FOR i IN 1..x.count LOOP
    dbms_output.put_line(x(i) || ' ' || s1(i) || ' ' || y(i) || ' "' || s2(i) || '"');
  END LOOP;
  CLOSE c1;
  SELECT * BULK COLLECT INTO x, s1, y, s2 FROM db2028_tab ORDER BY s1;
  FOR i IN 1..x.count LOOP
    dbms_output.put_line(x(i) || ' ' || s1(i) || ' ' || y(i) || ' "' || s2(i) || '"');
  END LOOP;
end;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE multiset_intersect_test
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE multiset_except_test
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE multiset_intersect_test()
IS
  TYPE name_typ IS TABLE OF VARCHAR(50);
  color_name  name_typ;
  fruit_name  name_typ;
  common_name name_typ;
BEGIN
  color_name := name_typ('Red', 'Green', 'Blue', 'Orange', 'Peach', 'Yellow', 'Peach');
  fruit_name := name_typ('Mango', 'Orange', 'Grapes', 'Banana', 'Peach', 'Peach');
  common_name := color_name MULTISET INTERSECT UNIQUE fruit_name;
  FOR i IN common_name.FIRST .. common_name.LAST LOOP
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(common_name(i));
  END LOOP;
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE multiset_except_test()
IS
  TYPE name_typ IS TABLE OF VARCHAR(50);
  color_name  name_typ;
  fruit_name  name_typ;
  common_name name_typ;
BEGIN
  color_name := name_typ('Red', 'Green', 'Blue', 'Blue', 'Orange', 'Peach', 'Yellow');
  fruit_name := name_typ('Mango', 'Orange', 'Grapes', 'Banana', 'Peach');
  common_name := color_name MULTISET EXCEPT UNIQUE fruit_name;
  FOR i IN common_name.FIRST .. common_name.LAST LOOP
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(common_name(i));
  END LOOP;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION db1419_rec_func(cnt int) RETURN text IS
DECLARE
  CURSOR cur IS SELECT * FROM rm23152_tab LIMIT 1;
            BEGIN
              FOR rec IN cur LOOP
    IF cnt = 3 THEN
      exit;
            END IF;
            RAISE NOTICE 'Func Round % rec = %', cnt, rec;
            PERFORM db1419_rec_func(cnt +1); --Recursive call to the function
  END LOOP;
            RETURN 'Done';
            END; 
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE db2155_sch_1.db2155_pkg IS
  PROCEDURE proc;
  FUNCTION func() RETURN int;
  TYPE typ IS RECORD (a int, b int);
  TYPE colltyp IS TABLE OF int;
  var int := 10;
  CURSOR cur1 IS SELECT 1 FROM dual;
  CURSOR cur2(cv text) IS SELECT 2 FROM dual WHERE dummy = cv;
  exp EXCEPTION;
  PRAGMA EXCEPTION_INIT(exp, -21000);
END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY db2155_sch_1.db2155_pkg IS
  PROCEDURE proc IS
  BEGIN
    dbms_output.put_line('In package procedure');
  END;
  FUNCTION func() RETURN int IS
  BEGIN
    dbms_output.put_line('In package function');
    return 1;
  END;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE xml_funcs_proc()
IS
    xmltype_data XMLTYPE;
BEGIN
    SELECT person_data.EXTRACT_XML('/PDRecord/PDID/text()') INTO xmltype_data FROM person_xmltype LIMIT 1;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(xmltype_data.getNumberval());
    SELECT person_data.EXTRACT_XML('/PDRecord/PDEmail/text()') INTO xmltype_data FROM person_xmltype LIMIT 1;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(xmltype_data.getStringVal());
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(xmltype_data.getClobVal());
END;

  person_id   integer,
  person_data xmltype
);

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO person_xmltype
  (person_id, person_data)
VALUES
(1, xmltype('<PDRecord>
     <PDName>test_user1</PDName>
     <PDID>1</PDID>
     <PDEmail>test_user1@testmail.com</PDEmail>
 </PDRecord>'::xml)
),
(2, xmltype('<PDRecord>
     <PDName>test_user2</PDName>
     <PDID>2</PDID>
     <PDEmail>test_user2@testmail.com</PDEmail>
   </PDRecord>'::xml)
),
(3, xmltype('<PDRecord>
     <PDName>test_user3</PDName>
     <PDID>3</PDID>
     <PDEmail>test_user3@testmail.com</PDEmail>
   </PDRecord>'::xml)
),
(4, xmltype('<PDRecord>
     <PDName>test_user4</PDName>
     <PDID>4</PDID>
     <PDEmail>test_user4@testmail.com</PDEmail>
   </PDRecord>'::TEXT)
),
(5, xmltype('<PDRecord>
     <PDName>test_user5</PDName>
     <PDID>5</PDID>
     <PDEmail>test_user5@testmail.com</PDEmail>
   </PDRecord>'::CLOB)
) ;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE xml_funcs_proc()
IS
    xmltype_data XMLTYPE;
BEGIN
    SELECT person_data.EXTRACT_XML('/PDRecord/PDID/text()') INTO xmltype_data FROM person_xmltype LIMIT 1;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(xmltype_data.getNumberval());
    SELECT person_data.EXTRACT_XML('/PDRecord/PDEmail/text()') INTO xmltype_data FROM person_xmltype LIMIT 1;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(xmltype_data.getStringVal());
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(xmltype_data.getClobVal());
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
SELECT person_data.EXTRACT_XML('/PDRecord/PDName') FROM person_xmltype
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
SELECT EXTRACT_XML(person_data, '/PDRecord/PDName') FROM person_xmltype
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
SELECT EXTRACT_XML(xmltype('<a xmlns="http://example.com"><b>test</b><b>test1</b></a>'), '//mydefns:b', ARRAY[ARRAY['mydefns', 'http://example.com']])
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
SELECT person_data.EXTRACT_XML('/PDRecord/PDName') FROM person_xmltype
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
SELECT EXTRACT_XML(person_data, '/PDRecord/PDName') FROM person_xmltype
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
SELECT EXTRACT_XML(xmltype('<a xmlns="http://example.com"><b>test</b><b>test1</b></a>'), '//mydefns:b', ARRAY[ARRAY['mydefns', 'http://example.com']])
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
drop procedure xml_funcs_proc;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE xml_funcs_proc()
IS
    xmltype_data XMLTYPE;
BEGIN
    SELECT person_data.EXTRACT_XML('/PDRecord/PDID/text()') INTO xmltype_data FROM person_xmltype LIMIT 1;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(xmltype_data.getNumberval());
    SELECT person_data.EXTRACT_XML('/PDRecord/PDEmail/text()') INTO xmltype_data FROM person_xmltype LIMIT 1;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(xmltype_data.getStringVal());
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(xmltype_data.getClobVal());
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP package body core_pkg_nvl_date
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP package core_pkg_nvl_date
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE core_pkg_nvl_date
IS
     d_date DATE;
     v_varchar varchar(200);
     FUNCTION test RETURN void;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY core_pkg_nvl_date
IS
 FUNCTION test RETURN void IS
 BEGIN
	SELECT to_date('01-01-2000','dd-mm-yyyy') INTO d_date FROM dual;
	v_varchar := concat(d_date,' Monday');
	v_varchar := initcap(v_varchar);
	dbms_output.put_line('date = ' || nvl(NULL,d_date));
 END;
END;

  code        VARCHAR2(5),
  description VARCHAR2(50)
);

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO open_tab_dbassert VALUES ('ONE', 'Description for ONE');
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO open_tab_dbassert VALUES ('TWO', 'Description for TWO');
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE secret_tab_dbassert (
  code        VARCHAR2(5),
  description VARCHAR2(50)
);

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO secret_tab_dbassert VALUES ('CODE1', 'SECRET 1');
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO secret_tab_dbassert VALUES ('CODE2', 'SECRET 2');
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE get_open_data_dbassert(p_code IN VARCHAR2) AS
  l_sql     VARCHAR2(32767);
  c_cursor  SYS_REFCURSOR;
  l_buffer  VARCHAR2(32767);
BEGIN
  DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line('Raw input format: (' || p_code || ')');
  l_sql := 'SELECT description FROM open_tab_dbassert WHERE code = ''' || p_code || '''';
 DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line(l_sql);
  OPEN c_cursor FOR l_sql;
  LOOP
    FETCH c_cursor INTO  l_buffer;
    EXIT WHEN c_cursor%NOTFOUND;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line(l_buffer);
  END LOOP;
  close c_cursor;
  l_buffer:=null;

  DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line('Input with DBMS_ASSERT : DBMS_ASSERT.ENQUOTE_LITERAL(' || p_code || ')');
  l_sql := 'SELECT description FROM open_tab_dbassert WHERE code = ' || sys.DBMS_ASSERT.ENQUOTE_LITERAL(p_code);
 DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line(l_sql);
  OPEN c_cursor FOR l_sql;
  LOOP
    FETCH c_cursor INTO  l_buffer;
    EXIT WHEN c_cursor%NOTFOUND;
    DBMS_OUTPUT.put_line(l_buffer);
  END LOOP;
  close c_cursor;
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO table1_2235 VALUES (10, BFILENAME('tmp_2235','file1_2235.txt'));
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO table1_2235 VALUES (20, BFILENAME('wrongdir','file2_2235.txt'));
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO table2_2235 VALUES (10, UTL_RAW.CAST_TO_RAW('abcd'));
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO table3_2235 VALUES (10, 'abcd');
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE displaybfile_proc() AUTHID CURRENT_USER
IS
File_loc BFILE;
Buffer RAW(32767);
RetVal INTEGER;
Amount BINARY_INTEGER := 1024;
Position INTEGER := 1;
BEGIN
/* Select the BFILE */
SELECT col2_2235 INTO File_loc FROM table1_2235 WHERE col1_2235 = 10;
DBMS_LOB.FILEOPEN(File_loc, DBMS_LOB.FILE_READONLY);
DBMS_LOB.READ(File_loc, Amount, Position, Buffer);
DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('File contents are' || Buffer );
DBMS_LOB.FILECLOSE(File_loc);
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE substringbfile_proc() AUTHID CURRENT_USER
IS
File_loc BFILE;
Position INTEGER := 10;
Buffer RAW(32767);
RetVal INTEGER;
BEGIN
Buffer := DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(File_loc, 255, Position);
IF Buffer is NULL THEN
DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Buffer is NULL');
END IF;
DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('file contents in BFILE are' || Buffer );
/* Select the BFILE: */
SELECT col2_2235 INTO File_loc FROM table1_2235 WHERE col1_2235 = 10;
DBMS_LOB.FILEOPEN(File_loc, DBMS_LOB.FILE_READONLY);
Buffer := DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(File_loc, 255, Position);
DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('file contents in BFILE are' || Buffer );
DBMS_LOB.FILECLOSE(File_loc);
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
drop procedure xml_dom_proc1;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
drop procedure xml_dom_proc2;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE xml_dom_proc1()
IS
        xml_doc DBMS_XMLDOM.DOMDocument;
        root_node DBMS_XMLDOM.DOMNode;
        item_node DBMS_XMLDOM.DOMNode;
BEGIN
        xml_doc := DBMS_XMLDOM.newDOMDocument(XMLTYPE('<a:query xmlns:a="jabber:iq:roster"><a:item a:subscription="both" a:jid="romeo@example.com"></a:item></a:query>'));
        root_node := DBMS_XMLDOM.getfirstchild(dbms_xmldom.makeNode(xml_doc));
        item_node := dbms_xmldom.getfirstchild(root_node);
        dbms_output.put_line('item node: ' || dbms_xmldom.getnodename(item_node));
        dbms_output.put_line('item attr: ' || dbms_xmldom.getattribute(dbms_xmldom.makeelement(item_node), 'jid', 'jabber:iq:roster'));
        DBMS_XMLDOM.freeDocument(xml_doc);
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE xml_dom_proc2()
IS
    l_xmltype XMLTYPE;
    l_domdoc dbms_xmldom.DOMDocument;
    l_root_node dbms_xmldom.DOMNode;
    l_department_element dbms_xmldom.DOMElement;
    l_departments_node dbms_xmldom.DOMNode;
    l_branch_element dbms_xmldom.DOMElement;
    l_branches_node dbms_xmldom.DOMNode;
BEGIN
    l_domdoc := dbms_xmldom.newDomDocument;
    l_root_node := dbms_xmldom.makeNode(l_domdoc);
    l_department_element := dbms_xmldom.createElement(l_domdoc, 'Departments');
    l_departments_node := dbms_xmldom.appendChild(l_root_node,dbms_xmldom.makeNode(l_department_element));
    l_branch_element := dbms_xmldom.createElement(l_domdoc, 'Branches');
    l_branches_node := dbms_xmldom.appendChild(l_root_node,dbms_xmldom.makeNode(l_branch_element));
    l_xmltype := dbms_xmldom.getXmlType(l_domdoc);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(l_xmltype.getStringVal());
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
drop procedure xml_dom_proc1;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
drop procedure xml_dom_proc2;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE xml_dom_proc1()
IS
        xml_doc DBMS_XMLDOM.DOMDocument;
        root_node DBMS_XMLDOM.DOMNode;
        item_node DBMS_XMLDOM.DOMNode;
BEGIN
        xml_doc := DBMS_XMLDOM.newDOMDocument(XMLTYPE('<a:query xmlns:a="jabber:iq:roster"><a:item a:subscription="both" a:jid="romeo@example.com"></a:item></a:query>'));
        root_node := DBMS_XMLDOM.getfirstchild(dbms_xmldom.makeNode(xml_doc));
        item_node := dbms_xmldom.getfirstchild(root_node);
        dbms_output.put_line('item node: ' || dbms_xmldom.getnodename(item_node));
        dbms_output.put_line('item attr: ' || dbms_xmldom.getattribute(dbms_xmldom.makeelement(item_node), 'jid', 'jabber:iq:roster'));
        DBMS_XMLDOM.freeDocument(xml_doc);
END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE xml_dom_proc2()
IS
    l_xmltype XMLTYPE;
    l_domdoc dbms_xmldom.DOMDocument;
    l_root_node dbms_xmldom.DOMNode;
    l_department_element dbms_xmldom.DOMElement;
    l_departments_node dbms_xmldom.DOMNode;
    l_branch_element dbms_xmldom.DOMElement;
    l_branches_node dbms_xmldom.DOMNode;
BEGIN
    l_domdoc := dbms_xmldom.newDomDocument;
    l_root_node := dbms_xmldom.makeNode(l_domdoc);
    l_department_element := dbms_xmldom.createElement(l_domdoc, 'Departments');
    l_departments_node := dbms_xmldom.appendChild(l_root_node,dbms_xmldom.makeNode(l_department_element));
    l_branch_element := dbms_xmldom.createElement(l_domdoc, 'Branches');
    l_branches_node := dbms_xmldom.appendChild(l_root_node,dbms_xmldom.makeNode(l_branch_element));
    l_xmltype := dbms_xmldom.getXmlType(l_domdoc);
    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(l_xmltype.getStringVal());
END;

create or replace procedure test_bytea_in_in(z in bytea,y in numeric) is declare begin null ;end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_bytea_two( a bytea ,b bytea)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_two_in(z in bytea,y in bytea) is declare begin INSERT INTO test_bytea_two values(y,z);end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_bytea_three( a bytea ,b bytea,c bytea);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_three_in(z in bytea,y in bytea,x in bytea) is declare begin INSERT INTO test_bytea_three values(x,y,z);end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_bytea_three_with_numeric( a bytea ,b bytea,c bytea,d  numeric);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_three_in_with_numeric(z in bytea,y in bytea,x in bytea,xx numeric) is declare begin INSERT INTO test_bytea_three_with_numeric values(x,y,z,xx);end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_out(z out bytea) is declare begin select a into z from test_bytea_three_with_numeric ;end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_out_two(x out bytea,z out bytea) is declare begin select a into z from test_bytea_three_with_numeric ;select b into x from test_bytea_three_with_numeric ;end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_out_two_with_num(x out bytea,z out bytea,y in numeric ) is declare begin select a into z from test_bytea_three_with_numeric where d = y; select b into x from test_bytea_three_with_numeric where d = y; end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_out_two_with_num_varchar(x out bytea,z out bytea,y in numeric,xx in out  varchar ) is declare begin select a into z from test_bytea_three_with_numeric where d = y; select b into x from test_bytea_three_with_numeric where d = y;xx := 'EnterpriseDB';end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_out_two_with_numinout_varchar(x out bytea,z out bytea,y in out numeric,xx in out  varchar ) is declare begin select a into z from test_bytea_three_with_numeric where d = y;select b into x from test_bytea_three_with_numeric where d = y;xx := 'EnterpriseDB';y := 106;end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_inout_two_with_numinout_varchar(x out bytea,z out bytea,y in out numeric,xx in out  varchar ,yy out bytea) is declare begin select a into z from test_bytea_three_with_numeric where d = y;select b into x from test_bytea_three_with_numeric where d = y;xx := 'EnterpriseDB';y := 106;end;

create or replace procedure test_bytea_in_in(z in bytea,y in numeric) is declare begin null ;end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_bytea_two( a bytea ,b bytea)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_two_in(z in bytea,y in bytea) is declare begin INSERT INTO test_bytea_two values(y,z);end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_bytea_three( a bytea ,b bytea,c bytea);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_three_in(z in bytea,y in bytea,x in bytea) is declare begin INSERT INTO test_bytea_three values(x,y,z);end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_bytea_three_with_numeric( a bytea ,b bytea,c bytea,d  numeric);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_three_in_with_numeric(z in bytea,y in bytea,x in bytea,xx numeric) is declare begin INSERT INTO test_bytea_three_with_numeric values(x,y,z,xx);end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_out(z out bytea) is declare begin select a into z from test_bytea_three_with_numeric ;end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_out_two(x out bytea,z out bytea) is declare begin select a into z from test_bytea_three_with_numeric ;select b into x from test_bytea_three_with_numeric ;end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_out_two_with_num(x out bytea,z out bytea,y in numeric ) is declare begin select a into z from test_bytea_three_with_numeric where d = y; select b into x from test_bytea_three_with_numeric where d = y; end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_out_two_with_num_varchar(x out bytea,z out bytea,y in numeric,xx in out  varchar ) is declare begin select a into z from test_bytea_three_with_numeric where d = y; select b into x from test_bytea_three_with_numeric where d = y;xx := 'EnterpriseDB';end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_out_two_with_numinout_varchar(x out bytea,z out bytea,y in out numeric,xx in out  varchar ) is declare begin select a into z from test_bytea_three_with_numeric where d = y;select b into x from test_bytea_three_with_numeric where d = y;xx := 'EnterpriseDB';y := 106;end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure test_bytea_inout_two_with_numinout_varchar(x out bytea,z out bytea,y in out numeric,xx in out  varchar ,yy out bytea) is declare begin select a into z from test_bytea_three_with_numeric where d = y;select b into x from test_bytea_three_with_numeric where d = y;xx := 'EnterpriseDB';y := 106;end;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ByteaTest(id serial, f1 bytea);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE on_hand (item  inventory_item,count     integer);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
delete from on_hand WHERE count=1000;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select * from on_hand where count=1000;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

CREATE TABLE NET_TEXT (c cidr, i inet);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO NET_TEXT (c, i) VALUES ('192.168.1', '192.168.1.255/24');
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO NET_TEXT(c, i) VALUES ('10.1.2.3', '10.1.2.3/32');
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO NET_TEXT (c, i) VALUES ('10', '10.1.2.3/8');
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO NET_TEXT ( c, i) VALUES ('10.0.0.0', '10.1.2.3/8');
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
SELECT text(c) from NET_TEXT;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE NET_TEXT;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE tbl_net(c cidr, i inet);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO tbl_net (c, i) VALUES ('10:23::8000/113', '10:23::ffff');
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO tbl_net(c, i) VALUES ('::ffff:1.2.3.4', '::4.3.2.1/24');
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
SELECT text(c),text(i) from tbl_net;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE tbl_net;

select * from emp limit 1
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
SELECT
     typ.oid AS typoid, nspname, relname, attname, attrelid, attnum, attnotnull,
     attidentity != '' AS isidentity,
     CASE WHEN typ.typtype = 'd' THEN typ.typtypmod ELSE atttypmod END AS typmod,
     CASE WHEN atthasdef THEN (SELECT pg_get_expr(adbin, cls.oid) FROM pg_attrdef WHERE adrelid = cls.oid AND adnum = attr.attnum) ELSE NULL END AS default,
     CASE WHEN ((cls.relkind = ANY (ARRAY['r'::"char", 'p'::"char"]))
               OR ((cls.relkind = ANY (ARRAY['v'::"char", 'f'::"char"]))
               AND pg_column_is_updatable((cls.oid)::regclass, attr.attnum, false)))
  	           AND attr.attidentity NOT IN ('a') THEN 'true'::boolean
               ELSE 'false'::boolean
               END AS is_updatable,
     EXISTS (
       SELECT * FROM pg_index
       WHERE pg_index.indrelid = cls.oid AND
             pg_index.indisprimary AND
             attnum = ANY (indkey)
     ) AS isprimarykey,
     EXISTS (
       SELECT * FROM pg_index
       WHERE pg_index.indrelid = cls.oid AND
             pg_index.indisunique AND
             pg_index.indnkeyatts = 1 AND
             attnum = pg_index.indkey[0]
     ) AS isunique
FROM pg_attribute AS attr
JOIN pg_type AS typ ON attr.atttypid = typ.oid
JOIN pg_class AS cls ON cls.oid = attr.attrelid
JOIN pg_namespace AS ns ON ns.oid = cls.relnamespace
WHERE
     atttypid <> 0 AND
     relkind IN ('r', 'v', 'm') AND
     NOT attisdropped AND
     nspname NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema', 'sys') AND
     attnum > 0 AND
     ((attr.attrelid=2418878 AND attr.attnum=1) OR (attr.attrelid=2418878 AND attr.attnum=2) OR (attr.attrelid=2418878 AND attr.attnum=3) OR (attr.attrelid=2418878 AND attr.attnum=4) OR (attr.attrelid=2418878 AND attr.attnum=5) OR (attr.attrelid=2418878 AND attr.attnum=6) OR (attr.attrelid=2418878 AND attr.attnum=7) OR (attr.attrelid=2418878 AND attr.attnum=8))
ORDER BY attnum
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Quote
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create table Quote(id int4, b char)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create or replace procedure quoteproc(abc in integer)
is
declare
i integer:=0;
begin
while i < abc loop
insert into Quote values(1, 't');
i := i+1;
end loop;
end;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
select * from Quote
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
drop table Quote
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
drop procedure quoteproc
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create table if not exists Quote1(id int4, b char)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

is
declare
i integer:=0;
begin
while i < abc loop
insert into Quote1 values(1, 't');
i := i+1;
end loop;
end;

create or replace procedure defaultProc(y varchar, x integer default 20 + 1) is  begin  dbms_output.put_line('value of y = ' || y );  dbms_output.put_line('value of x = ' || x);  declare  res integer := x + 10/2;  begin  dbms_output.put_line('res = ' || res);  end; end;

);

DROP PROCEDURE DEPT_SELECT
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE  DEPT_SELECT  (    pDEPTNO IN  INTEGER,    pDNAME  OUT VARCHAR,    pLOC    OUT VARCHAR  ) AS DECLARE  CURSOR TESTCUR IS SELECT DNAME,LOC FROM DEPT;  REC RECORD; BEGIN  OPEN TESTCUR;  FETCH TESTCUR INTO REC;  pDNAME  := REC.DNAME;  pLOC    := REC.LOC;  CLOSE testcur; END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE DEPT_SELECT
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE  DEPT_SELECT  (    pDEPTNO IN  INTEGER,    pDNAME  OUT VARCHAR,    pLOC    OUT VARCHAR  ) AS DECLARE  CURSOR TESTCUR IS SELECT DNAME,LOC FROM DEPT;  REC RECORD; BEGIN  OPEN TESTCUR;  FETCH TESTCUR INTO REC;  pDNAME  := REC.DNAME;  pLOC    := REC.LOC;  CLOSE testcur; END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
DROP PROCEDURE EMP_INSERT
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE  EMP_INSERT  (     pENAME IN VARCHAR,     pJOB IN VARCHAR,     pSAL IN FLOAT4,     pCOMM IN FLOAT4,     pDEPTNO IN INTEGER,     pMgr IN INTEGER   ) AS DECLARE  CURSOR TESTCUR IS SELECT MAX(EMPNO) FROM EMP;  MAX_EMPNO INTEGER := 10; BEGIN  OPEN TESTCUR;  FETCH TESTCUR INTO MAX_EMPNO;  INSERT INTO EMP(EMPNO,ENAME,JOB,SAL,COMM,DEPTNO,MGR)    VALUES(MAX_EMPNO+1,pENAME,pJOB,pSAL,pCOMM,pDEPTNO,pMgr);  CLOSE testcur; END;

DROP PROCEDURE list_dept10
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE list_dept10 IS v_deptname VARCHAR2(30); BEGIN DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Dept No: 10'); SELECT dname INTO v_deptname FROM dept WHERE deptno = 10; DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Dept Name: ' || v_deptname); END;

DROP PROCEDURE refcur_out_callee
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE  refcur_inout_callee(v_refcur OUT SYS_REFCURSOR) IS BEGIN   OPEN v_refcur FOR SELECT ename FROM emp; END;

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION FuncReturningArrayVarchar(Name IN VARCHAR, Age IN INT,      		Sal IN  INT, WhoAmI IN OUT VARCHAR,CheckOut OUT INT) return VARCHAR[]     IS     Temp1 VARCHAR;    Temp2 VARCHAR;     Test_RefCursor REFCURSOR;     Ret VARCHAR[];  	    BEGIN 	      CheckOut:=100;  	        OPEN Test_RefCursor FOR SELECT c2 FROM tblTest1;  		FETCH Test_RefCursor INTO Temp2;  		 Temp1:=Temp2;  		  LOOP   		     FETCH Test_RefCursor INTO Temp2;  		     EXIT WHEN Test_RefCursor%NOTFOUND;  		     Temp1:=Temp1 || ',' || Temp2;  		  END LOOP;		 Ret:='{' || Temp1 || '}';  		return Ret;  	      END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

	TEST_REF REFCURSOR;
		BEGIN
			OPEN TEST_REF FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;
			RETURN TEST_REF;
		END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE	PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR) AS
	TEST_REF REFCURSOR;
		BEGIN
			OPEN TEST_REF FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;
			A:=TEST_REF;
		END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION GETREFCURSOR_OUT(R OUT REFCURSOR) RETURN REFCURSOR AS
	TEST_REF REFCURSOR;
	TEST_REF2 REFCURSOR;
		BEGIN
			OPEN TEST_REF FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;
			OPEN TEST_REF2 FOR SELECT b FROM TESTTAB;
			R:=TEST_REF2;
			RETURN TEST_REF;
		END;

			B:=TEST_REF2;
		END;

CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE REFCURSOR_PKG IS
	FUNCTION GETREFCURSOR RETURN REFCURSOR;
PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR);
FUNCTION GETREFCURSOR_OUT(R OUT REFCURSOR) RETURN REFCURSOR;
PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORSVVPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR,B OUT REFCURSOR);
PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORSVPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR,B OUT REFCURSOR);
FUNCTION DEFAULTINRETURNFUNC(A IN INT4 DEFAULT 29) RETURN INT4;
PROCEDURE DEFAULTINPROC(B OUT INT4,A IN INT4 DEFAULT 29);
FUNCTION GETSYSREFCURSOR RETURN SYS_REFCURSOR;
PROCEDURE GETSYSREFCURSORPROC(A OUT SYS_REFCURSOR);
FUNCTION GETSYSREFCURSOR_OUT(R OUT SYS_REFCURSOR) RETURN SYS_REFCURSOR;
PROCEDURE GETSYSREFCURSORSVVPROC(A OUT SYS_REFCURSOR,B OUT SYS_REFCURSOR);
PROCEDURE GETSYSREFCURSORSVPROC(A OUT SYS_REFCURSOR,B OUT SYS_REFCURSOR);
PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORSIVPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR,B OUT REFCURSOR);
PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORSIIPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR,B OUT REFCURSOR);
PROCEDURE GETSYSREFCURSORSIVPROC(A OUT SYS_REFCURSOR,B OUT SYS_REFCURSOR);
PROCEDURE GETSYSREFCURSORSIIPROC(A OUT SYS_REFCURSOR,B OUT SYS_REFCURSOR);
END REFCURSOR_PKG;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY REFCURSOR_PKG IS
FUNCTION GETREFCURSOR RETURN REFCURSOR AS
	TEST_REF REFCURSOR;
		BEGIN
			OPEN TEST_REF FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;
			RETURN TEST_REF;
		END;
PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR) AS
	TEST_REF REFCURSOR;
		BEGIN
			OPEN TEST_REF FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;
			A:=TEST_REF;
		END;FUNCTION GETREFCURSOR_OUT(R OUT REFCURSOR) RETURN REFCURSOR AS
	TEST_REF REFCURSOR;
	TEST_REF2 REFCURSOR;
		BEGIN
			OPEN TEST_REF FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;
			OPEN TEST_REF2 FOR SELECT b FROM TESTTAB;
			R:=TEST_REF2;
			RETURN TEST_REF;
		END;PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORSVVPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR,B OUT REFCURSOR) AS
	TEST_REF REFCURSOR;
	TEST_REF2 REFCURSOR;
		BEGIN
			OPEN TEST_REF FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;
			OPEN TEST_REF2 FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;

INSERT INTO TESTTAB VALUES('V1',1)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO TESTTAB VALUES('V2',2)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE	FUNCTION GETREFCURSOR RETURN REFCURSOR AS
	TEST_REF REFCURSOR;
		BEGIN
			OPEN TEST_REF FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;
			RETURN TEST_REF;
		END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE	PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR) AS
	TEST_REF REFCURSOR;
		BEGIN
			OPEN TEST_REF FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;
			A:=TEST_REF;
		END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION GETREFCURSOR_OUT(R OUT REFCURSOR) RETURN REFCURSOR AS
	TEST_REF REFCURSOR;
	TEST_REF2 REFCURSOR;
		BEGIN
			OPEN TEST_REF FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;
			OPEN TEST_REF2 FOR SELECT b FROM TESTTAB;
			R:=TEST_REF2;
			RETURN TEST_REF;
		END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE	PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORSVVPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR,B OUT REFCURSOR) AS
	TEST_REF REFCURSOR;
	TEST_REF2 REFCURSOR;
		BEGIN
			OPEN TEST_REF FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;
			OPEN TEST_REF2 FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;
			A:=TEST_REF;
			B:=TEST_REF2;
		END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE	PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORSVPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR,B OUT REFCURSOR) AS
	TEST_REF REFCURSOR;
		BEGIN
			OPEN TEST_REF FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;
			A:=TEST_REF;
			B:=A;
		END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE	FUNCTION DEFAULTINRETURNFUNC(A IN INT4 DEFAULT 29) RETURN INT4 AS
		BEGIN
			RETURN A;
		END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE	PROCEDURE DEFAULTINPROC(B OUT INT4,A IN INT4 DEFAULT 29) AS
		BEGIN
			B:=A;
		END;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE REFCURSOR_PKG IS
	FUNCTION GETREFCURSOR RETURN REFCURSOR;
PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR);
FUNCTION GETREFCURSOR_OUT(R OUT REFCURSOR) RETURN REFCURSOR;
PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORSVVPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR,B OUT REFCURSOR);
PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORSVPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR,B OUT REFCURSOR);
FUNCTION DEFAULTINRETURNFUNC(A IN INT4 DEFAULT 29) RETURN INT4;
PROCEDURE DEFAULTINPROC(B OUT INT4,A IN INT4 DEFAULT 29);
FUNCTION GETSYSREFCURSOR RETURN SYS_REFCURSOR;
PROCEDURE GETSYSREFCURSORPROC(A OUT SYS_REFCURSOR);
FUNCTION GETSYSREFCURSOR_OUT(R OUT SYS_REFCURSOR) RETURN SYS_REFCURSOR;
PROCEDURE GETSYSREFCURSORSVVPROC(A OUT SYS_REFCURSOR,B OUT SYS_REFCURSOR);
PROCEDURE GETSYSREFCURSORSVPROC(A OUT SYS_REFCURSOR,B OUT SYS_REFCURSOR);
PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORSIVPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR,B OUT REFCURSOR);
PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORSIIPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR,B OUT REFCURSOR);
PROCEDURE GETSYSREFCURSORSIVPROC(A OUT SYS_REFCURSOR,B OUT SYS_REFCURSOR);
PROCEDURE GETSYSREFCURSORSIIPROC(A OUT SYS_REFCURSOR,B OUT SYS_REFCURSOR);
END REFCURSOR_PKG;

	TEST_REF SYS_REFCURSOR;
	TEST_REF2 SYS_REFCURSOR;
		BEGIN
			OPEN TEST_REF FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;
			OPEN TEST_REF2 FOR SELECT b FROM TESTTAB;
			R:=TEST_REF2;
			RETURN TEST_REF;
		END;

		BEGIN
			OPEN TEST_REF FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;
			A:=TEST_REF;
		END;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION GETREFCURSOR_OUT(R OUT REFCURSOR) RETURN REFCURSOR AS
	TEST_REF REFCURSOR;
	TEST_REF2 REFCURSOR;
		BEGIN
			OPEN TEST_REF FOR SELECT * FROM TESTTAB;
			OPEN TEST_REF2 FOR SELECT b FROM TESTTAB;
			R:=TEST_REF2;
			RETURN TEST_REF;
		END;

CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE REFCURSOR_PKG IS
	FUNCTION GETREFCURSOR RETURN REFCURSOR;

PROCEDURE GETSYSREFCURSORSVPROC(A OUT SYS_REFCURSOR,B OUT SYS_REFCURSOR);
PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORSIVPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR,B OUT REFCURSOR);
PROCEDURE GETREFCURSORSIIPROC(A OUT REFCURSOR,B OUT REFCURSOR);

END REFCURSOR_PKG;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_Index
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
create temp table test_Index (major int4, minor INT4, name VARCHAR)
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE TABLE functional_index (name NAME,id int);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE SEQUENCE id INCREMENT BY 5 START WITH 1000 MAXVALUE 1010 MINVALUE 1000 Cache 3;
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO functional_index VALUES('Ali',id.NextVal);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
INSERT INTO functional_index VALUES('Ahmed',id.NextVal);
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE INDEX upper_name_idx ON functional_index(upper(name));
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
SELECT * from functional_index where upper(name) ='Ali';
### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###

CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE PKG_INVOKE_exec_pro IS
PROCEDURE exec_pro(namein IN VARCHAR2,nameout OUT VARCHAR2);
END PKG_INVOKE_exec_pro;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY PKG_INVOKE_exec_pro IS
PROCEDURE local(namein VARCHAR2, nameout OUT VARCHAR2)
IS
BEGIN
nameout := TRANSLATE(namein,'AEIOUaeiou','EIOUAeioua');
END local;
PROCEDURE exec_pro(namein IN VARCHAR2,nameout OUT VARCHAR2)
IS
countX NUMBER;
BEGIN
local(namein, nameout);
END exec_pro;
END PKG_INVOKE_exec_pro;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE PKG_Variable_Test IS
alpha   varchar(20);
beta    numeric;
PROCEDURE proc(aa OUT varchar,bb OUT numeric);
END PKG_Variable_Test;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY PKG_Variable_Test IS
PROCEDURE proc(aa OUT varchar,bb OUT numeric) IS
BEGIN
alpha := 'alpha';
aa := alpha;
beta := 2;
bb := beta;
END proc;
END PKG_Variable_Test;

CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE PKG_INVOKE_exec_pro IS
PROCEDURE exec_pro(namein IN VARCHAR2,nameout OUT VARCHAR2);
END PKG_INVOKE_exec_pro;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY PKG_INVOKE_exec_pro IS
PROCEDURE local(namein VARCHAR2, nameout OUT VARCHAR2)
IS
BEGIN
nameout := TRANSLATE(namein,'AEIOUaeiou','EIOUAeioua');
END local;
PROCEDURE exec_pro(namein IN VARCHAR2,nameout OUT VARCHAR2)
IS
countX NUMBER;
BEGIN
local(namein, nameout);
END exec_pro;
END PKG_INVOKE_exec_pro;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE PKG_Variable_Test IS
alpha   varchar(20);
beta    numeric;
PROCEDURE proc(aa OUT varchar,bb OUT numeric);
END PKG_Variable_Test;

### SQL QUERY PARSER LOG ###
CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE BODY PKG_Variable_Test IS
PROCEDURE proc(aa OUT varchar,bb OUT numeric) IS
BEGIN
alpha := 'alpha';
aa := alpha;
beta := 2;
bb := beta;
END proc;
END PKG_Variable_Test;

 END;
